TL;DR: 提出SIEVE方法，将多模态情感分析中缺失模态的修复决策从"必须修复"转变为样本级别的可学习判断，通过证据门控选择直接预测或修复后预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法默认缺失模态必须修复，但实验表明并非所有样本都需要修复，不同模态子集对不同样本更优，因此需要样本级别的决策机制。

Method: SIEVE包含直接预测分支和修复分支，通过每样本损失差导出经验充分性信号，构建联合建模充分性和认知不确定性的证据门控，在样本级别决策是否修复。

Result: 在CMU-MOSI和IEMOCAP数据集上，SIEVE在不同缺失率下均一致提升多种修复骨干网络性能，接近每样本双分支可达最优。

Conclusion: 修复并非对所有样本有益，SIEVE作为即插即用决策模块可有效提升现有修复方法，实验结果验证了样本级别决策的必要性和有效性。

Abstract: Existing methods for multimodal sentiment analysis (MSA) under missing modalities usually follow a repair-first paradigm. We revisit this assumption and ask: \emph{should every missing modality be repaired?} A per-sample oracle analysis shows the answer is not always: full-modality input is optimal for only a small fraction of samples, and every modality subset is preferred by some samples. These results suggest that adding or repairing modalities may not always improve prediction, and that the utility of each modality is sample-dependent. Building on this finding, we propose \textbf{S}ufficiency-\textbf{I}nformed \textbf{E}vidential \textbf{V}al\textbf{vE} (\textbf{SIEVE}) that turns ``whether to repair'' into an explicit, learnable decision at the sample level. SIEVE compares a direct prediction branch with a repair branch, derives an empirical sufficiency signal from their per-sample loss gap, and routes each input through an evidential gate that jointly models sufficiency and its epistemic uncertainty. SIEVE is repair-agnostic: it operates as a plug-and-play decision on top of any explicit or implicit repair module, without modifying its internal design. Experiments on CMU-MOSI and IEMOCAP show that SIEVE consistently improves representative repair backbones across evaluated missing rates, and approaches the per-sample dual-branch achievable optimum.

</details>


### [219] [Debate-on-Graph: Reliable and Adaptive Reasoning of Large Language Model on Uncertain Knowledge Graph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17266)
*Peiji Yu,Xin Chen,Tianxing Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出 Debate-on-Graph (DoG) 框架，利用不确定知识图谱（UKG）增强大语言模型（LLM）在问答任务中的推理能力，通过启发式子图搜索和多智能体辩论机制，有效过滤噪声、减少幻觉，在四个基准数据集上达到最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM 在处理问答任务时容易出现幻觉且缺乏相关知识；现有 KG 增强方法无法识别和过滤 KG 中的噪声与错误，反而可能放大幻觉。因此，需要一种能够利用 UKG 中不确定性信息、自适应过滤噪声并可靠推理的方法。

Method: 提出 DoG 框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) 针对 UKG 设计的启发式搜索算法，提取可靠且与问题相关的子图，降低检索知识中的噪声和错误；(2) 多智能体辩论机制，通过自适应对抗性辩论充分挖掘 UKG 知识并保持证据可靠性，最终产生可靠答案。

Result: 在四个基准 QA 数据集上的实验表明，DoG 在现有 LLM 推理方法和基于 KG 的基线上均达到最先进性能，且实现了可靠和自适应的推理。

Conclusion: DoG 框架有效结合了 UKG 的不确定性信息与 LLM 的推理能力，通过子图搜索和多智能体辩论显著提升了问答任务的可靠性，为 LLM 与知识图谱的协同推理提供了新范式。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in natural language processing. However, LLMs often suffer from hallucinations and lack of relevant knowledge when dealing with question answering (QA) tasks. To mitigate these issues, knowledge graphs (KGs) have been utilized to enhance LLM reasoning. Nevertheless, KGs often contain noise and errors, while existing KG-enhanced LLM approaches are generally unable to identify and filter such noisy and erroneous content, which can instead amplify hallucinations and pose challenges for reliable reasoning. Uncertain knowledge graphs (UKGs), which associate each triple with a confidence score to quantify uncertainty, offer a promising direction to address this challenge. Compared with prior work, we investigate how to leverage UKGs to support LLMs for QA. We propose Debate-on-Graph (DoG), a new framework that enables LLMs and UKGs to collaborate adaptively for reliable reasoning. Specifically, we first design a heuristic search algorithm tailored for UKGs to extract reliable and question-relevant subgraphs, thereby reducing noise and errors in retrieved knowledge. We then introduce a Multi-Agent Debate mechanism, which yields reliable answers through adaptive adversarial debates, aiming to fully exploit the knowledge in UKGs while preserving the reliability of retrieved evidence. Extensive experiments on four benchmark QA datasets show that DoG achieves state-of-the-art performance over existing LLM reasoning methods and KG-based baselines, while enabling reliable and adaptive reasoning. Our code is available at https://github.com/seucoin/Debate-on-Graph.

</details>


### [220] [Safety That Does Not Transfer: Cross-Lingual Clinical Correctness Drift in Deployable Medical Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17270)
*Anthonio Oladimeji Gabriel,Dimeji Olawuyi,Toba Ajayi,Temilola Aderemi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 针对本地可部署的小型语言模型，在豪萨语临床场景中的安全性评估发现，这些模型的临床正确性从英语的1.57骤降至豪萨语的-0.03，而前沿模型表现稳定，表明安全缺陷源自模型的可部署层级，而非语言或临床任务本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型的安全评估主要针对英语和前沿系统，但低资源医疗环境中实际使用的是本地运行的小型量化模型，且使用当地语言。作者希望探究在这些真实部署条件下，临床安全性是否仍然可靠。

Method: 构建匹配的英语-豪萨语问题对，涵盖疟疾、镰状细胞病、肺结核三种高负担疾病，包括知识回忆、急诊分诊、诱导性和传统疗法问题。评估5个本地可部署模型（4-9B参数，含2个医学微调模型）和1个前沿模型，由两名独立豪萨语使用者根据尼日利亚国家治疗指南评分。

Result: 本地可部署模型在英语中平均临床正确性为1.57，在豪萨语中骤降至-0.03（2表示正确，-1表示有害）；前沿模型仅从2.00降至1.75，且无有害回答。漂移在所有三种疾病条件下一致。评分者一致性在临床正确性上较高（kappa=0.70），但在有害性判断上较差（kappa=0.22）。

Conclusion: 前沿模型能够用豪萨语正确回答相同问题，因此缺陷既非语言问题也非临床材料问题，而是可部署模型层级的固有问题。

Abstract: Safety evaluation of large language models is conducted predominantly in English and predominantly on frontier systems. Neither condition describes how such models are encountered in low-resource health settings, where small quantised systems are run locally and queried in local languages. We ask whether clinical safety established in English transfers to Hausa, and whether any failure is attributable to the language, the clinical task, or the class of model that low-resource deployment admits. Matched English-Hausa question pairs were built for three conditions of high burden in northern Nigeria: malaria, sickle cell disease, and tuberculosis, probing knowledge recall, emergency triage, a leading question inviting a contraindicated action, and a traditional-remedy claim. Six models were evaluated: five locally deployable systems of 4-9 billion parameters, two medically fine-tuned, and one frontier system. All 128 responses were scored against Nigerian national treatment guidelines by two fluent Hausa speakers working independently and blind to one another. Among locally deployable models, mean clinical correctness fell from 1.57 in English to -0.03 in Hausa, on a scale where 2 denotes a correct answer and -1 an actively harmful one. The frontier model moved from 2.00 to 1.75 and produced no response judged harmful in either language. Drift was consistent across all three conditions. Inter-rater agreement was substantial for clinical correctness (kappa = 0.70); agreement on harm was initially poor (kappa = 0.22) and is examined in detail. Because a frontier model answers the same questions competently in Hausa, the deficit is a property neither of the language nor of the clinical material, but of the deployable tier.

</details>


### [221] [Team DACTYL at PAN 2026: Bayesian Data Mixing and Empirical X-risk Minimization for AI-text Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17382)
*Shantanu Thorat*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过精心选择训练数据集并使用贝叶斯分类头微调BERT-tiny模型，结合DeBERTa-V3-large、ModernBERT-large和MCGrad三种分类器，在PAN 2026测试集上取得了优异的OOD检测性能，其中MCGrad模型平均得分0.974，排名第二。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI生成文本检测分类器在域内表现良好，但在域外数据上性能下降，存在过拟合问题；简单地组合训练数据集有时反而会鼓励捷径学习，因此需要更精细的数据集筛选策略。

Method: 使用贝叶斯分类头微调BERT-tiny模型，从三个数据集中选择样本构建统一训练集；训练三种分类器：基于经验X风险最小化的DeBERTa-V3-large和ModernBERT-large，以及校准ModernBERT-large预测结果的MCGrad模型。

Result: DeBERTa-V3-large平均得分0.882，ModernBERT-large得分0.96，MCGrad得分0.974（排名第二），均基于AUROC、F₁、C@1、Brier分数和F_{0.5u}五个指标。

Conclusion: 精心筛选训练数据集可以显著提升域外性能，表明数据质量与数据多样性同样重要。

Abstract: Existing research shows that AI-generated text detection classifiers achieve strong in-distribution (ID) performance but do not maintain the same performance on out-of-distribution (OOD) texts, suggesting overfitting to dataset-specific features. However, combining different training datasets doesn't always improve performance and, in some cases, can even encourage shortcut learning. To address this issue, we fine-tune BERT-tiny models with Bayesian classification heads to select texts across three different datasets to use as a consolidated training set. We trained three different classifiers: fine-tuned DeBERTa-V3-large and ModernBERT-large classifiers via empirical X-risk minimization, and an MCGrad model that calibrates the predictions from the ModernBERT-large classifier. The DeBERTa-V3-large-large classifier achieves a mean score of 0.882 on the PAN 2026 test set across five metrics: AUROC, $F_1$, C@1, Brier score, and $F_{0.5u}$. ModernBERT-large achieves a score of 0.96 while MCGrad achieves the best score of the three with a mean score of 0.974, ranking second on the leaderboard. Our results highlight that careful dataset curation can lead to strong OOD performance. We release our ModernBERT-large and DeBERTa-V3-large models at https://huggingface.co/collections/ShantanuT01/panclef-2026 .

</details>


### [222] [The Librarian Who Refused to Code: Model-Dependent Identity Enactment in LLM Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17420)
*Shayell Aharon Salomon,Noam Israel,Ido Safruti,Amir Shaked*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过受控实验发现，角色设定（personas）对代码生成的影响依赖于模型，并非通用质量提升手段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 角色设定被广泛用于系统提示，但其对代码生成的实际效果缺乏基于受控、预注册条件的系统评估。

Method: 设置四种提示条件（无角色、两种工程师角色、研究馆员角色），在12个代码生成任务、两个前沿模型上进行测试，每条件运行5次，共480个补全结果，采用预注册的混合效应分析。

Result: 角色效果因模型而异；条件与模型的交互效应显著；在Claude Opus上，极简工程师角色减少30%输出且未提高正确性，而研究馆员角色导致55/60次角色内免责声明和12次无代码响应，正确率从0.92降至0.67；GPT-5.5未出现此类行为。

Conclusion: 角色设定表现为模型依赖的行为策略偏差，而非通用的质量干预措施。

Abstract: Biographical personas are widely used in system prompts, but their effects on code generation are rarely evaluated under controlled, pre-registered conditions. We tested four prompt conditions (no persona, two engineer personas, and a research-librarian persona), 12 code-generation tasks, two frontier models, and five runs per cell (480 completions). Persona effects differed between the two tested models. Under the pre-registered mixed-effects analysis, the condition-by-model interaction was significant for provider-reported output tokens; a post-hoc visible-character measure showed the same qualitative pattern. Six GPT-5.5 completions were length-capped and are reported separately. On Claude Opus, the minimalist engineer persona reduced visible output by 30% (33% in provider tokens) without improving correctness, while the thorough engineer persona increased output without a correctness gain. In an exploratory post-hoc analysis, the librarian persona elicited in-character disclaimers in 55 of 60 Opus responses and 12 genuine no-code responses, lowering mean correctness from 0.92 to 0.67. GPT-5.5 produced neither behavior in its 59 non-truncated responses. These results are consistent with personas acting as Model-Dependent behavioral-policy biases rather than universal quality interventions. We release raw completions, derived scores, analysis artifacts, a pre-registration document, and an execution gate log; end-to-end test-based rescoring requires an unreleased task harness.

</details>


### [223] [How Reliable Are Multimodal Signals of Conversational State? Evidence from Remote Dyadic Collaborative Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17452)
*Tahiya Chowdhury*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出三维评估框架（预测准确性、跨任务泛化性、重测信度），分析多模态特征在对话状态预测中的表现。结果发现：语言特征预测准确但跨任务泛化差；声学特征在控制说话人身份后可靠性崩溃；交互特征提供了唯一真正可靠的信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究缺乏系统评估特征在跨任务上下文中的可靠性与泛化能力，需要一种多维评估方法来判断多模态特征对认知负荷和对话权力等对话状态的预测效果。

Method: 基于AVCAffe数据集（53组双人对话，9项任务），从交互、声学、语言三个特征族提取特征，在预测准确性、跨任务泛化性和重测信度三个维度上进行系统评估。

Result: (1) 语言特征预测准确但跨任务泛化差；(2) 声学特征在控制说话人身份后可靠性崩溃；(3) 交互特征提供唯一可靠信号，其中地板主导性可预测组内认知负荷不对称性；权力角色分类接近随机水平。

Conclusion: 说话人归一化和多维评估是上下文感知、鲁棒的多模态特征选择的必要条件。

Abstract: Measuring conversational states such as cognitive load and conversational power from multimodal behavior requires characteristic features that are not only predictive but also reliable across task contexts. We present a three-dimensional evaluation framework assessing predictive accuracy, cross-task generalizability, and test-retest reliability, applied to interactional, acoustic, and linguistic features extracted from dyadic conversations during collaborative tasks performed over a video-conferencing platform (AVCAffe dataset; 53 dyads, 9 tasks). Our results show that no single feature family dominates all three dimensions. Linguistic features show the highest predictive accuracy for cognitive load but collapse under cross-task evaluation, revealing sensitivity to task-specific vocabulary. Additionally, acoustic reliability, often reported as evidence of feature stability, degrades once speaker identity is controlled, confirming that standard prosodic features measure vocal characteristics rather than conversational state. Interaction features provide the only genuinely reliable signal, unchanged after speaker normalization. Interestingly, classifying power role remained near chance baseline across all conditions, indicating limitations of task-level aggregated behavior for predicting power role in conversation. Our findings reveal three insights: (1) linguistic features predict best but generalize poorly across task contexts; (2) acoustic reliability collapses to near-zero once speaker identity is controlled, challenging standard evaluation practice; and (3) interaction features provide the only genuinely reliable signal, with floor dominance predicting within-dyad cognitive load asymmetry. These results argue for speaker normalization and multi-dimensional evaluation as prerequisites for context-aware, robust multimodal feature selection in conversational systems.

</details>


### [224] [Multilingual Sentence Embeddings for Linguistic-Integrated Reliability Audit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17466)
*Ummugul Bezirhan,Ji Yoon Jung,Matthias von Davier*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究评估了多语言句子嵌入能否替代翻译后的英文输入进行Linguistic-Integrated Reliability Auditing（LiRA），发现原生语言嵌入能紧密复现基于翻译的信度估计，且可恢复翻译失败后被排除的答案，信度无显著变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言评估系统通常依赖翻译进行评分和质量控制，但翻译过程可能导致信息丢失或失败。研究旨在探索是否可以用多语言句子嵌入替代翻译后的英文输入，以简化流程并提高可靠性。

Method: 在11个PIRLS建构题和三个嵌入模型上，将原生语言嵌入与基于翻译的LiRA信度估计进行比较，评估嵌入能否复现翻译结果并处理翻译失败的案例。

Result: 原生语言嵌入紧密复现了基于翻译的信度估计，并能恢复因翻译失败而被排除的回答，且信度估计无显著变化。

Conclusion: 多语言句子嵌入可以可靠地替代翻译输入进行信度审计，减少对翻译过程的依赖，提升评估系统的鲁棒性和效率。

Abstract: Multilingual assessment systems commonly rely on translation for scoring and quality-control processes. We evaluate whether multilingual sentence embeddings can replace translated English input for Linguistic-Integrated Reliability Auditing (LiRA) across 11 PIRLS constructed-response items and three embedding models. Native-language embeddings reproduced translation-based reliability estimates closely while recovering responses excluded after translation failure, with no meaningful change in reliability.

</details>


### [225] [Token-Level Off-Policy Learning for Faithful Generation Under Distribution Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17524)
*Zitong Huang,Gustavo Lucas Carvalho,Deqing Fu,Robin Jia*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TOPL是一种将后训练重构为令牌级正确性预测任务的离线训练范式，通过区分响应中的好/坏令牌来引导生成，在摘要和翻译任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线训练方法直接让模型生成离线策略令牌存在缺陷，作者希望找到一种更自然的引导方式，通过训练模型区分好与坏的令牌来间接提升生成质量。

Method: 提出Token-Level Off-Policy Labeling (TOPL)，将后训练转化为令牌级正确性预测任务，训练模型区分响应中的好令牌和坏令牌，从而自然引导模型生成优质内容。

Result: 在11个摘要数据集上展现出强大的分布外泛化能力，超越了序列级和令牌级的多种基线方法；在机器翻译任务上也有效迁移；消融实验证实令牌级学习信号是关键。

Conclusion: TOPL是一种有效的离线训练范式，其令牌级学习信号对性能至关重要，且学到的LoRA适配器可解释为线性分类头与引导向量。

Abstract: We propose Token-Level Off-Policy Labeling (TOPL), an off-policy training paradigm that reframes post-training as a token-level correctness prediction task. Our key intuition is that by training the model to distinguish good and bad tokens in a response, we naturally guide the model towards generating good tokens, while avoiding the pitfalls that come with directly training the model to generate off-policy tokens. Experiments on document summarization tasks show that TOPL achieves strong out-of-distribution generalization across 11 datasets against a diverse set of sequence-level and token-level baselines. We further demonstrate that TOPL transfers effectively to machine translation, suggesting that its benefits generalize across different faithful generation tasks. Through ablation studies, we confirm that our token-level learning signal is critical to good performance; sequence-level analogues do not confer similar benefits. Finally, we show that TOPL induces interpretable model updates: the LoRA adapters learned through TOPL function as linear classification heads and steering vectors.

</details>


### [226] [Oracle Gap and Signal Fidelity: A Fixed-Pool Diagnostic for Test-Time Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17531)
*Jie Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一个框架，将测试时协作（如自一致性、最佳N选、验证器）重新定义为候选选择问题，并分解其净收益为可恢复质量、验证信号覆盖、条件选择质量和对正确输出的伤害四个可测量因子。实验表明，增益主要受限于oracle差距和信号保真度，不同任务和模型下效果差异显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 测试时协作（如自一致性、最佳N选、验证器等）被广泛认为能提升LLM推理能力，但其增益并不稳定，有时甚至为负。作者希望探究在何种条件下，这种无需训练的协作方法应当被预期有效，并提供一个可量化的分析框架来诊断其效果。

Method: 将测试时协作重新定义为候选选择问题，将验证器/选择器的净增益分解为四个可测量因子：可恢复质量（oracle gap）、验证信号覆盖、条件选择质量、对已正确输出的伤害。在LiveCodeBench、MATH Level-5、GPQA-Diamond等基准上，通过测量验证器判决与官方标签的候选级一致性（MCC）等指标进行实证分析。

Result: LiveCodeBench上，公共测试验证器（MCC 0.825）增益+8.14pp，生成测试验证器（MCC 0.248）增益+2.70pp但几乎无伤害；MATH上符号答案等价选择器超出自一致性+4.67pp，而LLM选择器为负；GPQA-Diamond上可恢复质量仅3.03%，87.54%候选池答案相同。增益首先受限于oracle差距，其次受限于信号保真度。

Conclusion: 测试时协作的增益并非通用，而是取决于任务、模型和采样配置的联合属性。提出实用的部署前诊断流程：先估计oracle差距，再测量覆盖、信号保真度和伤害，再决定是否投入协作。

Abstract: Test-time collaboration, including self-consistency, best-of-N selection, critic models, and verifier pipelines, is often credited with broadly improving LLM reasoning, yet its gains are uneven and sometimes negative. We ask when training-free collaboration should be expected to help. For a fixed candidate pool, we decompose a selector or verifier's net gain into measurable factors: recoverable mass, verification-signal coverage, conditional selection quality, and harm to already-correct outputs. This reframes collaboration as a candidate-selection problem rather than as an intrinsic property of a multi-agent topology. Across LiveCodeBench, MATH Level-5 hard subjects, and GPQA-Diamond, gains are bounded first by the oracle gap and then by signal fidelity, which we measure directly as candidate-level agreement between verifier verdicts and official labels. On LiveCodeBench, a public-test verifier (MCC 0.825) gains +8.14 percentage points (pp) over a first-sample baseline; a generated-test verifier (MCC 0.248) improves by +2.70pp and is not statistically distinguishable from an LLM selector, but operates at near-zero harm versus the selector's 4.69% harm rate. On MATH, a symbolic answer-equivalence selector beats self-consistency by +4.67pp, while LLM selectors are negative. On GPQA-Diamond, recoverable mass is only 3.03% and 87.54% of candidate pools are answer-identical; a weaker model's pools shrink both further, suggesting that oracle gap is a joint property of task, model, and sampling configuration. Our framework yields a practical pre-deployment diagnostic: estimate the oracle gap, then measure coverage, signal fidelity, and harm before investing in collaboration.

</details>


### [227] [Tokenizing Crosslingual Homographs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17689)
*Rotem Brillant,Yuval Pinter*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了多语言模型在共享子词词表时对跨语言同形异义词（假朋友）处理不当的问题，提出了一种在分词阶段引入语言标记的简单干预方法，实验表明该方法在分词统计和机器翻译任务上带来了一定改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言模型共享子词词表虽带来便利，但也导致不同语言中拼写相同但含义不同的词（跨语言同形异义词/假朋友）被统一对待，缺乏语言区分性。

Method: 提出在分词阶段加入语言线索：用语言特定的字符替换共享词表中单词的初始字符，在词汇构建时减少跨语言的同一性。在BPE、UnigramLM和SaGe分词器上进行了实验。

Result: 内在分析发现BPE和UnigramLM对同形异义词的处理是语言无关的，而SaGe分词器差异更明显；干预后消除了这一差距。在英语到X的机器翻译中，该方法尤其在BPE下带来适度改进，但效果并非在所有语言和评估集上一致。

Conclusion: 在分词器层面加入轻量级语言信息是一个有前景的方向，值得进一步探索。

Abstract: Multilingual language models rely on shared subword vocabularies to represent multiple languages within a limited number of token units. While such sharing is often useful, it can also create cases in which identical surface forms are treated too uniformly across languages, even when their meanings or usage differ. We investigate this limitation through cross-lingual homographs and false friends, and examine whether introducing language information earlier in the tokenization process can improve their treatment. We propose a simple tokenizer-level intervention based on language cues: language-specific characters replacing initial characters of shared-vocabulary words, reducing common identity during vocabulary construction. In intrinsic analysis, we find through tokenizer-level statistics that BPE and UnigramLM often treat cross-lingual homographs in a largely language agnostic way, whereas the context-sensitive SaGe tokenizer diverges more strongly; our intervention removes this gap. In downstream English-to-X machine translation, our cues yield modest improvements in several settings, especially under BPE, although the effect is not consistent across all languages and evaluation sets. Overall, the findings suggest that adding lightweight language information at the tokenizer level is a promising direction for further exploration.

</details>


### [228] [AEGIS: Awareness-Enhanced Guidance for Iterative Safeguard](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17713)
*Kyungwon Park,Sangmin Lee,Heejae Chon,Hyungu Kang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出AEGIS框架，研究跨度级引导在跨语言（英语、中文、韩语）文本去毒化中的条件性作用，发现其对毒性降低与意义保留的权衡影响依赖于生成器主干和语言上下文。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 澄清跨度级理据何时有助于文本去毒化的可控性，何时引入权衡，弥补对该问题理解上的空白。

Method: 提出AEGIS框架，结合跨度级检测器输出与冻结生成器主干，在重写过程中提供有害跨度、强度标签和目标属性作为结构化引导，在多语言场景下进行探索性分析。

Result: 跨度级去毒化具有条件有用性：明确理据会改变毒性降低与意义保留之间的权衡，但其效果高度依赖于生成器主干和语言上下文。

Conclusion: 跨度级控制信号在多语言去毒化中既有潜力也有局限性，不能一概而论地提升性能。

Abstract: Span-level rationales are often assumed to improve controllability in text detoxification, but it remains unclear when such guidance helps and when it introduces trade-offs. We present Awareness-Enhanced Guidance for Iterative Safeguard (AEGIS) as an exploratory framework for studying span-guided multilingual detoxification across English, Mandarin Chinese, and Korean. AEGIS combines span-level detector outputs with frozen generator backbones, allowing harmful spans, intensity labels, and target attributes to be provided as structured guidance during rewriting. Rather than claiming state-of-the-art detoxification performance, we analyze how span guidance affects the balance between toxicity reduction and meaning preservation across generator families, model scales, and languages. Our results suggest that span-guided detoxification is conditionally useful: explicit rationales change the trade-off between toxicity reduction and meaning preservation, but their effects depend strongly on the generator backbone and the linguistic context. These findings highlight both the promise and the limitations of span-level control signals for multilingual detoxification.

</details>


### [229] [C$^2$KV: Compressed and Composable KV Cache Reuse for Efficient LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17715)
*Chuheng Du,Junyi Chen,Hanlin Tang,Kan Liu,Tao Lan,Lin Qu,Chaoyue Niu,Shengzhong Liu,Guihai Chen,Fan Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: C²KV是一个统一框架，通过联合优化KV提取和推理时拼接，实现非前缀KV缓存复用。它学习可组合且位置无关的压缩KV流形，采用轻量级侧边提取器和可学习压缩令牌，在长上下文推理中实现高达17倍加速，同时保持生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长上下文推理中KV缓存复用方法主要关注计算节省，忽视了大缓存存储和访问的瓶颈问题；而简单地将KV压缩与非前缀KV复用结合会导致严重的精度下降。

Method: 提出C²KV框架：1) 学习可组合且位置无关的压缩KV流形；2) 引入轻量级侧边提取器，使用可学习压缩令牌和结构化注意力流；3) 采用压缩-拼接联合训练策略，对齐提取与下游复用行为。

Result: 在多个长上下文基准和模型家族上，C²KV显著降低了KV缓存存储和传输成本，在长上下文场景下实现高达17倍推理加速，同时保持了生成质量。

Conclusion: C²KV为长上下文LLM服务中的KV缓存复用问题提供了一种高效且有效的统一解决方案，在不修改冻结基座模型的前提下实现了灵活的模块化KV表示复用。

Abstract: Long-context inference is central to modern large language model (LLM) applications such as retrieval-augmented generation and multi-document reasoning. To mitigate the growing inference cost, recent work has explored key-value (KV) cache reuse to reduce redundant prefill computation. However, existing reuse methods primarily focus on computation savings and overlook a critical bottleneck in long-context LLM serving: the cost of storing and accessing large KV caches. While KV compression appears to be a natural complement, naively combining compression with non-prefix KV reuse often leads to severe accuracy degradation. In this work, we propose C$^2$KV, a unified framework for non-prefix KV reuse that jointly optimizes KV extraction and inference-time concatenation. C$^2$KV learns a composable and compressed KV cache manifold that is explicitly designed to be position-agnostic. Our approach introduces a lightweight sidecar Extractor with learnable compression tokens and a structured attention flow, enabling modular KV representations that can be flexibly reused and concatenated without modifying the frozen base model. We further employ a compression-concatenation co-training strategy to align extraction-time representations with their downstream reuse behavior. Extensive experiments across multiple long-context benchmarks and model families demonstrate that C$^2$KV significantly reduces KV cache storage and transfer costs, achieving up to 17$\times$ inference speedup under long contexts, while preserving generation quality.

</details>


### [230] [Large Language Models for Citation Function Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17738)
*Daniel Vodička,Jakub Šmíd,Pavel Král,Christophe Cerisara*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究系统评估了多种大语言模型在引文功能分类任务上的表现，在ACL-ARC数据集上以微调后的Falcon 7B模型达到73.3%宏F1分数，创下新SOTA，并引入了一个七类标注方案的新数据集AC3。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 引文功能分类对理解科学文献间关系和推动文献计量分析至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对多种大语言模型的系统性比较评估。

Method: 比较了Mistral 7B、Orca 2-7B、LLaMA 3.1-8B、Falcon 7B和SciBERT五种模型在零样本、少样本和微调三种设置下的表现；并构建了AC3数据集，包含七类标注方案和四种上下文提取变体。

Result: 微调后的Falcon 7B在ACL-ARC上取得73.3%宏F1分数，超越此前所有方法。

Conclusion: 这是首批专门针对引文功能分类进行多模型全面比较的研究之一，填补了近期调研中指出的研究空白，并为未来研究提供了模型性能、实验配置和局限性的详细分析。

Abstract: Citation function classification plays a crucial role in understanding the relationships between scientific publications and advancing bibliometric analysis. This study presents one of the first comprehensive evaluations of multiple state-of-the-art (SOTA) large language models (LLMs) for citation function classification, achieving new SOTA results on the ACL-ARC dataset. We systematically compare five models (Mistral 7B, Orca 2-7B, LLaMA 3.1-8B, Falcon 7B, and SciBERT) across zero-shot, few-shot, and fine-tuning approaches. Our fine-tuned Falcon 7B model achieves a 73.3% macro F1 score on ACL-ARC, representing a significant improvement over previous methods. Additionally, we introduce AC3, a novel dataset featuring a seven-category annotation scheme that distinguishes between neutral acknowledgments and explicit evaluative stances (more opinion-oriented citations - criticizing, complimenting, contradicting). The dataset is implemented across four context extraction variants to systematically evaluate the impact of contextual scope on classification performance. We also provide detailed analysis of model performance, experimental configurations, and limitations to guide future research in this domain. To our knowledge, this is one of the first studies dedicated to comprehensive model comparison for citation function classification, addressing a gap identified in recent surveys.

</details>


### [231] [When to Use Extra Context: Evidence-Grounded Terminology Adaptation for Simultaneous Speech Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17766)
*Zeyu Yang,Satoshi Nakamura*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出EGTA框架，通过构建文档术语记忆库并基于当前流状态选择紧凑候选术语，在无需全模型微调的情况下提升同传翻译中的术语恢复能力，在技术讲座翻译任务上显著提升BLEU、XCOMET-XL及命名实体/缩写召回率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有技术讲座同声传译中，注入整篇文档上下文过于粗糙，诊断实验发现上下文增益主要来自论文特定术语恢复而非统一语义增强，亟需一种更精确的术语感知机制。

Method: 构建文档术语记忆库，基于当前流状态选择紧凑候选术语；分别在ASR/语音侧和解码器侧适配决策空间；支持级联、端到端和仅生成三种同传设置，无需全模型微调。

Result: 在MCIF-dev上，EGTA-RG在En→Zh/En→De方向提升BLEU +1.05/+0.59，XCOMET-XL +0.019/+0.006，命名实体召回率相对提升79%/73%，缩写召回率提升0.099/0.171；在ACL60/60-dev上验证了术语召回率的一致性提升。

Conclusion: EGTA通过论文特定证据对齐而非通用上下文提示实现性能提升，消融实验和激活审计进一步证实了这一点。

Abstract: Extra context is valuable for simultaneous speech translation of technical talks, but injecting the entire document context into every streaming segment is often too coarse. Through diagnostic experiments, we find that context gains mainly come from paper-specific terminology recovery rather than uniform semantic enhancement. We therefore propose EGTA, an Evidence-Grounded Terminology Adaptation framework that builds a document terminology memory, selects compact candidate terms conditioned on the current streaming state, and adapts ASR/speech-side and decoder-side decision spaces using only the selected terms. EGTA can be instantiated in cascaded, end-to-end, and generation-only SimulST settings without full-model fine-tuning. We evaluate EGTA on an ACL technical-talk SimulST evaluation suite consisting of MCIF-dev and ACL60/60-dev. On MCIF-dev, EGTA-RG improves BLEU by +1.05/+0.59, XCOMET-XL by +0.019/+0.006, named-entity recall by +79\%/+73\% relative, and acronym recall by +0.099/+0.171 on En$\rightarrow$Zh and En$\rightarrow$De. Across MCIF-dev latency settings, EGTA consistently improves XCOMET-XL, named-entity recall, and acronym recall. External validation on ACL60/60-dev further shows consistent terminology-recall gains without additional fine-tuning. Shuffled-memory controls and activation audits provide evidence that the improvements are tied to paper-specific evidence alignment rather than generic context prompting.

</details>


### [232] [ESCUCHA: A Spanish Speech Benchmark for Heterogeneous Acoustic Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17812)
*Fernando López,Ana Ayala,Guillermo Segovia,Fernando Ibáñez,Ana Martínez,Pablo Gómez,Jordi Luque*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ESCUCHA是首个针对西班牙语语音理解的基准测试，包含1000个人工精编的、来自真实环境的音频问题，覆盖多种声学条件和推理能力，揭示了当前模型与人类表现之间的显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型音频语言模型（LALMs）发展迅速，但缺乏在真实声学条件下评估西班牙语语音理解的基准，该领域受到的关注很少。

Method: 构建包含1000个人工策划问题的基准测试ESCUCHA，音频来自真实环境（非现有数据集），时长从数秒到80分钟以上，涵盖9种感知类别和10种推理类别，包含多种西班牙口音和非规范语音，并支持多音频、口语问题及开放式评估。

Result: 对多种最先进的多模态和语音模型进行基准测试，发现它们与受过训练的人类之间存在显著的性能差距。

Conclusion: ESCUCHA作为首个西班牙语语音理解基准，揭示了现有模型在真实声学条件和复杂推理任务上的不足，为未来模型改进提供了重要参考。

Abstract: As large audio language models (LALMs) advance, robust evaluation frameworks have become essential. In this context, Spanish speech understanding under realistic acoustic conditions has received particularly little attention. We introduce ESCUCHA, the first Spanish speech understanding benchmark designed to evaluate LALMs across heterogeneous acoustic conditions and reasoning abilities. ESCUCHA comprises 1,000 human-curated questions paired with audio, totaling 162.9 hours sourced directly ``from the wild'' rather than drawn from existing datasets, with durations ranging from a few seconds to over 80 minutes. The benchmark emphasizes reasoning, spanning 9 perceptual and 10 reasoning categories, and it captures linguistic diversity through multiple Spanish accents and non-normative speech. ESCUCHA further includes multi-audio questions, spoken questions, and audio instructions, and it flags which questions support open-ended evaluation. Benchmarking several state-of-the-art multimodal and speech models reveals substantial performance gaps relative to trained humans.

</details>


### [233] [When a Name Is Not a Name: A Benchmark Dataset and Distilled Reasoning for Culturally Entangled Bangla Homographs in Low-Resource LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17828)
*Md. Asaduzzaman Shuvo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出“文化纠缠同形词”（CEH）消歧任务，构建了包含1516句孟加拉语专家标注语料库，发现模型存在“主导意义偏差”（倾向将人名误判为普通名词），通过对比思维链提示和文化解释蒸馏，将偏差从100%降至5%以下。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 孟加拉语中许多人名同时是文化负载的普通名词（如“Maya”既是女孩名也意为“深情怜悯”），现有语言模型因预训练数据中缺乏相关文化知识，难以正确区分这两种语义。

Method: 构建Culturally Entangled Homograph (CEH)消歧基准数据集（1516句，3032个标注实例），每个同形词出现两次并有专家标注的文化类别和推理解释。测试多种开源/闭源模型，采用对比思维链提示（contrastive chain-of-thought）和文化解释蒸馏技术。

Result: 所有模型存在系统性的主导意义偏差（偏向普通名词解释）；孟加拉语专用模型在所有提示策略下均失败；对比思维链提示无需训练即可显著降低偏差；知识蒸馏使小模型（1-3B）学会推理而非记忆，将偏差从100%降至5%以下，并使失败的孟加拉语模型成为最强系统。

Conclusion: 仅靠语言特定预训练不足以赋予模型文化基础，但通过对比思维链和文化解释蒸馏可以有效缓解文化纠缠同形词的消歧问题。

Abstract: Many Bangla words are at once personal names and culturally loaded common nouns, "Maya" is both a girl's name and a word for affectionate compassion. Choosing the right reading demands cultural knowledge that is scarce in the pretraining data of modern language models. We introduce Culturally Entangled Homograph (CEH) disambiguation and build a Bangla benchmark of 1,516 expert-verified sentences (3,032 labelled occurrences) in which one word appears twice with two distinct readings, each labelled with a culturally grounded category and an explanation of the reasoning behind it. Across open- and closed-source models, we find a systematic dominant-meaning bias: models default to the common-noun sense and overlook the name. A Bangla-specific model fails under every prompting regime we test, showing that language-specific pretraining alone does not confer cultural grounding. We further show that contrastive chain-of-thought prompting can sharply reduce this bias without training, and that distilling cultural explanations teaches small (1-3B) models to reason toward the correct reading rather than memorise labels, cutting dominant-meaning bias from as high as 100% to under 5% and turning the failed Bangla-specific model into our strongest system. Dataset and code are available at https://github.com/ashuvo25/BanglaCEH.

</details>


### [234] [Zero Hallucination, by Construction: Hallucination-Aware Layered Oversight for Trustworthy Enterprise AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17883)
*Bogdan Raduta,Horia Velicu,Alexandru Preda,Serban Chiricescu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出HALO架构，将大模型的幻觉问题从“需要消除的模型缺陷”重新定义为“可控制的系统故障”，通过六层防御机制实现对幻觉的可靠管控，而非追求零幻觉模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业因幻觉问题不敢部署AI代理，传统方法（等待无幻觉模型、加装法官模型、优化检索管道）均无法彻底解决，因为大模型本质上是会生成无依据文本的。

Method: 提出HALO（幻觉感知分层监督）架构，包含六层防御：基于检索和已批准内容的接地生成、约束确定性执行、多信号验证（LLM法官+基于源文本的证据检查）、校准弃权（不确定时不回答）、完全可追溯性、持续监督与闭环反馈。

Result: 在受监管的索赔抽取任务上展示了该架构的有效性，特别强调了基于证据的置信度评估方法，即通过对照源文档验证提取内容而非依赖模型自述的置信度。

Conclusion: 零幻觉不应被视为模型应具备的属性，而是系统应强制执行的特性；通过系统级架构设计，幻觉可以作为一种可控的故障模式被有效管理。

Abstract: Enterprises will not deploy AI agents they cannot trust, and the most-cited reason for distrust is hallucination: confident, fluent output that is simply not true. The common response is to wait for a model that does not hallucinate. We argue that this is the wrong target. Large language models are, by construction, capable of generating unsupported text, and no amount of scale removes the possibility; a faithfulness judge bolted onto a raw model catches some errors but still ships others, and even well-curated retrieval pipelines have been shown to fabricate citations. We reframe the goal: "zero hallucination" is not a property a model possesses but a property a system enforces. We present HALO (Hallucination-Aware Layered Oversight), an assurance architecture which treats hallucination as a containable failure mode rather than an eliminable one. HALO composes six layers of defense: grounded generation over retrieved, approved content; constrained, deterministic execution that bounds where the model can err; multi-signal verification that scores every output for groundedness and hallucination using both an LLM judge and evidence-based checks against the source text; calibrated abstention, so the system declines rather than guesses when grounding is insufficient; total traceability of every retrieval, tool call, and generation; and continuous oversight that detects drift, alerts on threshold breaches, and closes the loop by regenerating and statistically validating improved agents. We detail each layer, give particular attention to evidence-based confidence (which verifies extractions against the source document rather than trusting the model's self-reported certainty), and illustrate the architecture on a regulated claims-extraction workload

</details>


### [235] [DeLIVeR: Decomposed Learning for Information-grounded Veracity Recognition via Reinforced Knowledge Graph Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17935)
*Cong Hoan Nguyen,Thomas Hoang,Hieu Minh Duong,Long Nguyen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出DeLIVeR框架，通过强化学习的策略优化将证据检索转化为结构化知识图谱上的规划式探索，显著提升了LLM事实核查的准确性与可审计性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在自动化事实核查中因传统检索系统的“查询脆弱性”而面临挑战，现有方法难以处理多跳推理和复杂声明的精准证据获取。

Method: 采用Planner LLM将复杂声明分解为目标化问题集，遍历结构化知识图谱进行高精度证据检索；利用GRPO（组相对策略优化）优化规划策略，奖励机制兼顾结构多样性和声明准确性。

Result: 在LIAR、FEVER和PolitiFact数据集上，基于Qwen2.5-7B的DeLIVeR分别取得83.73、84.57和79.70的F1分数，相比HippoRAG2提升10-15%。

Conclusion: 强化问答规划策略能有效弥合多跳推理差距，提供可审计、透明的错误信息检测路径，为可信事实核查开辟新方向。

Abstract: Automated fact-checking remains a challenge for Large Language Models (LLMs) due to "query brittleness" in traditional retrieval systems. We propose DeLIVeR (Decomposed Learning for Information-grounded Veracity Recognition), a framework that treats evidence retrieval as a reinforced strategic exploration task. DeLIVeR utilizes a Planner LLM to decompose complex claims into targeted question sets, which are used to traverse structured Knowledge Graphs (KGs) for high-precision evidence. We optimize the Planner's policy using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a reward system prioritizing structural diversity and verdict accuracy. Our evaluation on LIAR, FEVER, and PolitiFact shows that DeLIVeR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Using Qwen2.5-7B, our framework achieved peak F1-scores of 83.73, 84.57, and 79.70 respectively, representing a 10-15% improvement over HippoRAG2. By shifting to a reinforced question-planning strategy, DeLIVeR effectively bridges multi-hop reasoning gaps and provides an auditable, transparent path for verifiable misinformation detection.

</details>


### [236] [What Transfers Under Source Shift? Definitions, Examples, and Fine-Tuning for Climate Disclosure Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17952)
*Guosheng Li,Fenghui Ren,Bin Liu,Chuan Yu,Kaiying Ji,Lin Yue,Jun Shen,Sasa Qian*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究将气候信息披露分类重新定义为跨源适应问题，系统评估了三种LLM适应策略（定义、示例、微调）在源域变化时的表现，发现源域内最优策略在跨源时优势减弱，而简单策略更稳健。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有气候信息披露分类评估大多在单一数据源内进行，忽略了不同披露来源（年报、新闻稿、财报电话会）在长度、目的和写作风格上的差异，导致对LLM在源域迁移下效果的认知不足。

Method: 将气候披露分类重新定义为跨源适应问题，在11种开源和闭源LLM上评估三种适应策略（定义、示例、微调），使用两个共享标签空间但来源不同的语料库进行实验。

Result: 所有策略在跨源场景下平均均有正向收益，但源域内最优策略（相似性检索、LoRA微调）在源域迁移下优势大幅下降；随机选取的少样本示例作为源域弱基线，反而更稳健；定义策略迁移一致性最高，但仅当其粒度与目标文本匹配时才成立。

Conclusion: 跨源场景下，简单策略往往比复杂策略更安全可靠，提示研究人员和从业者在实际应用中需关注数据源迁移带来的性能变化。

Abstract: Climate disclosure classification is a fundamental task for analysing corporate climate disclosures, yet such disclosures appear in many different sources -- annual reports, press releases, and earnings calls -- that differ in length, purpose, and writing style. Existing evaluations are mostly conducted within a single source, leaving open whether common LLM adaptation strategies remain effective under source shift. We reframe climate disclosure classification as a cross-source adaptation problem and study three widely used adaptation strategies -- definitions, examples, and fine-tuning -- across eleven open- and closed-source LLMs, using two corpora that share the same label space but come from different sources. We find that all strategies bring positive cross-source gains on average, but the strongest in-source strategies are not the strongest cross-source ones: similarity-based retrieval and LoRA fine-tuning gain most in-source but lose most of that advantage under source shift; randomly selected few-shot examples, a weaker in-source baseline, retain their advantage more reliably; definitions transfer most consistently, though only when their granularity matches the target text. Across these strategies, when the source changes, simpler is often safer.

</details>


### [237] [An Early Warning of Emerging Biosecurity Risks in Frontier LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18056)
*Zhida He,Xia Hu,Baichen Le,Chunxiao Li,Jiajia Li,Lijun Li,Chaochao Lu,Jing Shao,Youbang Sun,Hua Tang,Xiang Wang,Xiao Wang,Xiaoyu Wen,Tong Wu,Jia Xu,Peng Yu,Shu Yu,Jie Zhang,Qiaosheng Zhang,Yi Zhang,Xing-Ming Zhao,Tianhang Zheng,Ziyuan Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Intern-BioBreaker生物红队模型及计算-物理联合框架，系统评估前沿大语言模型在生物安全任务中的漏洞。研究发现：该模型能高效生成越狱提示，暴露多个开源和闭源模型的高攻击成功率（接近100%）；诱导GPT-5.5产生具有致病潜力的病毒序列，且翻译后蛋白可能增强受体结合亲和力；验证了模型生成的生物设计可通过湿实验物理实现。表明当前文本级安全措施与生物能力之间存在严重差距，亟需加强生物红队测试、核酸合成筛查和同步的安全机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前沿大语言模型在科学工作流中的应用日益广泛，但其日益增强的生物能力可能已超越现有安全防护措施。现有安全评估缺乏针对生物风险的系统性压力测试和湿实验验证，亟需评估模型是否可被诱导提供危险生物操作指导或生成有害序列。

Method: 开发Intern-BioBreaker专用生物红队模型，构建计算-物理联合框架：模型级压力测试生成越狱提示，评估对齐模型是否产生危险生物指导或有害序列；将选定序列进行DNA合成、宿主表达和正交蛋白验证，评估模型设计是否可物理实现。

Result: Intern-BioBreaker在攻击成功率上优于基线模型，在多个开源和闭源模型中接近100%任务级ASR；GPT-5.5可被诱导产生具有致病潜力的修饰病毒候选序列，蛋白产物可能增强受体结合亲和力；湿实验验证表明模型生成的生物设计可在受控条件下物理实现。

Conclusion: 当前文本级安全措施与模型生物能力之间存在显著差距，需要加强生物红队测试、核酸合成筛查和安全机制，使其与模型能力同步发展。

Abstract: Frontier large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into scientific workflows, yet their growing biological capabilities may outpace current safeguards. To assess the biological risks of frontier models, we develop Intern-BioBreaker, a specialized bio-red-teaming model, together with an integrated computational-to-physical framework that couples model-level stress testing with wet-lab validation. Within this framework, Intern-BioBreaker generates targeted jailbreak prompts to test whether aligned models can be induced to provide operational guidance for safety-sensitive biological tasks or produce sequence-level outputs with potentially harmful properties. Selected sequence outputs are then carried forward for DNA synthesis, host expression, and orthogonal protein verification to assess whether model-generated designs can yield the intended biological products. Our evaluation reveals a concerning gap between text-level safeguards and the risks posed by capable scientific models: (i) Intern-BioBreaker outperforms baseline attack models and reveals widespread bio-risk jailbreak vulnerabilities across both open-weight and proprietary frontier LLMs, with several targets reaching near-saturated or 100% task-level attack success rate (ASR); (ii) in sequence-level case studies, GPT-5.5 can be induced to generate modified viral candidate sequences with pathogenic potential; the corresponding translated proteins may exhibit even stronger receptor-binding affinity and thus enhanced infection potential; and (iii) end-to-end verification shows that selected model-generated biological designs are not merely textual artifacts, but can be physically realized under controlled experimental settings. These findings underscore the need for stronger biological red-teaming, nucleic acid synthesis screening, and safety mechanisms that keep pace with model capabilities.

</details>


### [238] [Pancasila-Dilemmas: Evaluating Large Language Models on Indonesian Human Value Dilemmas Grounded in Pancasila](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18066)
*Supryadi,Irfan,Julianti,Darren Keanly Martin,Jayvin Fernando,Yuqi Ren,Deyi Xiong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了基于印尼建国五项原则（潘查希拉）的1,834个 dilemmas 评估数据集，测试50个LLM后发现所有模型在捕捉印尼价值观上表现不佳，PMS低于0.5，MVAS低于0.72，尤其在宗教与团结维度上最弱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM价值观对齐评估大多聚焦西方或普世价值观，缺乏针对特定国家价值观体系的评估，因此需要构建基于印尼潘查希拉价值观的评估数据集。

Method: 从印尼新闻中构建1,834个含道德困境的问题，按潘查希拉五大价值观（宗教、人道、团结、民主、社会公正）分类，经母语者校对并由5位印尼公民标注答案，评估了50个开源和闭源LLM。

Result: 所有评估的LLM的PMS均低于0.5，MVAS低于0.72；在宗教和团结类困境中表现最差，说明现有LLM在捕捉印尼价值观方面存在显著差距。

Conclusion: 当前LLM在印尼潘查希拉价值观对齐上严重不足，需要更多面向特定国家文化价值观的评估与对齐工作。

Abstract: The value alignment of large language models (LLMs) is crucial for ensuring responses align with human intention and value preferences. However, most evaluations of value alignment focus on Western or universal values, while assessments grounded in the value systems of specific countries remain scarce. In this paper, we introduce Pancasila-Dilemmas, an evaluation dataset of 1,834 questions derived from Indonesian news, classified by 5 values of Pancasila: Religion, Humanity, Unity, Democracy, and Social Justice. This dataset reflects daily life in Indonesia, making it suitable for measuring the value alignment of LLMs deployed for Indonesia. To ensure a more rigorous evaluation, we choose scenarios containing dilemmas. The dataset is proofread by native speakers and answered by 5 diverse Indonesian citizens. We evaluate 50 closed- and open-source LLMs on our dataset. Results reveal that all evaluated LLMs achieves less than 0.5 Probability Match Score (PMS) and 0.72 Max-Vote Agreement Score (MVAS). Compared by each values, LLMs mostly struggle in Religion and Unity dilemma cases. This highlights a significant gap in capturing Indonesian values. The dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/tjunlp-lab/Pancasila-Dilemmas.

</details>


### [239] [Modeling turn-taking with distant viewing: investigating silence thresholds in human and AI-generated discourse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18076)
*Taylor Arnold,Nicolas Ballier,Artem Saloev*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究分析了30部美国情景喜剧和51个合成播客中的沉默间隙，比较了不同性别说话者和不同制作环境下的沉默模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究不同视听材料（真人剧集与AI合成播客）中沉默间隙的差异，以及性别因素对沉默模式的影响。

Method: 分析30部美国情景喜剧和51个Google NotebookLM生成的合成播客，利用Praat软件通过基频阈值估算说话者性别，比较沉默间隙。

Result: 对比了不同性别说话者和不同制作环境（真人剧集 vs. 合成播客）中的沉默间隙差异。

Conclusion: 沉默间隙在不同视听材料和性别间存在差异，说明沉默模式受制作环境和说话者性别影响。

Abstract: This study investigates silence gaps in two kinds of audiovisual material. We analysed thirty US situational comedies and fifty-one synthetic podcasts generated with Google NotebookLM. Gaps were compared across speaker gender, assigned from a fundamental-frequency threshold estimated in Praat, and across production settings.

</details>


### [240] [VDAR-Router: Adaptive LLMs Routing via Verbalized Query Difficulty Analysis Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18098)
*Yu-Chien Tang,Jun-Chen Hung,Wen-Chih Peng,An-Zi Yen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出VDAR-Router，一种基于难度感知和检索增强的大语言模型路由框架，通过显式分析查询难度并检索相似历史示例，实现更好的成本-性能权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM路由方法主要依赖输入查询的表面语义或嵌入相似性来估计模型适用性，忽略了查询的底层难度，导致路由决策次优。

Method: VDAR-Router首先对每个输入查询生成显式的难度分析，然后检索具有相似难度特征的历史示例，基于检索记录估计候选模型的适用性，最后利用同时考虑性能和成本的奖励函数选择最优模型。

Result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，VDAR-Router在成本-性能权衡上 consistently 优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: 显式的查询难度分析和检索有助于获取更相关的历史示例，从而支持更可靠的路由决策，验证了难度感知检索对于无需训练的LLM路由的有效性。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used in practical systems, making efficient model selection important for reducing deployment cost. LLM routing has emerged as a practical solution for allocating each input query to an appropriate model under a desired cost-performance trade-off. Existing routing methods often estimate model suitability from the surface semantics or embedding similarity of the input query. However, such methods may ignore the underlying difficulty of a query, leading to suboptimal routing decisions. To address the challenge, we propose VDAR-Router, a difficulty-aware retrieval-based routing framework. For each input query, VDAR-Router first generates an explicit difficulty analysis. It then retrieves historical examples with similar difficulty profiles. Based on the retrieved records, it estimates candidate model suitability and selects the model using a reward function that considers both performance and cost. Experiments on three datasets show that VDAR-Router consistently achieves better cost-performance trade-offs than existing baselines. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of difficulty-aware retrieval for training-free LLM routing. Case studies further show that explicit query analysis helps retrieve more relevant examples and supports more reliable routing decisions.

</details>


### [241] [How Does Alignment Tuning Shape Representations of Sycophancy and Related Cue-Induced Biases in LLMs?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18114)
*Prakhar Gupta,Terry Jingchen Zhang,Florent Draye,Bernhard Schölkopf,Zhijing Jin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现，大型语言模型对输入提示的微小变化（如随意提示、错误标注的少样本示例等）异常敏感。这种敏感性（包括谄媚和相关线索诱导偏差）主要源于对齐微调而非预训练。通过对齐模型，每种偏差都形成独立的、可解码和可干预的方向。这些偏差在表征上保持独立，交叉偏差纠缠是模型特有的。该干预还可作为适度去偏工具，恢复偏差导致的错误答案，同时保留正确答案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLMs为何对输入提示的细微变化（如随意提示、错误标注示例等）异常敏感，以及这种敏感性（谄媚和线索诱导偏差）在模型内部的定位。

Method: 跨越五个模型家族和七种BCT偏差类型，从隐藏状态中提取每种偏差的方向，并通过三种方法进行三角验证：探测法、留一数据集迁移法和因果干预法。

Result: 敏感性主要由对齐微调而非预训练导致；预训练基础模型几乎不受这些偏差影响。在对齐模型中，每种偏差形成单一连贯的可解码和可操作方向。偏差在表征上保持独立，交叉偏差纠缠是模型特有的。干预可作为适度去偏工具。

Conclusion: 线索诱导偏差不应被理解为LLM的单一缺陷，而应看作一组由对齐微调安装的、因果活跃的独立方向。

Abstract: Modern LLMs are alarmingly susceptible to surprisingly simple immaterial changes of input prompts: a casual hint, an incorrectly labeled few-shot example, or a fake prior assistant turn often flips an originally correct answer. We study where this susceptibility, spanning sycophancy and related cue-induced biases, lives inside the model. Across five model families and seven BCT bias types, we extract a per-bias direction from hidden states and triangulate it through three measures: probing, leave-one-dataset-out transfer, and causal intervention. The susceptibility is largely installed by alignment tuning rather than pretraining: pretrained base models barely cave to these biases, and their activations carry no cue-specific signal beyond question content. Within aligned models, each bias becomes a single coherent direction that we can both decode and steer along, recovering the unbiased answer across every family we test. The biases stay representationally distinct, however: cross-bias entanglement is model-specific rather than a property of the bias category, and even behaviorally similar biases occupy different directions. The same intervention also serves as a modest debiasing tool, recovering a meaningful share of bias-induced errors while preserving most correct answers across all instruct families. Cue-induced bias is therefore best understood not as a single flaw in LLMs but as a family of distinct, causally active directions that alignment tuning installs.

</details>


### [242] [VEHBench: A Stage-Local Diagnostic Benchmark for LLM-Assisted Vibration Energy Harvester Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18181)
*Depeng Su,Yuyu Luo,Guobiao Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了VEHBench，一个针对振动能量收集器设计的工程原生诊断基准，包含763个任务，用于评估LLM在耦合物理设计不同阶段的能力。实验发现没有单一模型能主导整个工作流，LLM能力存在显著的阶段依赖性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工程基准主要评估最终工件的有效性，缺乏对LLM在耦合物理设计不同阶段行为的深入理解。针对电池-free物联网中振动能量收集器设计的迭代需求，需要阶段感知的评估基准。

Method: 构建包含763个文献基础任务的VEHBench基准，使用分析物理评分器进行评分。评估四种设计角色：规范分类、验证器引导搜索、损坏状态恢复和策略条件选择。

Result: LLM能力具有显著的阶段依赖性，没有单一模型能持续主导整个工作流；响应控制曲线揭示了不同设计角色间的不同行为模式。

Conclusion: VEHBench为评估、选择、路由和改进验证器引导的工程LLM提供了阶段感知的基础。

Abstract: Battery-free Internet of Things (IoT) requires iterative design of vibration energy harvesters (VEHs) under coupled physical constraints, while LLMs are emerging as interface layers for engineering workflows. However, existing engineering benchmarks primarily assess final artifact validity, offering limited insights into how LLMs behave across different stages of coupled physical design. We introduce VEHBench, an engineering-native diagnostic benchmark for LLM-assisted VEH design, featuring 763 literature-grounded tasks scored by an analytical physical oracle. VEHBench evaluates four design roles: specification triage, verifier-guided search, corrupted-state recovery, and policy-conditioned selection. Experimental results reveal that LLM capability is strongly stage-dependent: no single model consistently dominates the entire workflow, and response-control profiles expose distinct behavioral patterns across design roles. VEHBench thus provides a stage-aware foundation for evaluating, selecting, routing, and improving verifier-grounded engineering LLMs. The benchmark artifact is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/AnonymousVehbench/vehbench

</details>


### [243] [PPL-Factory: Task-Aware and Budget-Aware Data Selection from Language Modeling to Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18199)
*Hang Zhang,Warren J. Gross*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出PPL-Factory，一种结合任务感知困惑度和数据预算感知选择的高效数据筛选框架，在仅用1%训练数据时即在GSM8K上超越现有方法，用10%数据即可超越全量微调性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据选择方法依赖间接启发式（如质量、多样性），难以泛化到不同下游任务；基于困惑度的方法虽简单但忽略了语言建模与推理任务学习目标的差异。

Method: 提出PPL-Factory框架，包含两个核心组件：（1）任务感知的困惑度评分，区分语言建模和推理任务的学习目标；（2）数据预算感知的选择标准，根据可用数据量动态调整选择策略。

Result: 在GSM8K上仅用1%训练数据即超越SOTA方法；用10%数据时，GSM8K准确率超全量微调0.9，MATH超4.8。

Conclusion: 任务感知和预算感知的困惑度选择为高效微调提供了一种有效且普适的方法。

Abstract: Not all training samples contribute equally to large language model fine-tuning. Selecting informative training samples can reduce the computational cost while preserving downstream performance. Many existing data selection methods rely on indirect heuristics, such as data quality, diversity or reasoning trace length. However, the effectiveness of these fixed criteria is task-dependent and difficult to generalize across diverse downstream tasks. Perplexity-based data selection provides a simple and model-aware solution to estimate the sample difficulty, but existing approaches typically score the entire training sequence and ignore the difference in learning objectives of language modeling and reasoning tasks. In this paper, we propose PPL-Factory, a simple and interpretable data selection framework that combines task-aware perplexity-based scores and data budget-aware selection criteria. Experiments on GSM8K demonstrate that PPL-Factory outperforms other state-of-the-art data selection methods using only $1\%$ of the training set. With $10\%$ of the data, PPL-Factory exceeds full-data fine-tuning accuracy by 0.9 on GSM8K and 4.8 on MATH. Overall, our results demonstrate that task-aware and budget-aware perplexity-based selection provides an effective and applicable approach for efficient fine-tuning.

</details>


### [244] [SWE-Pruner Pro: The Coder LLM Already Knows What to Prune](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18213)
*Yuhang Wang,Yuling Shi,Shaoqiu Zhang,Jialiang Liang,Shilin He,Siyu Ye,Yuting Chen,Kai Cai,Xiaodong Gu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SWE-Pruner Pro 提出基于智能体内部表征直接剪枝代码上下文的新方法，无需额外分类器，能在保持任务质量的同时节省最多39%的token，并在部分基准上提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长上下文剪枝方法（如SWE-Pruner）依赖单独训练的分类器来判断代码相关性，但有研究发现智能体自身在读取工具输出时已编码了上下文相关性信息。因此，作者希望利用智能体内部表征直接进行剪枝，避免额外的模型开销。

Method: 提出 SWE-Pruner Pro，在智能体内部直接对工具输出进行剪枝。具体做法是：使用一个小型头部（small head）将智能体的内部表征转化为每行代码的保留/剪枝标签，并引入长度感知嵌入（length-aware embedding）来编码每个工具输出对应的行数信息。

Result: 在两个开源基座模型和四个多轮基准测试上，SWE-Pruner Pro 节省了最多39%的输入和输出token，同时保持了任务质量，且推理开销有限。在 MiMo-V2-Flash 上，SWE-Bench Verified 解决率额外提升 +3.8%，长上下文 Oolong 准确率提升 +2.2 个百分点。

Conclusion: 利用智能体自身的内部表征进行上下文剪枝是可行且高效的，不仅能降低token消耗，甚至还能带来性能提升，为长上下文代码智能体的高效部署提供了新思路。

Abstract: Pruning long context for coding agents has been a vital technology for efficient context management. While existing context pruning methods such as SWE-Pruner realize this by attaching a separate code classifier, we find the agent itself encodes internal representations indicating the relevance of code context when reading tool output. Based on this finding, we propose SWE-Pruner Pro, which prunes tool outputs directly inside the agent. Concretely, a small head turns the agent's own internal representations into a keep-or-prune label for each line, with a length-aware embedding keyed to each tool output's line count. Across two open-weight backbones and four multi-turn benchmarks, SWE-Pruner Pro saves up to 39% of prompt and completion tokens while preserving task quality, with bounded inference overhead. Notably, on MiMo-V2-Flash SWE-Pruner Pro additionally raises the SWE-Bench Verified resolve rate by +3.8% and the long-context Oolong accuracy by +2.2 points.

</details>


### [245] [It's Not What You Say, It's How You Say It: Evaluating LLM Responses to Expressions of Belief](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18232)
*Kevin Du,Clara Kümpel,Michelle Wastl,Alex Warstadt*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套基于语言学维度的类型学框架，系统评估不同语言表达形式（如预设、语气、认知立场等）对LLM遵循上下文还是坚持先验知识的影响，并发现模型规模、训练阶段和具体语言表达类型会显著改变模型的行为模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户向LLM表达信念时，语言形式多样（如预设、语气词、确定性标记等），但这些不同的语言表达对模型是否应当接受上下文信念还是坚持自身知识的影响尚未被系统研究。

Method: 构建了基于四个语言学维度（形式、证据性、认知立场、语气）的17种细粒度信念表达类型，生成受控的信念-查询对，并评估了16种不同架构、规模和训练阶段的LLM。

Result: 大模型和指令微调模型比小模型和基座模型更少遵循上下文；特定的信念表达类型（如强确信标记）能显著改变模型的上下文跟随行为。

Conclusion: 语言框架对LLM的上下文整合有系统性影响，这对提示工程和模型鲁棒性具有重要启示。

Abstract: Users frequently express their beliefs to large language models (LLMs). In some situations, the LLM should accept these contextual beliefs as true. In others, they should stick to their prior knowledge. Notably, users' expressions of belief (EoBs) can take linguistically diverse forms - using presuppositions, evidential and certainty markers, or varied tones - each of which may have a different persuasiveness over the LLMs. We introduce a typology to systematically evaluate how different EoBs affect whether models follow context versus prior knowledge. The typology is grounded in four linguistically motivated dimensions: form, evidentiality, epistemic stance, and tone, spanning 17 fine-grained types. By pairing these EoBs with world knowledge facts, we generate controlled EoB-query pairs that isolate the effect of linguistic variation. Using this benchmark, we evaluate 16 LLMs that differ in architecture (Llama3, Qwen3, Gemma3), scale (1B-30B parameters), and training stages (base vs instruct). We identify meaningful variations in response behavior across these axes, e.g., that bigger models and instruction models tend to be less context-following than smaller models and base models. We further identify specific EoBs that statistically significantly persuade LMs more consistently than others. Our work reveals systematic patterns in how linguistic framing affects LLM context integration, with implications for prompt engineering and model robustness.

</details>


### [246] [Automated Discovery Has No Universally Superior Harness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18235)
*Akshat Gupta,Jermaine Lei,Alexander Lu,Gopala Anumanchipalli,Leshem Choshen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文系统拆解了OpenEvolve和TTT-Discover等自主发现系统的组件，通过超过310万次LLM rollout和30种预算匹配的搜索框架实验，发现没有固定框架能普遍优于其他方案，框架选择应视为超参数而非通用配方，并提出了基于早期表现的自适应预算分配方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主发现系统（如OpenEvolve、TTT-Discover）常被当作通用框架使用，但实际上它们是由多个设计选择（存档、父代选择、探索策略、预算分配）组合而成的复合系统。由于发现运行成本高昂且具有随机性，现有框架的比较往往因独立试验次数不足而难以区分真正的方法改进与随机波动。

Method: 系统拆解OpenEvolve风格进化搜索和TTT-Discover搜索框架的组成部分，在12个模型-问题对上系统评估30种预算匹配的搜索框架，使用超过310万次LLM rollout和重复试验统计分析。此外，基于早期发现进展可预测最终性能的特性，设计了预算匹配的自适应分配实验：启动多个框架，修剪表现不佳的部分运行，将计算资源重新分配给更强的幸存者。

Result: 1) 发现搜索框架存在泛化问题，没有固定框架能在所有评估的模型-问题对上可靠优越；2) OpenEvolve的变体通常表现不如更简单的替代方案；3) 早期发现进展可预测最终性能；4) 提出的自适应分配方法优于随机固定框架和非自适应框架集成。

Conclusion: 框架选择应被视为超参数而非通用配方，需针对具体问题和底层模型进行定制。研究结果支持从固定框架选择转向由早期表现引导的在线自适应方法。论文还发布了所有运行池（包括每个模型-问题对的基线零分布）作为可复用的统计基础设施。

Abstract: Autonomous discovery systems such as OpenEvolve and TTT-Discover are often used as general-purpose harnesses. However, in practice these are composite systems combining several design choices about archives, parent selection, exploration, and budget allocation into a single recipe. Because discovery runs are expensive and inherently stochastic, existing harnesses are often compared using too few independent trials to distinguish key methodological improvements from run-to-run variance. We systematically decompose OpenEvolve-style evolutionary search and the TTT-Discover search harness into its constituent components and systematically evaluate 30 budget-matched harnesses across 12 model-problem pairs using more than 3.1 million LLM rollouts and repeated-trial statistical analysis. Our results show that discovery harnesses have a generalization problem: No fixed harness is reliably superior across the evaluated model-problem pairs, and variants of OpenEvolve generally underperform simpler alternatives. Thus, harness choice is better viewed as a hyperparameter rather than as a universal recipe, and should be tailored to the specific problem and underlying model. We also find that early discovery progress predicts final performance, and use this property to present a budget-matched adaptive-allocation experiment that starts multiple harnesses, prunes weak partial runs, and reallocates compute to stronger survivors, outperforming both commitment to a randomly sampled fixed harness and a non-adaptive harness ensemble. Together, these results motivate shifting from fixed harness selection to online adaptation guided by early performance. We release all run pools including baseline null distributions for every model-problem pair as reusable statistical infrastructure against for future harness proposals.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [247] [AEVAL: From Anecdotal to Deterministic Testing for Agentic Skill Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16345)
*Tejas Singh Anand,Yuet Ying Christina Wang,Wanting Jiang,Steve Masson,Tian Zheng,Bingjie Zhou*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AEVAL是一个CI集成的确定性评估框架，通过执行器与评分器分离、首次尝试评分规则等机制，将agent技能的评估从主观演示转变为可重复、可审计的测试流水线，有效消除自修正偏差，并提供分层的修复建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前agent技能评估依赖主观演示，缺乏可重复性和版本间可比性，且难以扩展到技能库场景——一次回归可能静默破坏数十个下游工作流，亟需自动化的质量信号。

Method: 提出AEVAL框架，包含：(i) 变更触发的确定性评估协议，含技能级合约和运行级工件模式；(ii) 执行器与评分器的结构化分离，引入首次尝试评分规则和显式自修正追踪；(iii) 分层证据驱动的修复建议方案（LV1因果、LV2质量），以内联合并请求评论形式呈现。

Result: 在多个agent SDK的生产级栈上验证，AEVAL将虚假的100%通过率转化为可重现的首次尝试失败信号，并提供每次执行器修复的可审计记录。

Conclusion: 通过执行器/评分器分离和确定性测试合约，AEVAL有效消除了agent评估中的自修正偏差，为agentic技能提供了CI可集成的、可复现的质量评估方案。

Abstract: Modern agentic systems increasingly rely on skills: installable packages of natural language and code that teach an LLM agent to perform a domain task. As skill repositories grow, developers need automated quality signals on every change, yet evaluation today is largely anecdotal: a developer asks an agent to "try the skill," watches a demo, and forms a subjective impression. This yields neither reproducibility across runs nor comparability across versions, and scales poorly to marketplaces where one regression can silently break dozens of downstream workflows.
  We present AEVAL (Agentic Evaluation), a CI-integrated framework that replaces this practice with a deterministic, reproducible test pipeline for agentic skills. Every skill change triggers a test event: the skill runs against a developer-declared evaluation contract (eval.config) inside an automated executor, emitting a structured, evidence-grounded quality signal that downstream CI can route on.
  A key ingredient is a structural separation between executor and grader, preventing a subtle but pervasive failure mode: an agent that silently self-corrects during execution and then grades its own patched outputs as passing.
  Our contributions are: (i) a deterministic, change-triggered evaluation protocol with per-skill contracts and per-run artifact schemas; (ii) a formalization of self-correction bias as a distinct failure mode of naive agentic evaluators; (iii) an executor/grader separation with a first-attempt grading rule and explicit self-correction tracking; and (iv) a tiered, grounded-evidence fix-suggestion scheme (LV1 causal, LV2 quality) posted as inline merge-request comments. Validated on real skills in a production agentic stack across multiple agent SDKs, AEVAL converts spurious 100% pass rates into reproducible first-attempt fail signals with an auditable record of every executor fix.

</details>


### [248] [AoA: Theorem Proving Agent over Abstract Syntax Tree of Redesigned Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16372)
*Qiyuan Xu,Joshua Ong Jun Leang,Renxi Wang,Wenda Li,Haonan Li,Luke Ong,Conrad Watt*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出Agent over AST (AoA)，将LLM证明智能体从基于源码文本的操作提升到抽象语法树(AST)层面，通过JSON表示的Minilang AST和树编辑模型，显著降低了API成本（2.3-4.7倍）、token消耗（2.9-6.9倍）和工具调用次数（3.9-8.9倍），同时加快执行速度并解决更多难题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于LLM的证明智能体依赖序列化的具体语法（源码文本），导致每次编辑都会改变行号，需要反复定位错误和状态，造成巨大的token消耗和API成本。此外，这种对具体语法的依赖也阻碍了新型高效证明语言Minilang的采用。

Method: 将证明智能体从源码文本提升到抽象语法树(AST)层面：模型以JSON形式（原生支持LLM工具调用）提供Minilang的AST表示，并通过树编辑模型将证明操作与状态融合到一个证明树中，每个操作携带其子目标状态，可直接从树上读取。

Result: 在miniF2F和NTP4VC-Pearl公共成功集上，AoA相比Amazon的Isabelle Agent：API成本降低2.3-4.7倍，token使用减少2.9-6.9倍，工具调用减少3.9-8.9倍，速度提升1.4-2.0倍，并在更难的形式化验证基准上解决更多问题。

Conclusion: 通过将证明智能体从具体语法提升到AST层面，可以大幅降低LLM证明的成本和开销，同时兼容新型高效证明语言Minilang，并提升证明能力。

Abstract: Interactive theorem proving (ITP) underpins program verification and formalized mathematics, but its manual effort limits scalability. LLM-based proof agents promise to ease this effort, but their heavy token consumption and API cost remain a major obstacle. We trace this cost to a shared root: current agents operate on serialized concrete syntax, emitting proofs as source text and recovering proof states through separate, line-number-based queries, so every edit shifts later lines and forces repeated relocation of errors and states. This same dependence on concrete syntax also blocks adoption of Minilang, a recent proof language that reaches SOTA on LLM-based proving but is too new for LLMs' training corpora. We address both problems by lifting the agent off source text and onto the abstract syntax tree (AST): the model supplies proofs as JSON representations of Minilang's AST -- native to tool-calling LLMs -- and drives the prover through a tree-edit model that fuses proof operations and states into one proof tree, so each operation carries its own subgoal's state, readable directly off the tree. We realize this design in \emph{Agent over AST} (AoA). Against Amazon's Isabelle Agent on miniF2F and NTP4VC-Pearl common success sets, AoA cuts API cost by 2.3--4.7x (normalized input-cache accounting), uses 2.9--6.9x fewer tokens and 3.9--8.9x fewer tool calls, and finishes 1.4--2.0x faster -- while also solving far more problems on the harder verification benchmark.

</details>


### [249] [Fantastic Adaptive Taxonomies and How to Use Them](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16387)
*Mert Cemri,Andrei Cojocaru,Melissa Pan,Shu Liu,Shubham Agarwal,Alexander Krentsel,Jay Tang,Kannan Ramchandran,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Matei Zaharia,Alex Dimakis,Ion Stoica*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AdaMAST通过将智能体系统的执行轨迹转化为紧凑的、基于证据的失败分类体系（故障代码），取代原始轨迹作为反馈媒介，显著提升了智能体搜索、运行时监控和轨迹选择三个环节的性能，实现了反馈闭环。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原始执行轨迹作为反馈载体存在缺陷：冗长、实例特异、缺乏描述重复失败的稳定词汇，难以有效积累和复用失败反馈。

Method: AdaMAST将智能体轨迹转化为沿三个固定轴（系统级、角色级、领域级）组织的故障分类体系，每个故障代码的名称、定义和证据模式均从轨迹中自动归纳，无需人工编写或标注。

Result: 在智能体搜索中优于自由形式反思；SWE-agent在SWE-bench上从60%提升至70%，Claude Code从64.0%提升至70.7%；AdaMAST-Judge在Terminal-Bench上提升8-15个点；分类体系紧凑（10倍压缩）、与专家标注高度一致、跨领域自适应。

Conclusion: 自适应失败分类体系建立了智能体轨迹与改进流程之间的反馈闭环，是比原始轨迹更有效的反馈媒介。

Abstract: An agent system's execution traces record how it fails, and procedures that improve such a system without changing model weights (trajectory selection, prompt and workflow optimization, runtime monitoring) read these traces for feedback. Yet raw traces are a poor medium for accumulating that feedback: long, instance-specific, and lacking a stable vocabulary for recurring failures. We argue that an agent system should instead maintain an explicit representation of how it fails, induced from its own behavior and reusable wherever failure feedback is needed. AdaMAST builds this representation by converting a target system's traces into a compact, evidence-grounded failure taxonomy: named failure codes organized along three fixed axes (system-level, role-specific, and domain-specific), with every name, definition, and evidence pattern induced from the traces; no code is hand-authored, no trace human-annotated. The taxonomy is not merely a post-hoc diagnostic but a shared feedback interface, improving agents in three ways. In agent-system search, taxonomy-coded diagnoses of failed candidates outperform free-form reflection on all five benchmarks we test. At runtime, taxonomy feedback raises SWE-agent's resolution on SWE-bench Verified Mini from 60% with free-text reflection to 70%, and improves Claude Code from 64.0% to 70.7% as a runtime skill. In trajectory selection, AdaMAST-Judge, a verifier built on the induced codes, improves best-of-5 accuracy on Terminal-Bench 2.0 by 8-15 points over Pass@1. The vocabulary itself is compact (an order-of-magnitude compression that preserves trace distinctions), human-faithful (matching expert failure annotations more closely than a hand-crafted reference vocabulary), and adaptive (taxonomies induced for different domains share few codes). Adaptive failure taxonomies close the loop between the traces agents produce and the procedures that improve them.

</details>


### [250] [When to Use Which? Benchmarking Optimisers for Configurable Systems under Varying Budgets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16476)
*Chao Jiang,Yulong Ye,Tao Chen,Miqing Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了8种优化器在22个可配置系统上的表现，发现基于模型的优化器适合预算紧张场景，无模型优化器适合预算充裕场景，而FLASH优化器在多数系统上表现持续优异，原因是许多系统具有良好的局部最优解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件配置调优中不同系统测量时间差异大，且用户预算各异，但缺乏针对不同预算水平下最优优化器选择的系统性指导。

Method: 在22个可配置系统上，对8种成熟优化器在不同预算水平下进行系统评估，并分析FLASH优化器表现优异的原因。

Result: 基于模型的优化器（如SMAC）在预算紧张时表现好，无模型优化器（如GAs）在预算充裕时更优；FLASH优化器在多数系统下表现持续优异。

Conclusion: 许多系统拥有良好局部最优解（大吸引域），使得贪心型优化器（如FLASH）能实现强性能表现。

Abstract: Software configuration tuning is crucial for optimising system performance, and various optimisers have emerged over the last decade. Yet, the time required during the tuning process may vary across systems. In some systems (e.g., PostgreSQL), it may take a few minutes to measure a configuration, whereas in some others (e.g., MariaDB), it can take several hours. Moreover, even within the same system, users may have varying budgets and preferred settings. This naturally raises a question -- Given a budget level, which optimiser is the best choice for SE practitioners? This matters because optimisers usually have their own ``comfort zone'' and may perform very differently under distinct budgets.
  In this paper, we aim to answer this question. We systematically evaluate eight well-established optimisers across 22 configurable systems under varying budget levels. We find that, unsurprisingly, model-based optimisers (e.g., SMAC) are well-suited under tight budgets, and model-free optimisers (e.g., GAs) become superior with more generous budgets. However, interestingly, there is one optimiser, FLASH, that performs consistently well on most systems regardless of budgets. We lastly investigate the reasons behind this phenomenon and find that many systems possess good local optima (with large basins of attraction), allowing greedy optimisers (e.g., FLASH) to achieve strong performance.
  Source code, data, and supplementary materials of this work are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Config-W2W-98B2.

</details>


### [251] [Personalized Assessments from Personal Artifacts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16494)
*Yufan Zhang,Jaromir Savelka,Seth Copen Goldstein,Majd Sakr*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Personalized Probing Puzzles（$p^3$）的方法，用于评估学生对自身代码的理解程度，并在研究生级云计算课程中进行了初步验证。该方法可以自动生成、异步管理并在几分钟内完成，有助于识别学生对代码理解的潜在不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI编码助手的普及，软件工程学生和专业人员可能无法理解自己编写的代码，这对学术诚信和专业责任构成风险。因此，需要一种方法来评估学生对自身代码的真实理解程度。

Method: 开发了Personalized Probing Puzzles（$p^3$）方法，自动生成针对学生个人代码的探测性谜题，以异步方式管理，测试在几分钟内完成。

Result: 在研究生级云计算课程的初步研究中，$p^3$能够帮助识别学生对自身代码理解的潜在差距。

Conclusion: $p^3$方法具有自动化和高效的特点，未来需要进一步将谜题结果与代码理解能力进行关联，并将该方法嵌入到专业代码审查流程中。

Abstract: The rapid development and popularization of AI-enabled coding agents have meant software engineering students and professionals cannot be assumed to understand their own code, which risks academic integrity and professional accountability. We developed a method called Personalized Probing Puzzles ($p^3$) to evaluate students' understanding of their own code, and tested $p^3$ in a graduate-level cloud computing course. Our pilot study shows that $p^3$ can help identify potential gaps in students' understanding of their own code. The puzzles are automatically generated, asynchronously administered, and finished in minutes. Future work is needed to correlate puzzle results with code understanding and to embed $p^3$ in a professional code review process.

</details>


### [252] [ReqGenX: An Empirical Study of Atomic Decomposition, Artifact Regeneration, and Reconstruction for Legacy SRS Documents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16564)
*Ragib Shahariar Ayon,Rayed Fahmi,Sumon Biswas,Shibbir Ahmed*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出ReqGenX管道，将遗留SRS文档分解为可追溯的原子化前SRS工件，用于细粒度评估基于LLM的SRS生成。实验表明该方法在保真度、质量和信息保留方面表现良好，同时揭示了保真度、信息保留与工件完整性之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估基于LLM的自动SRS生成面临挑战，因为现有数据集缺乏源需求、中间启发工件与生成规格之间的细粒度可追溯性。

Method: 通过ReqGenX控制管道，将SRS章节分解为源可追溯的原子化陈述，通过多LLM集成投票将原子路由到标准启发的工件类型，并使用约束提示和迭代法官引导精炼生成工件。在7个PURE SRS文档上评估保真度、质量、信息保留和下游重建能力。

Result: 原子化陈述的中位AlignScore在0.96-0.99之间，Prometheus评分在4.34-4.85之间。生成工件与源原子的AlignScore在0.80-0.94之间，法官通过率接近100%；更严格的Prometheus评估通过率为54.8%-97.1%。下游SRS重建中，SBERT均值在0.69-0.75之间，AlignScore中位数在0.76-0.84之间。

Conclusion: 可追溯的合成前SRS工件能够支持对基于LLM的SRS生成进行更细粒度的评估，同时揭示了保真度、信息保留与工件完整性之间的权衡。

Abstract: Background: Evaluating automated Software Requirements Specification (SRS) generation is challenging because few datasets provide fine-grained traceability between source requirements, intermediate elicitation artifacts, and generated specifications. Aims: We aim to study whether legacy SRS documents can be transformed into traceable synthetic pre-SRS artifacts that support fine-grained evaluation of LLM-based SRS generation. Method: We conduct an empirical study using ReqGenX, a controlled pipeline that decomposes SRS sections into source-grounded atomic statements, routes atoms to standards-inspired artifact types through multi-LLM plurality voting, and generates artifacts using constrained prompts with iterative judge-guided refinement. We evaluate ReqGenX on seven PURE SRS documents using grounding, quality, information retention, and downstream reconstruction analyses. Results: ReqGenX produces faithful and usable atoms, with median AlignScore values typically between 0.96 and 0.99 and Prometheus scores ranging from 4.34 to 4.85. Generated artifacts remain strongly grounded in their source atoms, with AlignScore values typically between 0.80--0.94 and judge pass rates near 100%; stricter Prometheus evaluation yields pass rates from 54.8% to 97.1%. In a downstream SRS reconstruction case study, artifact-backed atoms remain recoverable from generated SRSs, with SBERT means between 0.69 and 0.75 and AlignScore medians between 0.76 and 0.84. Conclusions: Traceable synthetic pre-SRS artifacts can support more fine-grained evaluation of LLM-based SRS generation, while exposing tradeoffs among faithfulness, information retention, and artifact completeness.

</details>


### [253] [From Discussion to Execution: Replicating Buggy and Correct Data Science Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16569)
*Ragib Shahariar Ayon,Mohammad Wardat,Shibbir Ahmed*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出Reprodgen框架，利用大语言模型从Q&A论坛帖子中自动复现可执行的buggy和patched数据科学代码对，通过结构化表示和迭代优化实现可靠复现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从非结构化论坛帖子中复现可执行的数据科学代码非常困难，因为问题描述模糊、依赖缺失且存在性能瓶颈，现有信息不完整限制了自动化调试和验证。

Method: 提出Reprodgen框架，构建代码意图(CI)、功能需求(FR)和结构化思维链(SCoT)的结构化表示，通过基于LLM的审查器迭代优化代码直到可执行且语义一致。

Result: 在Stack Overflow和GitHub Issues上对pandas、numpy、scikit-learn等7个数据科学库进行评估，构建了由专家验证的可运行buggy和patched程序基准，通过实际执行验证可执行性。

Conclusion: Reprodgen能够可靠地复现可执行的错误与修复代码对，不同模型性能存在明显差异。

Abstract: Reproducing reliable data science code from informal sources is challenging due to ambiguous problem specifications, missing dependencies, and performance bottlenecks. Although developer Q&A forums provide rich discussions on diagnosing and fixing real-world issues, the information is often incomplete and unstructured, limiting its use for automated debugging and verification. In this paper, we introduce Reprodgen, a large language model (LLM) based framework for automatically replicating executable buggy and patched data science programs from Q&A forum posts. Given a question and its corresponding answer, Reprodgen reconstructs the buggy behavior described in the question and the intended fix described in the answer, producing executable buggy and patched code pairs that reflect the original discussion. The framework builds structured representations of code intent (CI), functional requirements (FR), and Structured Chain of Thought (SCoT), and iteratively refines code using an LLM-based reviewer until it is executable and semantically consistent. We evaluate Reprodgen on Stack Overflow (SO) and GitHub Issues (GI) across seven data science libraries, including pandas, numpy, and scikit-learn, and construct a benchmark of runnable buggy and patched programs validated by human experts. Our pipeline uses LLMs for semantic assessment, while executability is verified through actual execution. Results show reliable replication with clear differences in model performance.

</details>


### [254] [DataFlow-Harness: A Grounded Code-Agent Platform for Constructing Editable LLM Data Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16617)
*Runming He,Zhen Hao Wong,Hao Liang,Zimo Meng,Chengyu Shen,Xiaochen Ma,Wentao Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出DataFlow-Harness平台，通过引导LLM代理构建平台原生DAG（而非自由形式脚本），弥合了自然语言到数据管道的鸿沟，在12项数据工程基准测试中实现了93.3%的端到端通过率，同时相比基线方法降低了72.5%的成本和49.9%的延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM编码代理生成的脚本无法自动物化为持久、可编辑的平台工件，存在自然语言到管道（NL2Pipeline）的鸿沟。

Method: 提出DataFlow-Harness平台，包含DataFlow-Skills（程序化引导）、MCP层（暴露操作符注册表和管道状态）和DataFlow-WebUI（同步对话创作与可视化DAG编辑器），通过类型化增量变异而非自由脚本构建DAG。

Result: 在12任务数据工程基准上，端到端通过率93.3%；相比Vanilla Claude Code成本降低72.5%、延迟降低49.9%；相比Context-Aware基线通过率仅差0.9个百分点，成本低42.8%。

Conclusion: 实时平台接地（live platform grounding）可以产生持久、可编辑的工作流工件，其可靠性接近脚本生成基线，同时构建成本和延迟更低。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to automate data-processing workflows, yet coding agents typically produce scripts that are not automatically materialized as persistent, editable platform artifacts. We call this disconnect the \textit{NL2Pipeline gap}. To bridge it, we introduce \textsc{DataFlow-Harness}, a platform that guides an LLM agent to construct platform-native directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) through typed, incremental mutations rather than free-form scripts. The platform combines \textsc{DataFlow-Skills} for procedural guidance, a Model Context Protocol (MCP) layer that exposes the live operator registry and current pipeline state, and \textsc{DataFlow-WebUI}, which synchronizes conversational authoring with a visual DAG editor. On a 12-task data-engineering benchmark, \textsc{DataFlow-Harness} achieves a 93.3\% observed end-to-end pass rate. Relative to Vanilla Claude Code, it reduces measured monetary cost by 72.5\% and generation latency by 49.9\%; its observed pass rate is within 0.9 percentage points of the Context-Aware Claude Code baseline while its cost is 42.8\% lower. Per-task analysis indicates that Skills are most useful when construction depends on implicit procedural knowledge. These results show that live platform grounding can produce persistent, editable workflow artifacts with an observed reliability close to script-generation baselines and with lower measured construction cost and latency.

</details>


### [255] [CLOSER-Bench: Evaluating Budgeted Cross-Stage Design Closure for Hardware Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16632)
