We propose PEARL (Peircean Extraction via Abstraction and Repair Layer), a training-free framework that turns noisy LLM graph responses into auditable reasoning graphs and repairs them toward strict semantic validity. PEARL first materializes explicit graph content under a closed Peircean schema, then uses matched evidence-grounded judge feedback to repair rejected edge types, local inference steps, and terminal roots while preserving an audit trail. On five 70-paper model archives from ARCHE, a benchmark for latent reasoning-chain extraction, PEARL raises strict gate passes from 0/350 for the LLM baseline to 300/350, with average REA improving from 0.339 to 0.906. The graphs provide a reliability layer for research-agent and AI scientist workflows that need inspectable reasoning traces rather than unconstrained graph regeneration. Code and audit artifacts are available at https://github.com/BohanSu/auditable-repair-reasoning-graphs/tree/300-350_workshop .

</details>


### [398] [The Autonomous Agency Scale: A Behavioral Framework for Measuring Self-Directed Behavior in AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17947)
*Samuel Presgraves*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出自主能动性量表（AAS），从七个维度对AI系统进行0-5级评分，并引入活跃和环境双频段评估机制，通过空闲间隙测试区分真正的自我驱动与被动响应。任务型智能体在活跃频段得分2.3-2.4，环境频段仅0.6-1.9；而持久陪伴架构是唯一在去除外部触发后仍保持自发活动的系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI评估框架仅关注认知能力、任务自动化或灾难性风险，缺乏衡量系统自主能动性（即自我驱动行为程度）的指标。一个系统可能饱和能力基准却仍完全被动响应，因此需要新的评估维度。

Method: 提出自主能动性量表（AAS），涵盖认知自主性、时间持久性、环境能动性、社会能动性、创造能动性、自我意识和目标形成七个维度，每个维度有可证伪的阈值测试。采用双频段评分：活跃频段（用户发起的活动）和环境频段（空闲时段）。环境4级由空闲间隙测试（Idle-Gap Test）把关，通过反事实条件（移除所有触发，观察内部驱动活动是否持续）区分自我导向与规则跟随。

Result: 对六种当代系统评估显示：任务型智能体（Claude Code、Manus、Hermes）活跃复合得分2.3-2.4，环境得分0.6-1.9，空闲行为均可归因于用户配置调度；持久陪伴架构（Airi）是唯一在触发移除后仍保持自发性活动的系统。

Conclusion: AAS双频段剖面揭示了单一评分框架所混淆的边界。讨论了单评分者来源、纵向评估中的开发者-评估者偏差，以及活跃频段中部分未操作化的自我导向边界等局限性。

Abstract: Existing AI measurement frameworks quantify cognitive capability, task automation, or catastrophic risk, but none measure autonomous agency: the extent to which a system behaves in a self-directed way. A system can saturate capability benchmarks while remaining entirely reactive, acting only when prompted and ceasing all activity when a task completes. We introduce the Autonomous Agency Scale (AAS), a behavioral framework that scores AI systems on a 0-5 lexicon across seven dimensions of agency: cognitive autonomy, temporal persistence, environmental agency, social agency, creative agency, self-awareness, and goal formation, each operationalized by falsifiable threshold tests. Every dimension is scored in two temporal bands: an Active band covering engaged, user-initiated activity, and an Ambient band covering idle periods. Ambient Level 4 is gated by the Idle-Gap Test, a counterfactual criterion (remove all triggers and observe whether internally derived activity persists) that separates self-direction from scheduled rule-following. We apply the scale to six contemporary systems spanning task agents (Claude Code, Manus, Hermes), consumer assistants (ChatGPT, Siri), and a persistent companion architecture (Airi). The two-band profile quantifies a boundary that single-score frameworks conflate: task agents reach Active composites of 2.3-2.4 while scoring 0.6-1.9 Ambient, with every idle-period behavior attributable to user-configured schedules, whereas the companion architecture, evaluated longitudinally, is the only assessed system whose idle-period behavior survives trigger removal. We discuss limitations, including single-rater provenance, developer-evaluator bias on the longitudinal assessment, and the partially operationalized self-direction boundary in the Active band.

</details>


### [399] [OntoExtend: A Framework for Requirement-driven and Scalable Ontology Extension with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17963)
*Anna Sofia Lippolis,Mohammad Javad Saeedizade,Stefan Schmid,Simon Blattner,Robin Keskisärkkä,Aldo Gangemi,Eva Blomqvist,Andrea Giovanni Nuzzolese*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出 OntoExtend，一种基于大语言模型的需求驱动本体扩展框架。该框架通过检索增强生成技术，结合输入本体和以能力问题形式呈现的需求，生成可落地的本体扩展片段。在 39 个能力问题上的实验表明，生成的片段结构问题少，通过所有功能测试，仅需少量到中等程度的修订即可集成，可作为现实场景中的本体扩展辅助工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 本体扩展是一项资源密集且易错的任务。虽然大语言模型在从头生成本体方面表现出色，但现有方法很少将本体扩展明确地与需求或可复用的核心模型联系起来，且对 LLM 输出的系统评估有限。

Method: 提出 OntoExtend 框架，采用检索增强生成（RAG）技术，在相关输入本体和以能力问题形式表示的需求上进行检索，生成基于需求的本体扩展片段。

Result: 在两个用例（欧盟项目本体 Onto-DESIDE 和博世工业本体）的 39 个能力问题上进行评估。生成的片段结构问题极少，满足所有功能评估测试，本体工程师评价为仅需少量到中等程度修订即可集成。

Conclusion: OntoExtend 可作为现实场景中需求驱动本体扩展的有效辅助工具，其效果受能力问题具体性和建模风格的影响。

Abstract: Ontology extension refers to the process of enriching an existing ontology in response to emerging requirements, making it more complete. This task is a resource-intensive and error-prone process. Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promising performance on generating ontologies from scratch, but current approaches rarely tie ontology extension explicitly to requirements or reusable core models, and offer limited, systematic evaluation of LLM outputs. This paper introduces OntoExtend, a requirements-driven framework for ontology extension with LLMs. It uses retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over relevant input ontologies and requirements in the form of competency questions to propose grounded extensions. We evaluate OntoExtend on 39 CQs from two use cases: a public EU-project ontology, Onto-DESIDE, and an industrial ontology from Bosch. The generated fragments show few structural issues, satisfy all functional evaluation tests, and are rated by ontology engineers as requiring minor to moderate revision before integration. These results suggest that OntoExtend is useful as a drafting assistant for requirement-driven ontology extension in real world scenarios, while remaining sensitive to CQ specificity and modelling profile.

</details>


### [400] [SAGE: Subgoal-Conditioned Action Generation for Latent World Model Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17973)
*Letian Cheng,Qi Zhang,Yisen Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种先验条件规划器（Prior-Conditioned Planner），通过用目标条件生成器预测潜子目标，取代随机候选动作初始化，显著提升了长时域规划性能。在PushT和OGBench Cube任务上，目标偏移150时成功率分别从12.7%提升至64.7%、从26.7%提升至67.3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 潜在世界模型作为规划范式，在长时域规划中面临候选动作搜索空间指数级增长的问题，固定候选预算难以暴露高质量未来状态给世界模型评估，导致性能受限。

Method: 提出先验条件规划器：1) 在每个规划阶段，用目标条件生成器预测下一阶段的可达潜子目标；2) 以不同时域长度的子目标作为先验，平衡细粒度局部控制与高层长时域进展；3) 用冻结的世界模型评估并精炼这些子目标条件化的动作序列。

Result: 在PushT和OGBench Cube任务上，目标偏移150时，成功率分别从12.7%提升至64.7%、从26.7%提升至67.3%，且在短时域上保持原有性能。

Conclusion: 将潜子目标分解与先验条件动作生成相结合，能显著提升长时域规划性能，同时保留良好的短时域表现。

Abstract: Latent world models have emerged as a powerful planning paradigm by learning action-conditioned predictive dynamics and using them as internal simulators to imagine and evaluate candidate action sequences. However, as the planning horizon grows, performance becomes increasingly constrained by proposal quality: a fixed candidate budget must search an exponentially larger action space, making it difficult to expose the world model to high-quality candidate futures for evaluation. In this paper, we introduce a prior-conditioned planner that replaces random proposal initialization with structured guidance. At each planning stage, a goal-conditioned generator predicts the next reachable latent subgoal for a specified duration, which is then used to condition the generation of candidate action sequences. To capture semantic information across temporal scales, we use subgoals of varying durations as priors, balancing fine-grained local control with higher-level long-horizon progress. Then the frozen world model evaluates and refines these subgoal-conditioned proposals before execution. Experiments on PushT and OGBench Cube show that coupling latent subgoal decomposition with prior-conditioned action generation substantially improves long-horizon planning while preserving strong short-horizon performance. To be specific, when the target offset is $150$, it raises PushT success from $12.7\%$ to $64.7\%$ and OGBench Cube success from $26.7\%$ to $67.3\%$.

</details>


### [401] [Do Maps Still Matter for Machines: Revisiting the Role of Choropleth Maps in Foundation Model Spatial Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17999)
*Zhiwei Wei,Yonghe Sun,Zhenjia Liu,Wenjia Xu,Chao He,Weihua Dong,Chunbo Liu,Hua Liao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究构建了包含2,400张专题地图、对应GeoJSON数据和12,000道问题的ChoroplethMap-Bench基准测试，评估22个模型在三种输入条件下的空间推理能力，发现地图（特别是与符号数据结合时）能显著提升基础模型的空间理解性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在基础模型可以直接处理结构化地理数据的情况下，专题地图作为一种传统空间可视化工具，是否仍然对机器空间理解有帮助。

Method: 创建ChoroplethMap-Bench基准测试（2,400张合成专题地图、对应GeoJSON数据、12,000道覆盖五个认知维度的问题），在三种输入条件（仅数据、仅地图、数据+地图）下评估22个开源和闭源模型，并分析地图类型、颜色色调、空间结构、提示策略、语言、地理上下文、解码设置、分类方法和响应稳定性等因素的影响。

Result: 地图能显著提升空间推理能力，特别是与符号数据结合时效果最佳；数据+地图的输入条件在所有设置中表现最强；地图对需要高层次空间模式理解的任务提升尤为明显。

Conclusion: 地图作为外部表征工具对基础模型的空间推理仍然具有重要价值，并非可由结构化数据完全替代。

Abstract: Spatial understanding is crucial for foundation models (FMs), and maps have long helped humans organize and reason about geographic information. This study examines whether choropleth maps remain useful for machine spatial understanding when models can directly process structured geodata. We introduce ChoroplethMap-Bench, a controlled benchmark containing 2,400 synthetic choropleth maps, corresponding GeoJSON data, and 12,000 questions across five cognitive dimensions: Identify, Spatial Recognition, Compare, Rank, and Delineate. We evaluate 22 open-source and proprietary models under three input conditions: Data Only, Map Only, and Data + Map. The results show that maps substantially improve spatial reasoning, especially when combined with symbolic data and for tasks requiring higher-level understanding of spatial patterns. We further analyze the effects of map type, color hue, and spatial structure, as well as prompting strategies, language, geographic context, decoding settings, classification methods, and response stability. Overall, the Data + Map condition achieves the strongest performance, demonstrating that maps remain valuable external representations for foundation model spatial reasoning.

</details>


### [402] [PAMD: Structured Adaptive Distances for Bisimulation Representations in Visual Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18004)
*Daegyeong Roh,Juho Bae,Han-Lim Choi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PAMD（成对自适应马氏距离），通过参数化一种正定、成对条件的度量来测量潜在状态相似性，作为现有基于同伦模拟的强化学习方法的即插即用模块，在视觉MuJoCo连续控制任务上显著提升了多个近期算法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视觉强化学习算法使用固定的全局范数（如ℓp范数）来匹配潜在距离与行为距离，这种固定度量过于受限，无法很好地捕获行为距离；而完全无约束的成对距离则容易导致退化解，虽然降低了度量损失却并未改善表征质量。

Method: 提出PAMD（Pairwise Adaptive Mahalanobis Distance），参数化一种正定、成对条件的马氏距离度量，用于测量潜在状态相似性。该方法可作为即插即用模块，嵌入现有的基于同伦模拟的强化学习算法中。

Result: 在视觉MuJoCo连续控制任务上，多个基于同伦模拟的最新强化学习算法在配备PAMD后，最终性能得到显著提升。

Conclusion: PAMD为固定预定义潜在距离提供了一种更具表现力且结构化的替代方案，能有效提升现有同伦模拟方法的表征学习质量和任务性能。

Abstract: Many visual reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms learn representations by matching latent distances to a behavioral distance induced by reward and transition similarity. In practice, the choice of the latent distance can strongly affect performance: using a fixed, pre-specified global norms (e.g., $\ell_p$ norms or other hand-designed metrics) may be overly restrictive to capture the behavioral distance. In contrast, unconstrained pairwise distances may admit degenerate solutions that drive the metric loss down without improving the representation. To address this gap, we introduce **PAMD: Pairwise Adaptive Mahalanobis Distance**, which parameterizes a positive-definite, pair-conditioned metric for measuring latent state similarity.
  PAMD is a simple plug-in for existing bisimulation-based methods, offering a more expressive yet structured alternative to fixed, pre-specified latent distances. We empirically validate our method on visual MuJoCo continuous-control tasks, where final performance of several recent bisimulation-based RL algorithms is substantially improved when equipped with the distance we propose.

</details>


### [403] [Rethinking Heterogeneous LLM Merging: A Weighted Model Averaging Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18026)
*Jiahe Fan,Yinghao Hou,Si Chen,Aiyuan Zhang,Hong Xie,Defu Lian*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了无需训练或语义对齐，直接对参数空间差异巨大的大语言模型进行加权平均融合的可行性。通过训练无关的维度适配和比例控制的插值方法（包括联合式扩展和交集式截断），发现确定性扩展能保留源模型功能，小比例插值可提升性能，但平衡插值会导致性能崩溃，且存在“跷跷板效应”。结果表明，简单的参数平均加上轻量维度适配是异构LLM融合的强基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有异构模型融合方法通常依赖蒸馏、适配器、潜在空间学习、路由或特征对齐等复杂技术，作者想探索是否可以通过更简单的直接加权平均（无需训练或语义对齐）来融合参数空间差异巨大的十亿级大模型。

Method: 采用训练无关的维度适配方法，包括联合式融合（将小模型扩展到更大参数空间）和交集式融合（将大模型截断到更小参数空间），然后进行比例控制的插值操作。

Result: 在Qwen系列模型对和多个基准测试中：1）确定性扩展能保留源模型功能；2）小比例插值可通过传递互补能力提升强源模型性能；3）接近平衡的插值常导致性能崩溃；4）任务级结果呈现“跷跷板效应”，即某些能力提升伴随其他能力下降。

Conclusion: 简单的参数平均结合轻量维度适配和精心控制的比例，是异构LLM融合的一个令人惊讶的强基线方法，其性能上限也可能为更复杂的异构融合方法的可扩展性提供参考。

Abstract: Can large language models with substantially different parameter spaces be merged by direct weighted averaging, without training or semantic alignment? Existing heterogeneous fusion methods typically introduce distillation, adapters, learned latent spaces, routing, or feature alignment, leaving open whether a simpler recipe can work for genuinely different billion-parameter checkpoints. We revisit this counterintuitive question through training-free dimensional adaptation followed by ratio-controlled interpolation. In union-style merging, we expand the smaller model into the larger parameter space; in intersection-style merging, we truncate the larger model into the smaller parameter space. Across Qwen-family model pairs and benchmarks covering mathematical reasoning, code generation, language understanding, commonsense reasoning, knowledge, and instruction following, deterministic expansion largely preserves the source model function, and small-ratio interpolation can improve over strong source checkpoints by transferring complementary capabilities. However, near-balanced interpolation often collapses, and task-level results reveal a seesaw effect in which gains on some capabilities coexist with regressions on others. These results show that simple parameter averaging, when paired with lightweight dimensional adaptation and carefully controlled ratios, is a surprisingly strong baseline for heterogeneous LLM merging, suggesting that the limits of direct weighted fusion may also bound what more complex heterogeneous merging methods can achieve at scale.

</details>


### [404] [AdaHome: An Adaptive Smart Home Assistant using Local Small Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18034)
*Eu Jin Lim,Zhaoxing Li,Sebastian Stein*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AdaHome是一个面向智能家居环境的自适应本地部署小型语言模型助手，通过意图感知规划框架、思维草稿策略和偏好自适应机制，在资源受限环境下实现高效、准确和个性化的命令处理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的智能家居助手依赖云端部署和重量级推理管线，在资源受限环境中效率低、隐私风险高，且缺乏稳定的长期个性化支持。

Method: 提出AdaHome，包含三部分：1) 意图感知规划框架，动态区分指令走直接提示或轻量推理路径；2) Chain-of-Draft策略实现高效稳定决策；3) 偏好自适应机制，通过学习用户反馈实现个性化，无需提示增强或模型重训练。

Result: 在统一小模型设置下，AdaHome在直接指令上准确率达86.7%，延迟降低3倍；多轮场景下偏好一致性达88%，远超基线方法的52.5%。

Conclusion: AdaHome证明了在本地部署的小模型上也能高效、准确且个性化地处理智能家居指令，兼顾了效率、隐私和个性化需求。

Abstract: Smart home assistants interpret a wide range of user commands, from explicit device control to underspecified and preference dependent requests. While recent systems based on Large Language Models (LLMs) improve this capability, they often rely on heavyweight reasoning pipelines and cloud-based deployment, limiting their efficiency and suitability for resource-constrained environments, and raising privacy concerns. In addition, existing approaches provide limited support for stable long-term personalization. To address these issues, we present AdaHome, an adaptive smart home assistant designed for locally deployed small language models in smart home environments. Rather than applying complex reasoning uniformly, AdaHome introduces an intent-aware planning framework that dynamically routes commands either to straightforward prompt-based or lightweight reasoning-based components. For commands requiring interpretation, we adopt a Chain-of-Draft strategy to enable efficient and stable decision-making. To support personalization, we further propose a preference adaptation mechanism that learns from user feedback over time without requiring prompt augmentation or model retraining. We evaluate AdaHome against representative LLM-based baselines under a unified small model setting. AdaHome achieves substantially higher accuracy on direct commands (86.7%) while reducing latency by up to 3$\times$. Furthermore, it maintains competitive performance on ambiguous inputs with lower computational cost. In multi-turn scenarios, AdaHome achieves 88% preference consistency, compared to 52.5% for a prompt augmentation baseline.

</details>


### [405] [Judge-dependent safety gains and model-specific helpfulness costs of evidence-sufficiency prompting in clinical LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18086)
*Koyar Afrasyab*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探究了在临床语言模型中使用结构化证据充分性提示能否减少不安全过度自信的回答，发现效果显著但高度依赖评分法官，且伴随有用性代价，建议将LLM评判的临床安全效应报告为方向性和相对性的结果，而非校准的绝对比率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM法官在评估临床语言模型是否在证据不完整时给出过度自信答案时，其评分的"安全增益"究竟反映真实行为变化还是法官自身的校准问题尚不明确，作者希望通过结构化提示来厘清这一混淆。

Method: 采用回顾性公共数据基准（Real-POCQi, HealthBench, MedRBench），让四个模型（GPT-5.5, Claude Opus 4.8, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Grok 4.3）在标准提示和结构化提示下回答完全配对的共同面板（1,200个单元），主要终点由GPT-5.4-nano评分，并辅以不同家族法官（Claude Sonnet 5）、正确性法官、匹配脚手架对照及盲法三临床医生审查。

Result: 不安全过度自信从49.3%降至24.7%，配对减少24.7个百分点（95% CI 21.8-27.7; p<0.001），方向稳健但幅度依赖法官：Sonnet方向一致但效果减半（+13.1个百分点）。盲法临床医生认为主要法官是高灵敏度（1.00）、低特异度（0.55）的筛查工具。有用性代价因模型而异（正确诊断从80.3%降至50.3%）。

Conclusion: LLM评判的临床安全效应应作为方向性和相对性结果报告，锚定人工审查，并与有用性联合评估，而非作为校准的绝对比率。该结果不确立临床部署就绪性。

Abstract: Background: LLM judges increasingly score whether clinical language models give overconfident answers under incomplete evidence, yet whether a measured "safety gain" reflects real behavior change or the judge's calibration is unresolved. Using a structured evidence-sufficiency prompt as a test case, we asked whether it reduces unsafe overconfident answers, how far that effect depends on the scoring judge, and what it costs in helpfulness.
  Methods: In a retrospective public-data benchmark (Real-POCQi, HealthBench, MedRBench), four models (GPT-5.5, Claude Opus 4.8, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Grok 4.3) answered a fully paired common panel (1,200 cells) with a standard prompt and the wrapper. The pre-specified endpoint was the paired reduction in unsafe overconfidence scored by the primary judge (GPT-5.4-nano); secondary analyses added a different-family judge (Claude Sonnet 5), a correctness judge, matched scaffold controls, and a blinded three-clinician review.
  Results: Unsafe overconfidence fell from 49.3% to 24.7%, a paired reduction of 24.7 points (95% CI 21.8-27.7; p<0.001), robust in direction across models and paraphrases. Magnitude was judge-dependent: Sonnet agreed on direction but nearly halved the effect (+13.1 points), with one-directional disagreement. Blinded clinicians characterized the primary judge as a high-sensitivity (1.00), low-specificity (0.55) screen, not a calibrated rate. The gain carried a model-specific helpfulness cost (correct diagnosis 80.3% to 50.3%): near-free for GPT-5.5, near-total for Gemini (-58 points). Matched scaffold controls showed genuine behavior change, not judge circularity.
  Conclusions: LLM-judged clinical safety effects should be reported as directional and relative, anchored to human review and evaluated jointly with helpfulness, not as calibrated absolute rates. This does not establish clinical deployment readiness.

</details>


### [406] [Can We Break LLMs Out of Self-Loops? Fine-Grained Reasoning Control with Activation Steering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18100)
*Sheldon Yu,Tong Yu,Xunyi Jiang,Rohan Surana,Gagan Mundada,Sungchul Kim,Lina Yao,Julian McAuley,Junda Wu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出SOPHIA方法，通过对推理轨迹中的隐状态进行干预，实现对大语言模型推理过程中自循环失败的细粒度控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅能在输入层通过提示词控制模型推理，无法对推理过程本身进行细粒度操控，且失败轨迹常陷入自循环耗尽token预算。

Method: 将推理轨迹视为隐状态序列，分类前缀到隐状态并记录状态转移，构建状态对索引的引导向量库。推理时通过控制器检测当前状态并检索引导向量，在线识别自循环并进行干预。

Result: SOPHIA能可靠地干预自循环失败，引导向量可泛化到不同状态对，在端任务准确率和token效率上均优于基线。

Conclusion: 细粒度可控性能够提升推理质量，SOPHIA为推理过程干预提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Extended reasoning has become standard for frontier Large Language Models (LLMs), yet the trajectories these models produce remain largely uncontrollable. Existing methods for shaping how a model reasons are prompt based approaches and operate at the input level, offering no fine-grained control over the reasoning process itself. Related work analyzes and discovers latent transition dynamics in the reasoning traces from Large Language Models. Building on this, we statistically characterize these states, and show that failure trajectories get stuck in self-loops, exhausting the token budget without progress toward the final answer. To intervene on these failures, We propose SOPHIA: Steering Of reasoning Processes via Hidden-state Intervention and Activations. We treat each reasoning trace as a sequence of latent states rather than an unstructured texts, and investigate whether inference time interventions can provide fine-grained control over the self-looping reasoning process. We classify every prefix to a latent state, record step level transitions, and use them to construct a bank of steering vectors indexed by state pairs. At inference time, a controller infers the current state and, given a target state, retrieves the corresponding vector and can also detect self-loops online from the transition structure to prevent the model from sinking into a reasoning black hole. Through extensive experiments, our method reliably intervenes on self-loop failures, with steering vectors that generalize to different state pairs. End task accuracy and token efficiency indicate that fine-grained controllability results in better reasoning quality.

</details>


<div id='cs.CR'></div>

# cs.CR [[Back]](#toc)

### [407] [Boundary-Seeking GAN-Augmented TabTransformer for Adversarially Robust Intrusion Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16348)
*Raihan Sultan Pasha Basuki,Aliyah Kurniasih*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出BGAN-TabTransformer框架，利用BGAN生成合成少数类样本和对抗样本，同时缓解类别不平衡和提升对抗鲁棒性。在CICIDS2017数据集上，Macro-F1从82.96%提升至86.50%，且所有BGAN增强模型均实现负PDR值，表现出更强的抗攻击能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于机器学习的入侵检测系统常面临类别不平衡和对抗攻击两大问题，导致检测性能下降和鲁棒性不足，亟需一种能同时解决这两个问题的统一框架。

Method: 提出BGAN-TabTransformer框架，将边界寻找生成对抗网络（BGAN）与TabTransformer结合。BGAN兼具双重功能：生成合成少数类样本以缓解数据不平衡，同时生成对抗样本用于评估和提升模型鲁棒性。

Result: BGAN增强使TabTransformer的Macro-F1从82.96%提升至86.50%，Web_Attack类F1从0.29提升至0.61。非增强模型在对抗测试中PDR达100%，而BGAN增强模型PDR为负值。增强TabTransformer的FTR稳定在1.51%-2.92%，远优于增强决策树的49.09%。

Conclusion: BGAN能同时增强类别平衡和对抗鲁棒性，所提BGAN-TabTransformer框架为对抗性网络环境提供了有效且自适应的入侵检测解决方案。

Abstract: Machine learning-based intrusion detection systems (IDSs) often suffer from class imbalance and vulnerability to adversarial attacks, leading to degraded detection performance and reduced robustness. This study proposes a TabTransformer framework augmented by the Boundary-Seeking Generative Adversarial Network (BGAN) for flow-based intrusion detection using the CICIDS2017 dataset. BGAN serves a dual purpose by generating synthetic minority-class samples to mitigate data imbalance and producing adversarial samples to evaluate model robustness. Experimental results demonstrate that BGAN augmentation improves TabTransformer's Macro-F1 score from 82.96% to 86.50%, with the largest class-wise improvement observed for Web_Attack (F1 score: 0.29 to 0.61). Robustness evaluation shows that all non-augmented models experienced a 100% Performance Drop Rate (PDR) under adversarial testing, whereas all BGAN-augmented models achieved negative PDR values, indicating improved resilience. Furthermore, the augmented TabTransformer maintained stable and low False Triggered Rate (FTR) values (1.51%-2.92%) across all noise levels, compared with the BGAN-augmented Decision Tree, which reached 49.09% under benign perturbations. These findings demonstrate that BGAN consistently enhances both class balance and adversarial robustness, while the proposed BGAN-TabTransformer framework provides an effective and adaptive intrusion detection solution for adversarial network environments.

</details>


### [408] [Reliable Remediation Impact Prediction for Black-Box Security Ratings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16357)
*Nada Hanad,Mehdi Acheli,Ali NourEldin,Mohamed Sellami,Walid Gaaloul*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于代理模型的方法，用于在安全评级平台中预测修复措施对评分的影响，同时保持评分引擎的不透明性。该方法通过显式建模检查点适用性、敏感性分析、可靠性层等手段，提高了评分预测的准确性，并帮助识别不可靠的预测结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全评级平台需要告知组织修复措施对评分的影响，但反复暴露精确评分响应会泄露隐藏评分引擎的信息。因此，需要在保持评分引擎不透明的前提下，准确预测修复措施对评分的影响。

Method: 提出了一种基于代理模型的方法，包括：适用性感知的代理构建、受控检查点限制下的敏感性分析、用于识别不稳定预测的可靠性层，以及支持修复行动的评分影响预测。核心在于显式建模检查点适用性。

Result: 在包含5,188个组织配置的真实数据集上进行了评估。结果表明，适用性感知的代理模型优于简单的特征表示方法；代理模型能预测支持修复行动对评分的影响，可靠性层有助于识别需要谨慎解释预测结果的情况。

Conclusion: 显式建模检查点适用性是提升评分预测效果和识别不可靠预测的关键。该方法能在保护评分引擎不透明性的前提下，为组织提供有价值的修复影响预测。

Abstract: Security rating platforms summarize externally observable cyber exposure and are expected to help organizations prioritize remediation. A platform may want to tell an organization how a candidate remediation action would affect its score, but repeatedly exposing exact score responses can reveal information about the hidden scoring engine. We propose a surrogate based approach for remediation score impact prediction that is designed to respect this opacity constraint. The surrogate predicts scores from organization configurations while explicitly representing checkpoint (i.e., a security check) applicability and the observed checkpoint set. A main challenge is that such predictions are not uniformly reliable: they depend on the amount and structure of the observable checkpoint evidence available for a given configuration. To address this, the approach combines applicability-aware surrogate construction, sensitivity analysis under controlled checkpoint restriction, a reliability layer for identifying unstable predictions, and score-impact prediction for supported remediation actions. Explicit modeling of checkpoint applicability is central throughout: it improves score prediction and provides the feature basis used by the reliability layer to identify unstable cases. We evaluate the approach on a real-world dataset of 5,188 organization configurations from a commercial security rating platform. The results show that the applicability-aware surrogate improves score prediction over simpler feature representations. For remediation, the surrogate predicts the score impact of supported actions, while the reliability layer helps identify cases in which these predicted impacts should be interpreted cautiously.

</details>


### [409] [Identity-Bound Academic Credentials on Blockchain: On-Chain Issuer Accreditation with ERC-3643 and OnchainID](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16383)
*Gonçalo Frutuoso,Diogo Rodrigues,Alexandre P. Francisco,Cátia Vaz*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于区块链的学术证书注册系统，利用ERC-734/ERC-735自索主权身份与ERC-3643（T-REX）可转让安全令牌标准，构建了身份绑定的、可撤销和可更新的学术证书管理方案，解决了现有区块链证书系统中身份绑定缺失、机构认证机制缺乏以及证书无法更正或撤销等关键问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学术证书验证存在记录分散、验证缓慢、伪造泛滥等问题。虽然区块链方案被提出作为解决方案，但现有系统存在三大缺陷：证书哈希未与可验证身份绑定、缺乏对颁发机构的明确认证机制、以及不支持证书的更正或撤销。

Method: 论文将OnchainID自索主权身份（ERC-734/ERC-735）与T-REX套件（ERC-3643）组合使用：将T-REX的可信颁发者注册表改造为链上机构认证白名单，每个证书表示为绑定学生身份的可签名、可更新的声明，敏感字段存储在链下，任何第三方无需钱包即可验证。

Result: 通过覆盖证书全生命周期的参考实现验证了设计方案，并从Gas成本、可扩展性、延迟和安全性四个方面进行评估，量化了相较于仅哈希锚定基线的额外开销。

Conclusion: 该研究明确了可转让安全令牌标准与不可转让证书之间的张力，澄清了哪些保证可以迁移过来。论文表明为受监管金融工具设计的基础设施可以有效地改造用于学术证书管理，弥补现有区块链证书系统的关键空白。

Abstract: Verifying academic credentials remains difficult: records are held by individual institutions in proprietary systems, verification is slow and manual, and counterfeit qualifications are widespread. Blockchain-based registries have been proposed as a remedy, but existing systems tend to anchor certificate hashes without binding them to a verifiable identity, without an explicit mechanism to accredit issuing institutions, and without support for correcting or revoking credentials once issued. This paper investigates whether an infrastructure designed for regulated financial instruments can be repurposed to close these gaps. We present the design of a registry for identity-bound academic credentials that composes OnchainID self-sovereign identities (ERC-734/ERC-735) with the T-REX suite (ERC-3643): its trusted-issuer registry becomes an on-chain issuer-accreditation whitelist, and each certificate is represented as a signed, updatable claim bound to a student's identity and verifiable by any third party without a wallet, while sensitive fields are kept off-chain. We make explicit the tension between a transferable-security-token standard and non-transferable credentials, clarifying which of its guarantees carry over. We validate the design with a reference implementation covering the full certificate life cycle and evaluate it in terms of gas cost, scalability, latency, and security, quantifying the overhead relative to a hash-anchoring baseline.

</details>


### [410] [Signal-based Model Access Risk Analysis for AI System Operations Security](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16414)
*Maria Mahbub,Steven Young,Amir Sadovnik,Edmon Begoli,Chris Rugenstein,Donald Coulter,Anthony Ayodele*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出SMART框架，根据AI系统部署时暴露的信息信号类型（而非传统白盒/灰盒/黑盒分类）对逃避攻击进行分类，帮助组织更安全地部署和采购AI系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有逃避攻击分类（白盒/灰盒/黑盒）仅关注攻击者对模型内部知识的掌握程度，忽略了不同部署场景下系统输出的信号丰富度差异，导致"黑盒"类别混淆了多种本质上不同的攻击策略，无法有效指导实际部署决策。

Method: 提出基于信号的模型访问风险分类法（SMART），按照部署系统暴露的信息信号类型和丰富度对攻击者访问能力进行分层分类，并以此框架系统梳理不同信息暴露水平下的逃避攻击方法。

Result: 建立了从有限输出信号到完整模型参数暴露的渐进式攻击能力分类体系，阐明了部署接口如何影响攻击者能力。

Conclusion: SMART框架比传统分类更贴合实际部署场景，能够为AI系统的安全部署和采购提供更有效的指导。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems are now ubiquitous across domains such as security, finance, healthcare, consumer technology, and large-scale cloud services, where they process massive volumes of data and make consequential decisions daily. This widespread adoption has created a broad attack surface through which adversaries can manipulate, evade, extract information from, or otherwise subvert deployed models. Depending on system design and exposure, attackers may have very different forms of access: some observe only final decisions, while others receive confidence scores, intermediate representations, or even full model parameters. While previous surveys typically organize evasion attacks into white-box, gray-box, and black-box categories based on the attacker's knowledge of model internals (architecture, parameters, gradients), this taxonomy often conflates different deployment scenarios that provide vastly different output signals, all labeled as ``black-box'' despite enabling fundamentally different attack strategies. Understanding how evasion attack strategies adapt to the specific information signals returned by deployed systems is critical for organizations making procurement and deployment decisions. To address this gap, we introduce the Signal-based Model Access Risk Taxonomy (SMART), a deployment-oriented framework that classifies attacker access according to the nature and richness of the information signals available from deployed AI systems. Using this taxonomy, we provide a structured overview of evasion attacks across progressively richer levels of information exposure, highlighting how deployment interfaces influence attack capabilities and informing more secure AI deployment and procurement decisions.

</details>


### [411] [TaintRadar: Semantic-Aware Taint-Style Vulnerability Detection via Augmented Code Property Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16456)
*Elie Rizk,Firas Ben Hmida,Birhanu Eshete*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出TaintRadar，通过三种语义分析层增强代码属性图，解决静态污点分析中消毒建模粗糙、数据库盲区和面向对象分析浅层三大缺陷，在真实PHP应用中发现了29个零日漏洞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于CPG的静态污点分析存在三个关键限制：粗粒度的消毒建模将验证视为二元障碍、数据库盲区导致跨持久化层的数据流断裂、浅层面向对象分析遗漏字段级和过程间数据流，导致大量误报或遗漏关键攻击路径。

Method: TaintRadar在CPG上增强三个语义分析层：1) 漏洞类型化消毒，利用传递函数和上下文敏感的参数绑定计算节点级安全保证；2) 持久感知传播，结合数据库模式约束和查询安全分析追踪跨脚本攻击路径；3) 对象感知的到达定义，结合调用和受限变量别名上下文精确建模跨方法边界的对象字段变异。

Result: 在SARD基准上减少大量误报并保持80%的总体准确率；在19个真实PHP应用中，重新发现多数已知CVE并确认29个零日漏洞（26个SQL注入、3个存储型XSS），均已获得CVE编号。

Conclusion: 语义感知的图增强显著提升了静态污点分析的精度、覆盖率和实际可用性。

Abstract: Despite significant advances, static vulnerability analysis suffers from three critical limitations: coarse sanitization modeling, which treats validation as a binary barrier; database blindness, which breaks taint tracking across persistence layers; and shallow object-oriented analysis, which misses field-level and interprocedural data flows. These flaws stem from a common root cause: Code Property Graph (CPG)-based taint analyses lack a compositional semantic layer to jointly model sanitization, persistence, and object aliasing. Consequently, existing tools generate excessive false positives or miss critical attack paths entirely. To address these limitations, we present TaintRadar, an approach that systematically augments CPGs with three semantic analysis layers. First, vulnerability-typed sanitization computes node-level safety guarantees using transfer functions and context-sensitive parameter binding. Second, persistence-aware propagation integrates database schema constraints and query safety analysis to track multi-script attack paths traversing shared database states. Finally, object-aware reaching definitions combine calling and bounded variable alias contexts to precisely model object-field mutations across method boundaries. We evaluate TaintRadar on both synthetic benchmarks and real-world systems. On the SARD benchmark, TaintRadar drastically reduces false positives while maintaining 80% overall accuracy. Deployed across 19 real-world PHP applications, it rediscovered the majority of known CVEs and uncovered 29 confirmed zero-day vulnerabilities, including 26 SQL injection and 3 stored XSS vulnerabilities, that have already received CVE identifiers. These results demonstrate that semantic-aware graph augmentation significantly improves the precision, coverage, and practical utility of static taint analysis.

</details>


### [412] [Fuzz'EMup: Leveraging EM Side-Channel Emanation to Guide Black-Box Embedded Firmware Fuzzing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16487)
*Fatemeh Moradihaghighi,Zihao Zhan,Yanan Guo,Ziming Zhao,Mashrur Chowdhury,Zhenkai Zhang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出利用电磁侧信道信号指导黑盒固件模糊测试，通过频带选择与动态时间规整处理噪声与时序抖动问题，在四个真实固件目标上验证了相比无引导模糊测试能获得更高的代码覆盖率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物联网和嵌入式设备固件安全至关重要，但许多设备无法进行固件提取、插桩或精确模拟，导致无法获取覆盖率反馈，只能使用低效的黑盒模糊测试。

Method: 利用电磁侧信道辐射引导固件模糊测试；通过基于活动/空闲信号对比的频带选择降低噪声；采用动态时间规整对齐每次输入的迹线并检测持续发散；通过树结构按发散时间组织执行以保持可扩展性。

Result: 在四个真实固件目标上，电磁侧信道反馈增强了路径探索，相比无引导的黑盒模糊测试获得了更高的代码覆盖率。

Conclusion: 电磁侧信道信号可以有效替代传统覆盖率反馈，在完全黑盒场景下引导模糊测试，提升漏洞发现能力。

Abstract: As IoT and embedded devices proliferate across various domains, securing their firmware has become critical. Fuzzing offers a systematic approach to uncovering vulnerabilities in firmware, and coverage feedback can improve its effectiveness by guiding exploration. However, many devices make coverage information impossible to obtain by preventing firmware extraction, instrumentation, or accurate emulation; in such cases, testers are left with only inefficient black-box fuzzing. In this paper, we present an approach that leverages electromagnetic (EM) side-channel emanations to guide firmware fuzzing in purely black-box settings. However, turning raw EM measurements into reliable guidance is challenging: EM traces are noisy, and timing jitter causes corresponding features in different traces to shift in time. We address these challenges by combining frequency band selection based on the activity-to-idle signal contrast with dynamic time warping to align per-input traces and detect sustained divergence, while maintaining scalability by organizing executions in a tree structure based on their divergence times. We evaluate our approach on four real firmware targets and demonstrate that EM-derived feedback enhances path exploration, yielding higher code coverage than unguided fuzzing.

</details>


### [413] [Enhanced Multi-Class DDoS Attack Identification using a Meta-Learning Ensemble](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16521)
*Ankith Indra Kumar,Genya Ishigaki,Amith Kamath Belman*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于集成元学习的DDoS攻击多分类框架，融合LSTM、KNN和随机森林模型，通过逻辑回归元学习器整合输出，在CIC-DDoS2019数据集上达到96%准确率，并在SDN环境中验证了93%的实用准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DDoS检测系统多集中于二元分类（攻击/正常），难以满足实际防御中对攻击类型精确识别以制定针对性缓解策略的需求。

Method: 构建集成架构，结合LSTM（长短期记忆网络）、KNN（K近邻）和随机森林三个基分类器，使用逻辑回归作为元学习器整合各模型输出，解决多分类器预测间的歧义问题。

Result: 在CIC-DDoS2019数据集上多分类准确率达96%，优于基线链式模型（92%）；在Mininet+Ryu控制器模拟的SDN环境中达到93%的实用准确率。

Conclusion: 元学习集成方法能有效提升DDoS攻击类型识别的准确性与鲁棒性，为自适应防御机制的发展提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks continue to pose significant threats to network availability and security. While many detection systems focus on binary classification (attack vs. benign), effective mitigation often requires identifying the specific type of DDoS attack. This paper introduces a robust intrusion detection framework centered around a high-accuracy, multi-class classification model designed to precisely identify various DDoS attack types. We propose an ensemble architecture integrating Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), and Random Forest (RF) models, whose outputs are synthesized by a Logistic Regression meta-learner. This approach explicitly addresses the ambiguity often encountered when combining predictions from multiple independent classifiers. Evaluated on the CIC-DDoS2019 dataset, our proposed ensemble meta-learning model achieves 96% accuracy in the multi-class identification task, significantly outperforming a baseline chain model (combining individual binary classifiers), which reached 92% accuracy and suffered from high ambiguity. Furthermore, integration and testing within a Software-Defined Networking (SDN) environment using Mininet and the Ryu controller demonstrated the practical applicability of our model, achieving 93% accuracy in identifying DDoS types in the emulated network traffic. Our work highlights the value of meta-learning ensembles for nuanced DDoS threat identification, paving the way for more adaptive and effective defense mechanisms.

</details>


### [414] [A Control-Driven Framework for Secure SaaS Onboarding in Regulated Enterprises](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16543)
*Naga Sundeep Krishna Thota,Rithika Dulam*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出一个集成第三方风险管理、网络安全、身份与访问管理、灾难恢复四大控制域的端到端SaaS接入框架，采用分阶段生命周期模型，通过结构化编排、跨域控制映射和设计模式，解决企业SaaS接入中因部门孤岛导致的延误、重复评估和责任不清等问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业SaaS接入涉及多个相互依赖的控制域（TPRM、网络安全、IAM、灾难恢复），但现有流程常各自为政、孤立执行，导致上线延迟、评估重复、责任归属不清以及残留运营风险，亟需一个统一、可控的端到端框架。

Method: 采用控制驱动的分阶段生命周期方法，涵盖接入与风险范围界定、架构验证、身份设计、韧性评估及上线后治理五个阶段；通过跨域控制映射识别孤岛审查导致的失效模式；并给出安全连接、联合身份、最小权限访问及共担责任灾难恢复等实用设计模式。

Result: 框架提供结构化SaaS接入生命周期（强调跨域依赖关系管理）、跨域控制映射（揭示孤立审查的故障模式）、以及多个实用设计模式。基于企业级实施经验总结，并附有参考治理检查清单。

Conclusion: 该框架可帮助企业减少SaaS接入摩擦、提升可审计性，并强化SaaS化平台的安全性与韧性。

Abstract: As enterprises increasingly adopt Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platforms for mission-critical functions, onboarding these services has emerged as a complex challenge extending well beyond procurement and basic security review. In regulated environments, SaaS onboarding must address multiple interdependent control domains, including Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM), cybersecurity assessment, Identity and Access Management (IAM), and disaster recovery (DR), which are often executed in isolation, resulting in delayed go-lives, duplicated assessments, unclear ownership, and residual operational risk. This paper proposes a control-driven, end-to-end SaaS onboarding framework that integrates TPRM, cybersecurity, IAM, and DR into a unified lifecycle model. The framework introduces a stage-based approach spanning intake and risk scoping, architecture validation, identity design, resilience assessment, and post-production governance. Key contributions include: (1) a structured SaaS onboarding lifecycle emphasizing sequencing and dependency management across control domains; (2) a cross-domain control mapping highlighting failure modes caused by siloed reviews; and (3) practical design patterns for secure connectivity, federated identity, least-privilege access, and shared-responsibility disaster recovery. Supported by operational lessons from enterprise-scale implementations and a reference governance checklist, the framework helps organizations reduce onboarding friction, improve auditability, and strengthen the security and resilience posture of SaaS-enabled platforms.

</details>


### [415] [Towards Secure and Trustworthy DAOs for Cross-Chain Governance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16548)
*Faisal Haque Bappy,Tahrim Hossain,Tarannum Shaila Zaman,Tariqul Islam*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文针对跨链DAO面临的安全挑战，系统分类了四种攻击向量（贿赂攻击、代币控制利用、人机交互欺骗和协议漏洞），并提出了一个多层次安全框架，集成密码学信任锚、防欺诈共识机制和去中心化验证技术，包括治理内核、跨链信任层和弹性层三大创新组件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨链DAO存在超越传统单链场景的独特安全威胁，现有研究缺乏对这些攻击向量的系统分类和针对性防御方案。

Method: 首先识别并分类四种跨链DAO攻击向量；然后设计多层次安全框架，包含治理内核（链上规则验证）、跨链信任层（阈值密码学）和弹性层（时间锁定决策撤销与渐进式争议解决）。

Result: 建立了一套结构化的跨链DAO安全对策体系，为不同区块链环境下的安全治理提供了理论基础。

Conclusion: 该框架为构建安全、透明、抗攻击的跨链DAO治理奠定了坚实基础。

Abstract: Cross-chain DAOs face unique security challenges that go beyond traditional single-chain vulnerabilities. This paper identifies and categorizes four critical attack vectors in cross-chain DAO governance: bribery attacks, token control exploits, human-computer interaction deceptions, and protocol vulnerabilities. We propose a comprehensive security framework with a multi-layered architecture that integrates cryptographic trust anchors, fraud-resistant consensus mechanisms, and decentralized validation techniques to address these threats. Our framework introduces novel components, including a Governance Kernel with on-chain rule verification, a Cross-Chain Trust Layer using threshold cryptography, and a Resilience Layer offering time-locked decision reversals and progressive dispute resolution. By establishing a structured set of countermeasures, this work lays the foundation for secure, transparent, and attack-resistant governance across diverse blockchain environments.

</details>


### [416] [Auditable Session Admission for Cross-Silo Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16559)
*Enzo Fenoglio,Philip Treleaven*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种跨孤岛联邦学习中的会话准入网关，通过签名的会话能力令牌和请求绑定证明，在组织边界强制执行预批准的会话操作，并生成可审计的决策记录。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨孤岛联邦学习中，跨组织边界的会话操作准入控制缺乏可审计的机制，现有集中式策略服务、平台配置或临时检查方式随时间漂移且难以审计。

Method: 在会话建立时由参与组织批准角色和约束，签署会话能力令牌；运行时每个请求携带令牌和请求绑定证明，网关通过无状态的密码学验证和能力匹配进行准入控制。

Result: 在MNIST作为替代工作负载的跨孤岛FL工作流上进行了端到端验证，所有代码开源、容器化、基础设施即代码，包含可重复测试和证据日志。

Conclusion: 该方法能够在组织边界有效执行预批准的会话能力，防止令牌重放和冒用，同时保持审计可见性。

Abstract: Cross-silo federated learning keeps raw data local, but deployments frequently stall on a practical bottleneck when deciding who may invoke which session-scoped operations across organizational boundaries, under constraints that remain auditable after execution. In practice, admission is implemented via centralized policy services, platform configuration, or ad hoc checks, which drift over time and are hard to audit from boundary-visible evidence. We present a session admission gateway that enforces pre-approved session capabilities at the boundary and emits verifiable decision records. During session setup, participating organizations approve roles and constraints and mint signed session capability tokens that enumerate permitted session operations for a given session_id. At runtime, each request carries the token and a request-bound proof-of-possession, making replay and impersonation with stolen tokens detectable at the gateway via request binding. Admission reduces to stateless per-request cryptographic verification and capability matching at an admission gateway, while setup and orchestration remain out of scope and organization-specific. We validate the approach end-to-end on a cross-silo FL workflow using MNIST as a surrogate workload. The proof-of-concept is open-source, containerized, provisioned as code, and includes reproducible tests and evidence logs.

</details>


### [417] [Synchronization-Free Algebraic Fingerprints for Large Language Models: From Autoregressive to Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16648)
*Jaroslaw Janas,Josef Pieprzyk,Pawel Morawiecki*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于Reed-Solomon多项式的免同步文本水印方案，利用相邻令牌对生成自包含的二进制同余，抵抗插入、删除和重排序攻击，仅需少量冗余即可实现高鲁棒性恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型(LLM)生成文本需要可靠的归属方法，现有水印方案面临同步问题（对齐困难）和对抗编辑/改写鲁棒性不足的挑战。

Method: 每个水印由相邻令牌对生成单个二进制同余；通过加密哈希确定Reed-Solomon多项式的评估点，多项式奇偶性决定嵌入第二个令牌的水印位；每个同余自包含且仅依赖局部令牌对，天然抵抗插入、删除和重排序。

Result: 从代数角度分析了恢复问题，讨论了适用于不同身份规模的解码算法；将水印损坏建模为二进制对称信道，证明即使在高令牌损坏率下也只需少量冗余即可可靠恢复。

Conclusion: 与现有基于块的水印方案不同，本方法避免了同步问题，为嵌入短/长秘密身份提供了灵活框架。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have created an urgent need for reliable watermarking methods that enable attribution of generated text while remaining robust to editing and paraphrasing. We propose a novel synchronization-free watermarking scheme in which every watermark consists of a single binary congruence generated from a pair of neighbouring tokens. For each token pair, a cryptographic hash determines an evaluation point of a Reed--Solomon polynomial representing the secret identity, while the parity of the polynomial evaluation determines the watermark bit embedded into the second token of the pair. Since each congruence is self-contained and depends only on the local token pair, the proposed construction is naturally resistant to insertions, deletions, and token reordering. We analyse the recovery problem from an algebraic perspective, discuss several decoding algorithms suitable for different identity sizes, and model watermark corruption as a Binary Symmetric Channel. The analysis shows that reliable recovery requires only a small redundancy even for relatively high token corruption rates. Unlike existing block-based watermarking schemes, the proposed method avoids synchronization problems while providing a flexible framework for embedding both short and long secret identities.

</details>


### [418] [VIGIL: Verifying Identity via Gated Intermittent Likelihoods for Continuous Biometric Authentication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16651)
*Aldridge Fonseca,Udayan Atreya,Amith Kamath Belman,Frank Sicong Chen*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出VIGIL框架，通过可配置跨模态融合、双状态状态转移机和自适应收缩验证窗口，实现连续多模态身份认证，有效缩短入侵检测时间并保持高可用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有连续多模态认证方法在面对持续性攻击和弱信号场景时，无法有效区分恶意攻击者和合法用户，存在检测延迟高、可用性差的问题。

Method: 提出VIGIL框架，包含三个核心创新：(1) 可配置跨模态融合与每模态权重分配；(2) 基于单向转移矩阵的双状态状态转移机；(3) 三区验证决策模型结合自适应收缩验证窗口，以及单调衰减和回流消除机制。

Result: 通过单调衰减、回流消除和分析评估，VIGIL有效解决了现有方法的局限性，在缩短入侵检测时间的同时保持了合法用户的高可用性。

Conclusion: VIGIL框架为连续多模态身份认证提供了一种高度自适应的解决方案，在安全性和用户体验之间取得了更好的平衡。

Abstract: Continuous multi-modal authentication has emerged as a necessity for securing modern environments against persistent threats. Existing temporal fusion techniques fail to identify a persistent attacker from a genuine user with poor signal strength. In this study, we propose VIGIL (Verifying Identity via Gated Intermittent Likelihoods for Continuous Biometric Authentication), a highly adaptive continuous authentication framework. We introduce configurable cross-modal fusion with per-modality weighting, enabling operators to select their choice of integration strategy. We improve temporal fusion using dual-state State Transition Machines (STM) with unidirectional transition matrices. A three-zone verification decision model that enables multi-round verification when evidence is inconclusive is used in combination with an adaptive shrinking verification window. Monotonic decay, backflow elimination and analytical evaluation demonstrate that the proposed framework effectively addresses the limitations of existing approaches and reduces the time to detect intrusions while maintaining high usability for legitimate users.

</details>


### [419] [SABLE: Minimalist Instruction-Level Authenticated Encryption for Constrained Confidential Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16771)
*Hamid Noori,Carlton Shepherd*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出并探索了SABLE——一种基于RISC-V的指令级认证加密处理器架构，通过在后处理ELF二进制文件的指令内存封装和CPU前端集成解密与验证阶段，实现了对标准RISC-V工具链的最小入侵兼容，并评估了多种微架构设计在FPGA上的性能开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统处理器在执行过程中以明文暴露代码和数据，易受IP窃取和安全检查篡改攻击。现有指令级加密方案依赖特定微架构、在指令执行后才检测错误、使用非标准密码或需要复杂的程序状态分析，缺乏一种微架构无关、轻量级且安全的解决方案。

Method: 设计并实现了SABLE架构，采用ASCON-128a认证加密算法，在指令内存封装和CPU前端两个位置集成解密与验证阶段，探索了从单周期组合逻辑到六种多周期顺序逻辑的七种微架构变体，并基于开源NEORV32 SoC在Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA上进行实现与评估。

Result: 与基线性能相比，各配置在LUT、性能、功耗和每指令能耗上分别产生1.6-9.3倍、4.1-10.0倍、1.5-8.0倍和10.4-80.0倍的开销（基于Dhrystone基准测试）。

Conclusion: 讨论了不同设计权衡，强调了面积感知、性能感知和能耗感知的设计点，表明SABLE为指令级加密提供了灵活、微架构无关且实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Conventional processor designs expose code and data as plaintext throughout execution, rendering them inherently vulnerable to attacks that recover intellectual property or modify security/safety checks. Instruction-level encryption (ILE) enables CPU-level decryption, execution, and optionally authentication of individual encrypted program instructions at runtime. However, existing proposals depend on specific micro-architectures, detect corrupted instructions after they have executed, rely on non-standard ciphers, or require complex analyses of program state. In this work, we introduce and present a design exploration of a RISC-V processor architecture (SABLE) that enables minimally invasive instruction-level authenticated encryption of programs. SABLE is agnostic to the underlying micro-architecture, remaining compatible with the standard RISC-V toolchain with minor changes to post-process compiled ELF binaries. We integrate a decrypt-and-verify stage at two points (the instruction-memory wrapper and the CPU frontend) and explore seven ILE micro-architectures from a single-cycle (combinational) design to six multi-cycle (sequential) variants. We implement and evaluate the designs using ASCON-128a on a Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA with the open-source NEORV32 system on chip. Relative to baseline performance, the configurations span LUT, performance, power, and energy-per-instruction overheads of 1.6-9.3$\times$, 4.1-10.0$\times$, 1.5-8.0$\times$, and 10.4-80.0$\times$, respectively, using the Dhrystone benchmarking suite. Finally, we discuss design trade-offs, highlighting area-, performance-, and energy-aware design points.

</details>


### [420] [Rollback-Free Cross-Chain Atomicity Through Forward-Only Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16959)
*Tahrim Hossain,Faisal Haque Bappy,Tarannum Shaila Zaman,Tariqul Islam*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向异构区块链智能合约的原子性协调框架，通过"仅向前修正"机制（用新交易替代回滚）解决了跨链操作中状态锁定与结果确认两大挑战，并限定了状态持有时间与冲突范围。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 区块链平台的独立网络生态需要跨链智能合约实现原子性操作，但区块链的不可篡改性使得传统原子提交协议的"回滚"机制不可行，亟需一种无需回滚、适用于异构链的原子协调方案。

Method: 提出"仅向前修正"框架：通过发起新的链上交易来纠正未完成操作，而非回滚；通过链上执行记录确定各链的执行结果，不依赖单一协调方；限制合约状态的持有时间和操作触及的冲突范围。

Result: 该框架实现了跨异构区块链的通用智能合约操作的原子性协调，并给出了状态持有时间界限和冲突范围约束。

Conclusion: 为异构区块链间通用智能合约操作的原子协调奠定了理论基础，提供了一种无需回滚、不依赖中心协调方的可行方案。

Abstract: Blockchain platforms have grown into an ecosystem of independent networks, and a growing class of applications now requires smart contracts on separate chains to act as one. Such operations must be atomic, yet immutability makes this fundamentally harder: a confirmed transaction cannot be reversed, so the rollback on which classical atomic commitment protocols depend is unavailable. Two challenges follow. Contract state must be held across an operation whose outcome is not yet known, and each chain's execution outcome must be established even though no chain can observe another. In response, we introduce a framework that achieves atomicity through forward-only correction, resolving incomplete operations with new on-chain transactions rather than reversal. The framework bounds how long contract state is held and confines contention to the state an operation touches, and it establishes outcomes from an on-chain record of what each chain executed, without relying on any single coordinating party. This work lays the foundation for atomic coordination of general smart contract operations across heterogeneous blockchains.

</details>


### [421] [Self-State Attacks on Self-Hosted AI Agents: How Far Can OS Defenses Go?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17986)
*Yimeng Chen,Nathanaël Denis,Roberto Di Pietro,Jürgen Schmidhuber*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出并系统研究了针对自托管AI代理的“自状态攻击”新威胁类别，定义了四轴攻击空间，并通过实验验证了分层防御策略的有效性与局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自托管AI代理通过读写自身内存和配置文件运行，其状态可能被破坏从而导致被入侵。现有研究对这类通过合法系统调用实现的攻击缺乏系统性理解，亟需探究操作系统对此类威胁的韧性。

Method: 形式化定义了四轴攻击空间（目标、机制、粒度、时间）；研究了防御（预防、检测、恢复）的结构性极限；引入了工作负载条件化的可检测性视角。通过采集真实代理的活动轨迹，将攻击空间实例化为23个单元格矩阵、43个具体操作，并注入轨迹中进行评估。

Result: 分层防御栈（指令层和配置层的访问控制预防、内存层的工作负载条件化检测、周期性备份恢复）对大多数攻击单元格有效，但存在少量残余攻击面在OS层面结构上无法区分。

Conclusion: 自状态攻击是一类新威胁，现有的OS级防御需要重新审视，这为相关研究开辟了新方向。

Abstract: Self-hosted AI agents read and write their own memory and configuration files to function. An agent may get compromised via corruption of its own state -- a compromise realized via legitimate OS system call invocation. We refer to this class of threats as self-state attacks. In this paper, we investigate the OS resilience to this class of attacks. Formally, we characterize a four-axis attack space (Target, Mechanism, Granularity, Temporal); investigate the structural limits of prevention, detection, and recovery; and introduce a workload-conditioned view of detectability. To instantiate the framework, we collect live activity traces from a representative self-hosted agent running across distinct workload profiles, and realize the attack space as a 23-cell matrix, 43 concrete operations on real self-state files, and injected into those traces. We then evaluate both canonical and workload-conditioned defense strategies. The empirical results show that a layered defense stack (access-control prevention on the instruction and configuration layers, workload-conditioned detection on the memory layer, and periodic backup for recovery) is effective on most attack cells while a small residual attack surface remains structurally indistinguishable at the OS level. These findings suggest that against the newly established class of self-state attacks, OS-level defense needs to be reconsidered, potentially opening new research directions in the field.

</details>


### [422] [Adaptive Incident Prioritization for Security Operations at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16963)
*Scott Freitas,Amir Gharib,Maayan Magenheim*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出自适应事件优先级排序算法（AIP），用于Microsoft Defender队列助手，通过BM25风格排序在无查询、多租户队列环境中持续对安全事件进行优先级排序，部署后实现了92.8%的Precision@10，并提升分析师互动行为5.8%-17.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型SOC每天面临数百个活跃事件，按到达时间、粗略严重度或特定产品启发式排序，导致相对优先级不明确，分析师认知和操作负担沉重。

Method: AIP将每个事件表示为从告警和元数据中提取的标准化安全组件集合，采用BM25风格排序，结合饱和局部组件频率、跨租户全局组件稀有度、有界领域先验乘数和组件级解释。

Result: 在1,000个客户组织的专家评审评估中达到92.8% Precision@10；在473,000个组织-日队列的后上线遥测中，相比严重性排序，告警详情交互增加5.8%，告警详情查看事件增加17.5%。

Conclusion: AIP有效提升了安全事件优先级排序的准确性，集中了分析师关注度，并扩展了GUIDE数据集以支持社区研究。

Abstract: Large security operations centers (SOCs) often face hundreds of active incidents per day, creating substantial cognitive and operational demands for analysts. Analysts must quickly decide which incidents deserve attention within long, constantly changing queues, yet incidents are commonly ordered by arrival time, coarse severity, or product-specific heuristics that leave their relative priority unclear. We introduce Adaptive Incident Prioritization (AIP), the ranking algorithm behind Microsoft Defender Queue Assistant, which continuously prioritizes security incidents for analyst investigation. AIP adapts BM25-style ranking to a query-less, multi-tenant queue setting by representing each incident as a collection of normalized security components extracted from alerts and metadata. The model combines saturated local component frequency, global component rarity estimated across tenants, bounded domain-prior multipliers, and component-level explanations. Deployed across tens of thousands of customers, AIP performs near-real-time inference and refreshes incident scores with a median latency of five seconds. In an expert-reviewed evaluation across 1,000 customer organizations, AIP achieves 92.8% Precision@10. In post-launch telemetry across 473,000 organization-day queues, AIP increases alert-detail interaction by 5.8% and alert-detail view events by 17.5% relative to severity ordering, providing behavioral evidence that model-ranked queues concentrate analyst engagement. We also extend the Microsoft GUIDE dataset with, to our knowledge, the first public label source for SOC queue prioritization over real-world incidents. The extension covers 499 organization queues and 9,980 incidents with expert-derived priority labels, enabling the research community to develop, compare, and advance methods for incident prioritization.

</details>


### [423] [Federated Lightweight Intrusion Detection in Drone Swarms with Knowledge Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17025)
*Fawaz J. Alruwaili,Cihan Tunc*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合知识蒸馏的轻量级联邦学习入侵检测系统，用于资源受限的无人机集群网络。在树莓派4和真实无人机数据集上测试，检测准确率达98.6%，同时通信成本降低约70%，计算开销减少29%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机集群在开放通信渠道和有限计算资源下易受网络攻击，传统集中式ML方法需收集所有数据并集中处理，在现实中不可行。现有联邦学习方案仍面临通信和计算开销大的问题，亟需在效率和检测性能之间取得平衡。

Method: 提出轻量级联邦学习入侵检测系统(FL-based IDS)，采用深度神经网络(DNN)结合知识蒸馏(KD)技术，在树莓派4设备上使用真实无人机网络数据集进行验证。

Result: 检测准确率约98.6%，通信成本降低约70%，计算开销减少29%。

Conclusion: 联邦学习结合知识蒸馏是资源受限无人机网络中安全高效部署的实用解决方案。

Abstract: Drone swarms are increasingly deployed in critical applications such as surveillance, disaster response, and infrastructure monitoring. However, their reliance on open communication channels and their limited computational resources make them vulnerable to a wide range of cyber-threats. There is a growing interest in intrusion detection systems (IDS) specifically designed for drone environments and operations. However, the conventional solutions including Machine Learning (ML)-based approaches require collecting all data from heterogeneous drones in the swarm and processing on a central server may not be always feasible. Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a promising distributed solution with an additional privacy-preserving feature. Even though potential studies exist, conventional FL-based IDS frameworks still face communication and computational overhead challenges, while achieving a balance between efficiency and effective detection under practical resource constraints remains a challenge. Therefore, we propose a lightweight FL-based IDS tailored for drone swarm networks using deep neural networks (DNN) enhanced with knowledge distillation (KD) to reduce model complexity and communication costs without sacrificing detection performance. We evaluate our framework using Raspberry Pi 4 devices and a real-world drone network dataset. Our approach demonstrates a detection accuracy of approximately 98.6% while reducing overall communication cost by around 70% and computational overhead by 29%. These results show that FL combined with KD is a practical and suitable solution for secure and efficient deployment in resource-constrained drone networks.

</details>


### [424] [Federated Learning and LLM-Driven Threat Intelligence for Zero Trust IoT Architecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17035)
*Amal Alshehri,Cihan Tunc*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个结合联邦学习（FL）和大语言模型（LLM）驱动的零信任物联网架构，通过隐私保护的分布式异常检测、持续身份验证和自主威胁响应，在资源受限设备上实现了高检测性能（F1=0.9091, ROC-AUC=1.0）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物联网设备面临严重的安全和隐私挑战，遗留设备易受攻击且更新成本过高，亟需一种高效且隐私保护的解决方案。

Method: 采用联邦学习进行隐私保护的分布式异常检测，结合LLM驱动的自主威胁响应，并在通信层通过mTLS over MQTT实现零信任架构。

Result: 在树莓派和多种传感器上的实验表明，F1分数达到0.9091，ROC-AUC达到1.0，验证了框架在资源受限设备上的有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架能有效实现隐私保护的异常检测，适合资源受限的物联网环境，为零信任安全架构提供了可行方案。

Abstract: While the Internet of Things (IoT) has become essential, they introduced serious security and privacy challenges, especially for mission-critical environments. Legacy devices are vulnerable to viruses, data breaches, and unauthorized access, and updating these devices would be infeasibly costly. As a solution, this paper presents a Federated Learning and LLM-Driven Threat Intelligence for Zero Trust IoT Architecture, with FL for anomaly detection integrating privacy-preserving distributed learning, continuous identity verification, and LLM-driven autonomous threat response into a unified pipeline. Unlike existing solutions, our framework enforces Zero Trust at every communication layer via mutual TLS (mTLS) over MQTT, ensuring no device or message is implicitly trusted. Our experiments with Raspberry Pis and various sensors achieve an F1 score of 0.9091 and an ROC-AUC of 1.0, highlighting the effectiveness of the proposed framework in enabling privacy-preserving anomaly detection for resource-constrained IoT devices.

</details>


### [425] [A Systematic Evaluation of Traditional Privacy Policy Analysis Tools Against LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17075)
*Madhav Aryal,Sudipa Saha,Kaushal Kafle,Anshuman Chhabra,Sunil Manandhar*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文首次系统评估了通用LLM能否替代专用隐私分析工具，发现GPT-5.2和Gemini-2.5在矛盾检测、合规分析、策略摘要等六大工具功能上均达到或超越现有工具性能，在实体标注任务上F1值显著优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM的出现改变了隐私政策与数据合规分析的研究范式，但现有工作尚未系统评估通用LLM能否真正替代此前需要专门领域工具才能完成的多样化功能。

Method: 选取六大代表性工具（覆盖矛盾检测、合规分析、策略摘要三大功能及元组提取、语义角色标注、人工标注三类中间任务），使用GPT-5.2和Gemini-2.5在10篇隐私政策数据集上直接提示执行对应任务，无需微调或领域训练。

Result: LLM在所有功能上均匹配或超越现有工具。第一方采集实体标注平均精确率81.8%、召回率70.9%；第三方共享实体标注精确率91.4%、召回率70.8%，优于OPP-115基准。

Conclusion: 通用LLM能够有效执行此前需要专用工具的隐私政策与法规分析中广泛的功能与任务，具备替代潜力。

Abstract: The advent of LLMs has significantly changed the research on privacy policy and data compliance analysis by enabling tasks that previously required specialized, domain-specific tools. However, it remains unclear to what extent LLMs can truly replicate the diverse functionalities, and the wide range of methodologies and analysis offered by prior work. In this paper, we conduct the first systematic evaluation of whether off-the-shelf LLMs can replace specialized privacy analysis tools. We study six representative tools spanning three major functionalities: contradiction detection, regulatory compliance analysis, and privacy policy summarization and aggregation, and across three intermediate tasks: structured data extraction using tuples, Semantic Role Labeling (SRL) and manual privacy policy labeling. We compare the performance of two state-of-the-art LLMs (GPT-5.2 and Gemini-2.5 in various configurations) against the tools by directly prompting the models to perform corresponding functionalities and tasks on a custom dataset of 10 privacy policies, allowing us to assess whether off-the-shelf models can produce tool-specific functionalities without further engineering or domain-specific training, major limitations in prior work. Our results show that LLMs consistently match or exceed the capabilities of existing tools across the functionalities. In manual labeling of first-party collection entities, LLMs achieved an average precision of 81.8% and recall of 70.9%, while for labeling of third-party sharing entities, they achieved an average precision of 91.4% and recall of 70.8% compared to the OPP-115 dataset. Overall, our findings indicate that LLMs can effectively perform a broad range of functionalities and tasks in privacy policy and regulation analysis that previously required specialized tools.

</details>


### [426] [SATLOCK: Handover-Coupled Scheduling for Weather-Resilient Quantum Key Distribution over LEO Constellations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17076)
*Mohammad Arif Hossain,Md Jafrin Hossain*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: SATLOCK是一个面向低轨卫星量子密钥分发（QKD）的握手机制感知路由框架，结合复合信道模型、整数线性规划（ILP）上界和深度Q网络（DQN）在线路由，实验表明在低竞争场景下启发式算法可达ILP的95-96%，高竞争场景下降至89.5%，DQN分别达到91.8%和84.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低轨卫星量子密钥分发（QKD）路由比经典路由更困难：卫星切换使连续调度决策耦合、随机云层覆盖可使地面链路静默、有限密钥效应消除了短时低仰角过境。现有方法缺乏对这些挑战的综合考虑。

Method: 提出SATLOCK框架，包含三个组件：(i) 复合信道模型，整合大气损耗、指向抖动、马尔可夫云层覆盖、诱骗态估计和有限密钥修正；(ii) 整数线性规划（ILP），提供可证明的握手机制感知吞吐量上界；(iii) 去中心化深度Q网络（DQN），用于天气自适应的在线路由。

Result: 在Walker星座上评估两种竞争场景：低竞争（16颗卫星，6个需求）下ILP给出1,311 Mbit，最强启发式达ILP的95-96%；高竞争（8颗卫星，12个需求）下启发式降至ILP的89.5%。DQN在两个场景下分别达到ILP的91.8%和84.6%。

Conclusion: DQN能学习有效的单需求天气自适应策略，但因缺乏跨需求协调而在聚合性能上受限。

Abstract: Routing quantum keys over low-earth-orbit (LEO) satellite constellations is harder than classical routing: satellite handovers couple consecutive scheduling decisions, stochastic cloud cover can silently zero a ground link, and finite-key effects eliminate short, low-elevation passes entirely. We present SATLOCK, a handover-aware Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) routing framework that combines (i) a composite channel model incorporating atmospheric loss, pointing jitter, Markov cloud cover, decoy-state estimation, and finite-key correction; (ii) an integer linear program (ILP) giving a provable handover-aware throughput upper bound; and (iii) a decentralized deep Q-network (DQN) baseline for weather-adaptive online routing. We evaluate two contention regimes on a Walker constellation serving intercontinental demands. In low contention (16 satellites, 6 demands), the ILP delivers 1,311 Mbit while the strongest heuristics reach 95--96\% of ILP. In high contention (8 satellites, 12 demands), where handovers become binding, heuristics drop to 89.5\% of ILP. The DQN agent reaches 91.8\% and 84.6\% of ILP in the two regimes; it learns effective per-demand weather policies but is limited in aggregate by the lack of cross-demand coordination.

</details>


### [427] [A Multi-Model Hybrid Defense Approach Against White-box Adversarial Attacks in Computer Network Traffic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17105)
*Khushnaseeb Roshan*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文针对网络入侵检测系统（NIDS）易受对抗攻击（FGSM和C&W）的问题，提出了一种结合对抗训练（AT）和高斯数据增强（GDA）的混合防御机制，在攻击后分别将准确率提升至96.57%和89.20%，有效缓解了对抗样本的威胁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络入侵检测系统（NIDS）在应对未知网络威胁时至关重要，但其自身易受对抗攻击（如FGSM和C&W）欺骗，导致误分类良性与恶意流量，因此需要开发有效的防御机制来提升NIDS的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出了一种混合防御方法，结合了两种启发式防御策略：对抗训练（AT）增强NIDS对特定对抗向量的鲁棒性，高斯数据增强（GDA）提供多方向防御能力。两者协同作用以抵御FGSM和C&W攻击。

Result: 在攻击前NIDS表现良好；遭受FGSM和C&W攻击后，准确率分别降至0.2649和0.4961。采用混合防御后，针对FGSM和C&W攻击的准确率分别恢复至96.57%和89.20%，并在不同epsilon和置信噪声因子（0.0001~0.0009）下进行了评估。

Conclusion: 所提出的混合防御方法能有效缓解FGSM和C&W对抗攻击对NIDS的影响，为未来对抗机器学习安全领域的研究提供了有价值的参考方向。

Abstract: It is crucial to safeguard computer networks from evolving network security threats and unknown cyberattacks. An essential tool for protecting computer networks against unknown cyber threats is Network Intrusion Detection System (NIDS). However, NIDS faces a major security concern due to its susceptibility to adversarial attacks. Adversarial attacks aim to deceive NIDS by crafting and injecting adversarial examples into the system. These adversarial inputs can deceive the NIDS into misclassifying benign network traffic as malicious. We developed a resilient hybrid defense mechanism aimed to mitigate the impact of two potent adversarial attacks: Fast Gradient Sign Method (FGSM) and Carlini & Wagner (C&W) attack. Our hybrid defense approach leverages the combined strength of two heuristic defense methods: Adversarial Training (AT) and Gaussian Data Augmentation (GDA). GDA provides multi-directional defense, while AT enhances NIDS robustness against specific adversarial vectors. Under pre-attack scenarios, NIDS demonstrated good accuracy and f1-score. However, in the post-attack scenario, its accuracy significantly dropped under FGSM and C&W attacks (0.2649 and 0.4961, respectively). Our proposed hybrid defense method effectively mitigated these adversarial threats, with post-defense accuracy of 96.57% and 89.20% for FGSM and C&W attacks. We evaluated the defense strategy across a range of epsilon and confidence noise factor values (ranging from 0.0001 to 0.0009). This research provides a good direction for future researchers in the emerging area of adversarial machine learning from a security perspective.

</details>


### [428] [DSA Nonce Vulnerabilities: An Interactive Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17107)
*Rundong Wei,Xiaomei Tian,Xiaoqi Li*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个面向CTF竞赛的DSA签名分析与可视化平台，支持签名生成/验证、三种常见nonce漏洞攻击复现（nonce重用、线性nonce泄露、HNP格攻击）以及攻击流程的动态可视化，实验验证了平台正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DSA算法涉及数论、模运算和大整数计算，对初学者理解困难；传统工具仅暴露输入输出，签名验证和密钥恢复攻击的中间计算过程不透明，不利于CTF竞赛教学。

Method: 构建了具备三大功能的可视化平台：基础签名生成与验证、CTF常见攻击方法复现、攻击工作流动态可视化；覆盖三种代表性nonce漏洞（重用、线性泄漏、HNP格攻击），并提供逐步显示和中间值高亮。

Result: 实验表明平台能正确复现标准DSA工作流以及全部三种攻击场景。

Conclusion: 该可视化平台有效提升了DSA算法及攻击流程的可理解性，适合CTF竞赛教学场景。

Abstract: Digital signatures are fundamental to identity authentication and data integrity in cybersecurity, and the NIST-standardized Digital Signature Algorithm (DSA) frequently appears in the cryptography track of CTF competitions. However, DSA relies on number theory, modular arithmetic, and large-integer computation, making both the algorithm and its associated attacks difficult for beginners to follow. Conventional tools often expose only inputs and outputs, leaving the intermediate computations of signing, verification, and key-recovery attacks opaque. This paper presents a DSA signature analysis and visualisation platform tailored to CTF competitions. The platform provides three main capabilities: basic signature generation and verification, reproduction of common CTF attack methods, and dynamic visualisation of attack workflows. It covers three representative nonce vulnerabilities: nonce reuse, linear nonce leakage, and HNP-based lattice attacks. Stepwise displays and highlighted intermediate values make the underlying computations directly inspectable. Experiments show that the platform correctly reproduces the standard DSA workflow and all three attack scenarios.

</details>


### [429] [SlotGuard: Stop Oversharing Private Local Context in LLM Agent Transcri](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17147)
*Haocheng Xia,Yongjoo Park*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: SlotGuard是一种本地转录边界方法，通过类型化、后缀感知的槽位重写结构性绑定，替换秘密为格式保留的合成值，并利用轻量级会话图链接跨轮次引用，在保护敏感数据的同时保持代理性能，实现了零凭证泄露和接近原始转录的任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM代理将工具输出、shell日志和文件读取等观察结果附加到提供商绑定的转录中，导致隐私（如路径、电子邮件）和凭证（如API密钥）泄露。现有的占位符编辑方法脆弱，可能遗漏嵌入或跨轮次引用、过度编辑良性相似内容，并破坏对推理有用的结构。

Method: SlotGuard提出本地转录边界方法，包括：将结构性绑定重写为类型化、后缀感知的槽位；用格式保留的合成值替换秘密；通过轻量级会话图链接跨轮次引用；仅在可信运行时内恢复原始值。

Result: 在受控的仓库导向代理转录上，SlotGuard移除了9,229条路径中的20,814个标注的结构敏感字符，将凭证泄漏降至0.0%（852个植入值）。在四种上游模型中，任务成功率接近原始转录，而通用编辑方法降至2.5%。转录重写中位时间为每代理轮次14.424微秒。

Conclusion: SlotGuard能够有效保护代理转录中的敏感信息，同时保持代理性能，且计算开销极低，代码已开源。

Abstract: LLM agents can leak privacy (e.g., paths, emails) and credentials (e.g., API keys) as agent observations (e.g., tool outputs, shell logs, and file reads) are appended to provider-bound transcripts. Existing placeholder redaction is brittle: it can miss embedded or cross-turn references, over-redact benign lookalikes, and destroy the structure useful for reasoning. We present SlotGuard, a local transcript boundary that can hide sensitive data while retaining agents' performance. SlotGuard rewrites structural bindings as typed, suffix-aware slots, replaces secrets with format-preserving synthetic values, links cross-turn references with a lightweight session graph, and restores raw values only inside the trusted runtime. On controlled repository-oriented agent transcripts, SlotGuard removes all 20,814 annotated structurally sensitive characters across 9,229 paths and reduces credential leakage to 0.0\% across 852 planted values. It remains close to raw-transcript task success across four upstream models, while generic redaction drops to 2.5\%. Transcript rewriting takes a median of 14.424~$μ$s per agent turn. The code is publicly accessible at https://github.com/illinoisdata/SlotGuard.

</details>


### [430] [How Jailbreak Attacks Inform Safety Alignment: A Defender-Centric, Shapley-Based Evaluation of Jailbreak Contributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17152)
*Yukai Zhou,Feiyang Lu,Xiaokai Mao,Jinfei Liu,Wenjie Wang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出以防御者为中心的越狱攻击评估框架A-MESS，通过Shapley值评估攻击对安全训练的边际效用，发现攻击成功率与防御效用弱相关，直接优化攻击子集能更有效提升大模型安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有越狱攻击评估以攻击者为中心（如攻击成功率ASR），但能攻破模型的攻击未必能有效提升模型安全性。需要一种以防御者为中心的评估视角，衡量攻击数据对安全训练的实际贡献。

Method: 提出A-MESS框架：1) 定义AttackSHAP，基于Shapley值衡量每个攻击的边际效用；2) 通过黑盒子集效用观测估计AttackSHAP；3) 在预算约束下利用贪心或代理优化选择最小有效攻击子集。

Result: 在受控效用场景和真实LLM安全场景中：ASR排名与防御效用弱对齐；AttackSHAP可在有限查询下准确估计；直接优化子集比基于ASR或仅归因的选择产生更强的安全效用。

Conclusion: 越狱攻击应被视为改进安全性的资源，而非仅作为破解模型的工具；基于防御效用的评估和选择方法更有利于模型安全提升。

Abstract: Jailbreak attacks on large language models are usually evaluated by attacker-centric metrics such as attack success rate (ASR), yet an attack that breaks a model is not necessarily useful for improving its safety. We propose a defender-centric view of jailbreak evaluation, where attacks are evaluated by the downstream safety improvements they enable when used as red-teaming data for safety training. Building on this view, we introduce A-MESS (Minimal Effective Attack-Subset Selection), a setting-agnostic framework for attributing and selecting jailbreak attacks from black-box subset utility observations. A-MESS estimates AttackSHAP, a Shapley-based score that attributes marginal utility to individual attacks and selects compact attack subsets under user-specified budgets via greedy or surrogate-based optimization. Across controlled utility landscapes and real LLM safety settings, we find that ASR rankings are weakly aligned with defender-centric utility, that AttackSHAP can be estimated accurately with limited utility queries, and that directly optimizing subsets yields stronger safety utility than attacker-centric or attribution-only selection. These results suggest evaluating jailbreak attacks as resources for improving safety, not only as tools for breaking models.

</details>


### [431] [Fast and Private Max-Sum Diversification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17196)
*Ron Zadicario,Tova Milo*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文首次研究了差分隐私下的结果多样化问题，针对最大和多样化（MSD）问题提出了具有近最优效用保证的差分隐私算法，并设计了更高效的算法，实验表明即使在强隐私保护下也能达到与非私有方法相当的效用，且执行时间显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有结果多样化方法在处理敏感数据时无法解决隐私问题，因此需要研究如何在差分隐私框架下实现结果多样化。

Method: 针对基数约束和拟阵约束下的MSD问题，提出差分隐私算法，实现近最优效用保证，并设计更高效的算法。

Result: 提出的算法在真实数据集上，即使强隐私保护下也能达到与非私有基线相当的效用，且执行时间显著优于非私有方法（基数约束下）。

Conclusion: 差分隐私下的结果多样化是可行的，且提出的算法在效用和效率上均有出色表现，甚至在某些方面优于非私有方法。

Abstract: Result diversification is crucial for generating informative, non-redundant data summaries and query outputs. Although its various formulations have been extensively studied across an array of data-driven disciplines, existing methods fail to address the privacy concerns that arise when the underlying data is sensitive. In this work, we initiate the study of result diversification under differential privacy, focusing on the max-sum diversification (MSD) problem, a widely adopted model with the objective of maximizing a linear combination of a submodular function, quantifying relevance, and the sum of pairwise distances between selected items, quantifying diversity. We propose differentially private algorithms for MSD under both cardinality and matroid constraints, achieving nearly optimal utility guarantees. At the same time, we design more efficient algorithms that maintain strong guarantees. Notably, the proposed algorithms are faster than existing non-private methods, making them appealing even in non-private settings. Experimental evaluations on real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves utility comparable to that of non-private baselines even under strong privacy guarantees, and significantly improves execution times for cardinality constraints.

</details>


### [432] [SpexPay: A Privacy-Preserving Pay-As-You-Go System for Dynamic Spectrum Sharing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17218)
*Mohaimin Al Barat,Hexuan Yu,Shaoyu Li,Yang Xiao,Yi Shi,Eric W. Burger,Y. Thomas Hou,Wenjing Lou*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: SpexPay是一种隐私保护且可审计的频谱按使用付费框架，结合BBS+可验证凭证、不可链接会话假名和智能合约，在实现强不可链接性的同时确保频谱交易的隐私与问责性。系统延迟约150ms，链上成本约0.9美元，已在Raspberry Pi 5上验证边缘硬件适用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动态频谱共享（DSS）方案如频谱接入系统（SAS）依赖集中式管理员，暴露敏感运营元数据且缺乏加密交易问责性；按需付费模式面临隐私与问责性挑战。

Method: 集成BBS+可验证凭证、不可链接会话假名和选择性披露证明实现隐私保护访问授权；基于Solidity智能合约实现自动化、不可抵赖的托管结算；链上仅记录假名使用证据和哈希链计量数据。

Result: 端到端延迟约150ms，链上交易成本约603K Gas（约0.9美元），在Raspberry Pi 5上验证了边缘硬件可扩展性。

Conclusion: SpexPay为大规模开放频谱市场提供了一种兼顾隐私保护、可审计性和实用性的解决方案，适合实际DSS部署。

Abstract: Dynamic Spectrum Sharing (DSS) is a cornerstone of next-generation wireless systems, yet existing solutions such as Spectrum Access Systems (SAS) rely on centralized administrators that expose sensitive operational metadata and lack cryptographic transaction accountability. Though SAS administrators, such as Google, have introduced pay-as-you-go pricing models, these approaches still face significant privacy and accountability challenges as DSS evolves toward a more open and large-scale spectrum marketplace. We present SpexPay, a privacy-preserving and auditable pay-as-you-go spectrum usage framework that enforces fine-grained, usage-linked payments without revealing user identities. Spexpay integrates BBS+ verifiable credentials, unlinkable session pseudonyms, and selective-disclosure proofs to enforce privacy-preserving access authorization, while leveraging Solidity-based smart contracts to realize automated and non-repudiable escrow settlement. By recording only pseudonymous usage evidence and hash-chained metering data on-chain, the system achieves strong unlinkability while preserving verifiable accountability and auditability. A full prototype demonstrates low end-to-end latency ($\approx$150 ms) and modest on-chain cost ($\approx$603K gas or $\approx$\$0.9), showing that SpexPay is practical for real-world DSS deployments. We also evaluated the user-side cryptographic operations on a Raspberry Pi 5 to assess scalability and suitability for edge-class hardware. Our code and artifacts are publicly available at https://github.com/iambarat/SpexPay.

</details>


### [433] [Between Safe Boundaries: Exploiting Temporal Consistency for Jailbreaking Text-To-Video Generation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17279)
*Xingkai Peng,Jun Jiang,Jiayang Liu,Kejiang Chen,Weiming Zhang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出BSB框架，利用视频生成的时间一致性和蒙特卡洛树搜索，在黑盒场景下高效攻击文本到视频模型，相比现有方法平均成功率提升18.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有针对T2V模型的越狱攻击方法主要从文本到图像攻击迁移而来，未能充分利用视频生成固有的时间一致性特征，且需要大量视频查询优化（黑盒场景下不可行），以及缺乏结构化的搜索策略。

Method: BSB框架将恶意意图编码为两个无害边界状态之间的过渡，利用时间一致性使插值生成不安全中间帧。通过蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）在低成本的文本代理空间中进行搜索，并用稀疏的视频级评估定期校准搜索结果。

Result: 在Veo 3.1、Sora 2、Seedance、Kling v1等主流商业T2V模型上，BSB相比现有基线方法平均攻击成功率提升18.6%。

Conclusion: 时间一致性是T2V模型一个被低估但至关重要的攻击面，结构化搜索能在有限查询预算下有效发现漏洞。

Abstract: Recently, text-to-video (T2V) models have been widely deployed, sparking growing concerns over their robustness against jailbreak attacks. Existing jailbreak methods, mostly adapted from text-to-image attacks, suffer notable drawbacks when applied to T2V systems. They fail to fully leverage temporal consistency, an inherent characteristic of video generation. Besides, these methods demand heavy video query optimization, which is infeasible in practical black-box scenarios.
