Their adversarial prompt search is also driven by heuristic local signals, lacking principled structured exploration strategies. To tackle these limitations, we propose BSB, a structured, query-efficient jailbreak framework for T2V models. BSB harnesses temporal consistency by encoding harmful intent as the transition between two individually harmless boundary states. Under this paradigm, the attack targets boundary-state pairs whose interpolation tends to produce unsafe intermediate frames during video generation. Directly evaluating all candidate pairs within the video space incurs prohibitive computation cost. Instead, BSB conducts Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) in a cheaper textual proxy space and regularly calibrates search outcomes with sparse video-level evaluations. We conduct comprehensive experiments on mainstream commercial T2V models including Veo 3.1, Sora 2, Seedance and Kling v1. Results show BSB surpasses all existing jailbreak baselines, delivering an average 18.6% relative gain in attack success rate over the strongest competitor across evaluated models. Our findings identify temporal consistency as an understudied yet vital attack surface for T2V models and verify that structured search facilitates effective vulnerability discovery under constrained query budgets.

</details>


### [434] [Physical Time-Lock Puzzles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17328)
*Niloufar Sayadi,Chenglu Jin,Phuong Ha Nguyen,Zheng Yang,Marten van Dijk*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出物理时间锁谜题（P-TLP），利用物理不可克隆函数（PUF）的硬件评估延迟作为不可并行化的时间锚，从根本上解决了传统时间锁谜题易受硬件加速攻击的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统时间锁谜题基于软件计算步骤，无法抵御硬件加速和算法优化，导致长期延迟保证在硬件快速进步下不可靠，本质上是“步锁”而非“时锁”。

Method: 利用噪声PUF作为非并行化延迟预言机，构建复合谜题架构以容忍噪声并保持延迟窗口集中；采用顺序贪婪求解策略，通过Hoeffding和Berry-Esseen界推导紧致延迟窗口，并证明早期求解的困难性。

Result: FPGA原型实验验证了理论分析与实测延迟紧密匹配，P-TLP能够提供高度可预测的长期延迟保证，适用于数字遗产管理等高价值应用。

Conclusion: 物理时间锁谜题通过硬件固有延迟实现了真正的时间锁定，克服了传统方案的硬件加速漏洞，为长期安全性提供了可验证的物理基础。

Abstract: Traditional time-lock puzzles enforce delayed access to encrypted secrets by relying on inherently sequential computational steps. However, since software-based constructions impose no fundamental bound on the physical execution speed of individual steps, they remain vulnerable to hardware acceleration and improved implementations. In practice, this renders existing schemes ``step-lock'' rather than true ``time-lock'' puzzles, making long-term delay guarantees highly speculative against decades of unpredictable hardware advancement. To address this fundamental limitation, we introduce the Physical Time-Lock Puzzle (P-TLP), a new paradigm that anchors solving delay directly to the intrinsic, hardware-bounded evaluation latency of silicon hardware. By leveraging noisy Physical Unclonable Functions (PUFs) as non-parallelizable delay oracles, P-TLPs establish resistance against both parallel computation and algorithmic acceleration under the random oracle model. To tolerate PUF evaluation noise while maintaining a tightly concentrated and predictable solving-delay window, we propose a composite puzzle architecture that combines multiple independent basic puzzles. We formally prove the optimality of a sequential greedy solving strategy and derive tightly concentrated solving-delay windows using Hoeffding and Berry-Esseen bounds. We additionally prove early-solve hardness, establishing that adversaries with substantial classical computation budgets cannot bypass the physically-enforced PUF evaluation bottleneck. We validate our theoretical analysis with an FPGA prototype built around a configurable Ring Oscillator PUF, confirming that our analytical delay predictions tightly match empirical measurements. Our results demonstrate that P-TLPs can deliver highly predictable, long-term delay guarantees, enabling practical deployment in high-value applications such as digital legacy management.

</details>


### [435] [Measuring and Evaluating the Performance of Generative AI Models for Scam Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17353)
*Cem Topcuoglu,Seyed Ali Akhavani,Harel Berger,Sadia Afroz,Michalis Pachilakis,Vibhor Sehgal,Leyla Bilge,Engin Kirda*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）在无需任务特定微调的情况下，跨多种场景检测在线诈骗的有效性。通过构建真实诈骗基准数据集并评估九种LLM，发现大模型表现更优，但有效提示能显著提升小模型性能。LLM相比微调模型具有更好的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线诈骗持续造成重大财务和个人伤害，基于LLM的检测系统已被广泛集成到安全产品中，但普遍认为LLM普遍适用于诈骗检测的观点缺乏验证，本文旨在探究LLM在不同场景下检测诈骗的真实能力。

Method: 构建并发布一个涵盖多种格式和主题的真实诈骗基准数据集；评估九种不同规模和架构的LLM；采用不同提示策略进行实验；与微调后的BERT分类器进行对比。

Result: 大型LLM总体优于小型模型；有效的提示策略显著提升小模型性能；LLM在泛化到未见过的诈骗场景方面优于微调模型；预训练知识对诈骗检测有实质性贡献。

Conclusion: LLM具备跨场景检测诈骗的能力，无需任务特定微调，且预训练知识有助于提高泛化性。研究公开了数据集和评估框架，以促进未来相关研究。

Abstract: Online scams continue to cause substantial financial and personal harm. As a result, detection systems based on Large Language Models (LLMs) have been integrated into security products ranging from email gateways and browser extensions to fraud-monitoring dashboards. As this adoption accelerates, a common belief has taken hold: that these models are broadly suitable for scam detection. In this work, we investigate whether LLMs, with their strong capabilities in understanding intent, context, and reasoning, can effectively detect scams across diverse scenarios without task-specific fine-tuning. We curate and release a unique benchmark dataset of real-world scams spanning multiple formats and topics. We evaluate nine LLMs of varying sizes and architectures, examining their performance under different prompting strategies and comparing them to a fine-tuned BERT-based classifier. Our results show that while larger LLMs generally outperform smaller ones, effective prompting substantially boosts the performance of smaller models. Moreover, LLMs are better at generalizing to unseen scams compared to fine-tuned models, suggesting that pre-trained knowledge contributes meaningfully to scam detection. We release our dataset and evaluation framework to facilitate future research in robust scam detection using language models.

</details>


### [436] [ShadowPickle: Evading Machine Learning Model Scanners via Stealthy Pickle Deserialization Attacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17503)
*Dhruv Pradhan,Sarang Nambiar,Ezekiel Soremekun*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本论文提出名为SHADOWPICKLE的三种隐蔽性pickle反序列化攻击，可绕过10种SOTA模型扫描器和4个模型托管平台，并构建了PICKLEBENCH基准测试框架，最后给出安全建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模型托管平台（如Hugging Face）易受供应链攻击，攻击者可通过分发恶意预训练模型实现远程代码执行，现有SOTA扫描器难以有效检测此类攻击。

Method: 利用Pickle虚拟机的外部模块导入机制，设计三种隐蔽的反序列化攻击方法；同时构建PICKLEBENCH动态可扩展基准测试框架，用于自动将SHADOWPICKLE注入良性PTM模型。

Result: SHADOWPICKLE可绕过10种SOTA扫描器和4个模型托管平台；其中Overwritten变种对扫描器的逃逸率达63%，比现有攻击高50%；PICKLEBENCH比三个SOTA基准测试的挑战性高25.6%。

Conclusion: 揭示了现有PTM扫描器的局限性，并提供了缓解攻击、提升扫描器有效性的安全建议，为未来改进方向提供了指导。

Abstract: Model hosting hubs (e.g., Hugging Face) are vulnerable to supply chain attacks that enable remote code execution on trusted user environments. Attackers often distribute malicious Pre-trained ML models (PTMs) via model hubs. In this paper, we present novel attacks against PTMs and model hubs called SHADOWPICKLE. SHADOWPICKLE includes three (3) stealthy pickle deserialization attacks that enable malicious behaviors and evade state-of-the-art (SOTA) model scanners. These attacks leverage the external module import mechanism of the Pickle Virtual Machine (VM) to execute malicious payloads during deserialization. Additionally, we provide PICKLEBENCH, a dynamic and extensible benchmark for automatically injecting SHADOWPICKLE into arbitrary benign PTM models. Our evaluation shows that SHADOWPICKLE evades ten SOTA scanners, and four model hubs. SHADOWPICKLE (Overwritten) has a 63% evasion rate across scanners, and up to 50% higher evasion rates than existing attacks. Besides, PICKLEBENCH is up to 25.6% more challenging than three SOTA benchmarks. Finally, we provide security recommendations for mitigating our attacks and improving the effectiveness of existing scanners. Our findings highlight the limitations of existing PTM scanners and suggest directions for improvements.

</details>


### [437] [Salience Induction against Multi-Hop RAG Agents: Threat and Defense](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17535)
*Xingfu Zhou,Pengfei Wang,Yuan Zhou,Wei Xie,Xu Zhou*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型攻击面——显著性诱导（Salience Induction），通过改变事实的位置、强调和语义邻近性来误导多跳问答系统，即使所有检索内容均为真实且无恶意指令。在30%编辑预算下实现83.3%攻击成功率，并提出轻量级防御方法Salience Normalization将成功率降至15.3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有防御主要针对内容投毒和提示注入，忽视了通过改变事实显著性（位置、强调、框架、语义邻近性）来操纵推理路径的攻击方式。作者旨在揭示即使所有检索内容为真、无指令注入情况下，智能RAG系统仍面临的安全威胁。

Method: 形式化定义显著性诱导为保持真相但重定向多跳属性绑定的编辑操作，设计6类显著性编辑算子，构建迭代式提议-验证管线（满足事实性和隐蔽性约束），并创建含诱饵标注的SalientWiki-MH基准数据集。

Result: 在5个前沿模型族（GPT、Claude、Gemini、DeepSeek、Qwen）和3种智能体架构（ReAct、Reflexion、工具调用）上广泛泛化。30%编辑预算下ASR达83.3%，最强基线防御后仍有75.7%成功率。Salience Normalization将标准攻击成功率降至15.3%，自适应攻击下为23.6%。

Conclusion: 仅凭真实性和指令过滤不足以保证安全，鲁棒的智能RAG系统还需要针对显著性-相关性解耦的防御机制。

Abstract: Agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems increasingly retrieve external evidence and orchestrate tools for knowledge-intensive applications. In Multi-Hop question answering, agents chain facts across documents. Existing defenses focus on content poisoning, which injects false facts, and prompt injection, which embeds directives. We identify a third attack surface: the salience channel, through which fact position, emphasis, framing, and semantic proximity can redirect reasoning even when all retrieved claims are true and no instructions are present. We formalize Salience Induction as truth-preserving edits that redirect Multi-Hop attribute binding while leaving the retrieval trace semantically intact. We define six Salience-Editing operator classes and build an iterative proposer-verifier pipeline under factual and stealth constraints. We also introduce SalientWiki-MH, a decoy-annotated Multi-Hop benchmark. Evaluations across five frontier model families (GPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and Qwen) and three agent architectures (ReAct, Reflexion, and tool-calling) show broad generalization. Under a 30% edit budget, Salience Induction achieves an 83.3% attack success rate; the strongest evaluated baseline defense leaves 75.7% post-defense ASR. Untargeted rewriting further reduces attacks only by degrading neutral task success. Our lightweight input-side defense, Salience Normalization, reduces attack success to 15.3% under standard attacks and 23.6% under an adaptive attack. These results show that truthfulness and instruction filtering alone are insufficient: robust agentic RAG also requires defenses against salience-relevance decoupling.

</details>


### [438] [(A)iSpy: Parasitic Trojans for Machine Learning Infrastructure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17550)
*Habibur Rahaman,Qipan Xu,Zafaryab Haider,Prabuddha Chakraborty,Swarup Bhunia,Fnu Suya*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为(A)iSpy的新型基础设施木马，它通过寄生在机器学习计算图中，利用主动监控和执行范式，在训练和推理过程中实施隐蔽攻击，包括窃取超参数、增强后门攻击成功率至100%，并能轻易绕过现有安全检测机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的ML安全审计主要关注数据和模型工件的完整性，但执行环境（如第三方运行时库）被隐式信任，存在安全盲区。恶意运行时模块可直接与训练和推理动态交互，实现静态代码或二进制修改难以完成的复杂攻击目标。

Method: 设计(A)iSpy寄生式基础设施木马，采用主动监控和执行范式：1) 监控计算图中的临时张量状态；2) 通过模型权重或输出logits隐秘外泄训练超参数（破坏机密性）；3) 作为梯度放大器，观察隐写触发信号将弱数据投毒转化为高效后门攻击（破坏完整性）；4) 在ONNX Runtime训练和推理引擎中实现验证。

Result: (A)iSpy能将弱数据投毒的后门攻击成功率从接近0%提升到100%；能够识别并隐秘外泄关键训练超参数；能轻易绕过标准恶意软件扫描器及相关输入和模型检查工具；在附录中还展示了子群体标签翻转、可用性破坏和推理阶段操控等多种扩展攻击。

Conclusion: ML流水线对第三方库的依赖引入了严重的安全漏洞，执行环境不应被隐式信任。(A)iSpy证明了这种威胁的实用性和严重性，现有安全机制亟需扩展到运行时环境的全面监控和验证。

Abstract: Modern machine learning (ML) pipelines depend heavily on third party libraries for graph compilation and hardware acceleration. While current practices audit data and model artifacts or rely on file integrity checks, the execution environment remains implicitly trusted. This blind spot enables active threats where a malicious runtime module interacts directly with live training and inference dynamics: exploiting this interaction allows the Trojan to support complex objectives that are challenging for static code or binary modifications, achieving manipulations impossible for standard data and model level attacks. We expose this vulnerability by presenting (A)iSpy, a parasitic infrastructure Trojan that subverts ML systems through an active observe and execute paradigm. Operating within the computation graph, (A)iSpy monitors transient tensor states to perform targeted, stealthy manipulations with negligible overhead. To violate confidentiality, the Trojan identifies all critical training hyperparameters and covertly exfiltrates them via model weights or output logits. To break integrity, it acts as a gradient amplifier: by observing steganographic triggers, it transforms otherwise weak data poisoning into effective backdoor attacks, increasing success rates from near zero to 100%. We further demonstrate broad extensibility across the machine learning lifecycle by validating auxiliary attacks in the appendix, including subpopulation label flipping, availability disruptions, and inference stage manipulations. Importantly, the (A)iSpy module easily evades standard malware scanners, while the associated poisoned inputs and resulting compromised models bypass typical inspection tools. We demonstrate the practicality of this threat with an implementation in the ONNX Runtime training and inference engines.

</details>


### [439] [Quantum-Resilient Banking Transaction Security using DW-HKEM: A Hybrid RSA/ML-KEM Cryptographic Gateway with Real-Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17573)
*Siddhaarth S Prabhu,Aswani Kumar Cherukuri*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文设计并实现了一种基于双重包裹混合密钥封装机制（DW-HKEM）的集成系统，结合实时加密分析仪表盘，通过组合RSA-256和ML-KEM-768实现经典与量子安全，总开销仅1.58ms，为金融行业向后量子密码时代过渡提供了可行的参考方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前在线银行和金融服务面临两大威胁：一是"先收获，后解密"（HNDL）攻击范式已现实存在，二是量子计算对现有公钥密码基础设施构成迫在眉睫的威胁。RSA-2048作为互联网交易中的主流密钥长度，在这两种威胁下已不再安全。

Method: 提出双重包裹混合密钥封装机制（DW-HKEM），同时托管RSA-256和ML-KEM-768两种封装机制，用AES-256会话密钥分别包裹后，通过基于SHA-256的密钥派生函数生成组合密钥。同时设计了CryptoX实时仪表盘，提供操作计时、会话级分析和性能趋势可视化。

Result: 经过100次独立迭代的实证基准测试，总开销约为1.58毫秒，完全在企业部署阈值范围内，验证了该架构的实用性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: 该架构能够同时防御经典和量子 adversaries，且与现有银行系统向后兼容，是金融行业加密基础设施向后量子时代迈进的可行、可扩展参考方案。

Abstract: The increasing number of online banking and financial services on public-facing networks has caused security of cryptographic protocols to become a serious, systemic problem. RSA-2048 is the key length that is used in the majority of transactions that travel over the Internet every day. A very insidious threat vector, the Harvest Now, Decrypt Later (HNDL) paradigm, is already in existence with the adversarial nation-state actors and well-funded threat actors. The exposure window is not a time in the future it is the NOW moment! Quantum computation is a certain threat to the current public-key cryptographic infrastructure, and one that is moving ever closer. In this paper, the authors take up both of these challenges, designing, implementing and testing an integrated system based on a Dual-Wrap Hybrid Key Encapsulation Mechanism (DW-HKEM) and a live cryptographic analytics dashboard. Both the RSA-256 and ML-KEM-768 are hosted within the DW-HKEM framework and an AES-256 session key is wrapped in each of them, with a composite key created using a Key Derivation Function based on SHA-256, resulting in combinatorial security against classical and quantum adversaries and backwards compatibility with existing banking systems. The CryptoX real-time dashboard offers time tracking for each operation, session-level analytics and visualization of performance trends for immediate use in enterprise banking security operations. The results from empirical benchmarking across 100 independent iterations show a total overhead of about 1.58ms, which is well within the enterprise deployment threshold, proving the architecture viable as a practical, scalable reference for the financial-sector's cryptographic infrastructure and applications to move to a post-quantum era. We also provide complete source code of the work carried out.

</details>


### [440] [Detection, Attribution, Narration: An End-to-End Pipeline for Explainable Money Mule Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17586)
*Yuge Zhang,Yuanxing Zhang,Yichao Jin,Khairul Amsyar Mohd Razis,Nicholas Qi An Choo,Kai Yin Anders Wong,Xinyan Tang,Kenneth Zhu Ke,Wee Keong Dennis Lee,Jingyuan Zhao*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出一个端到端的洗钱账户检测系统，结合LightGBM分类器、TreeSHAP可解释性分析和LLM自然语言生成，在真实生产部署中将检出率从61%提升至89%，月告警量从211增至302，且分析师认知负荷显著降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 洗钱账户是金融欺诈的关键环节，但交易和行为数据的异构性使得大规模检测极具挑战，现有规则系统效果有限。

Method: 三阶段流水线：①基于280个工程特征的LightGBM分类器；②TreeSHAP归因层分解预测贡献；③LLM模块将SHAP归因转化为面向分析师的自然语言解释文本。

Result: 生产部署中检出率从61%提升至89%，月告警量从211增至302，新增60%的增量欺诈检测，分析师认知负荷显著降低。

Conclusion: LLM增强的可解释性方法在受监管金融环境中具有实际部署价值，能有效提升检测覆盖率并减轻分析人员负担。

Abstract: Money mule accounts are critical facilitators of financial fraud, yet detecting them at scale remains challenging due to the heterogeneous nature of transactional and behavioural data. We present an end-to-end pipeline for customer-level mule detection comprising three stages: (1) a LightGBM classifier trained on 280 engineered features spanning transaction patterns, account demographics, network topology, and temporal behaviour; (2) a TreeSHAP attribution layer that decomposes each prediction into feature contributions; and (3) a large language model (LLM) module that converts SHAP attributions into analyst-facing natural-language narratives. We evaluate across three open-weight LLM families and assess explanation quality through analyst feedback. In a live production deployment, the system achieves a yield rate of 89%, up from 61% under the incumbent rule-based system, with monthly alert volume expanding from 211 to 302, reflecting broader true-positive coverage rather than increased noise. This corresponds to a 60% incremental adverse detection beyond existing review workflows, substantially outperforming the rule-based approach. Qualitative feedback from analysts indicates that LLM-generated narratives reduce cognitive load during alert triage. We further discuss implications of deploying LLM-augmented explainability in regulated financial environments.

</details>


### [441] [Protecting Floating-Point Computation for DNN Binaries with MBA Obfuscation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17603)
*Yikun Hu,Zichen Zhao,Peixiang Qin,Ziyi Zhou,Jiaping Gui,Yuandao Cai,Wensheng Tang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出FLOB框架，通过混合布尔算术(MBA)变换对DNN二进制文件中的浮点运算进行混淆保护，在提升精度的二进制扩展空间中执行计算，最终投影回原始精度，有效抵抗逆向工程攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DNN模型被编译成可执行文件部署在本地设备时面临模型窃取风险，现有代码混淆方案主要针对传统程序（复杂控制流和整数运算），不适合结构简单且依赖浮点计算的DNN二进制文件。

Method: 将浮点数值提升到更高精度的二进制扩展空间，在该空间对浮点表示进行混合布尔算术(MBA)变换，计算完成后将结果投影回目标精度，在保持语义等价的同时不引入额外舍入误差。

Result: FLOB将逆向分析中的算子恢复率降至平均4.51%，相比现有方法降低了32.82个百分点，同时保持计算正确性且不引入额外数值误差。

Conclusion: FLOB在保护DNN二进制浮点运算方面优于现有混淆方案，能灵活权衡保护强度与性能开销，有效抵御逆向工程分析器和反混淆工具。

Abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have become a foundational component of modern computing systems with a wide range of applications, such as computer vision, edge intelligence, etc. For the sake of low latency and data privacy, DNN models are increasingly compiled into executables and deployed on local devices. However, that exposes the models to model theft, enabling adversaries to recover proprietary assets via reverse engineering techniques. While code obfuscation naturally emerges for protecting executables from reverse engineering, existing schemes are primarily designed for traditional programs, focusing on complex control flow structures and integer-based operations. They are fundamentally inappropriate for DNN binaries, which exhibit relatively simple code structures and heavily rely on floating-point computation.
  In this paper, we propose FLOB, an obfuscation framework that protects floating-point computations in DNN binaries using Mixed Boolean-Arithmetic (MBA) transformations. Our approach lifts floating-point values into a higher-precision binary expansion space and performs MBA transformations at the representation level. The computation is carried out entirely in the lifted space, and the final result is then projected back to the target precision, yielding outputs that are semantically equivalent under the original floating-point format, without introducing additional rounding error. The experimental results show that FLOB outperforms the state-of-the-art obfuscation schemes against existing reverse engineering analyzers and deobfuscators, while preserving computational correctness without introducing additional numerical error, allowing flexible trade-off between protection and performance. Specifically, FLOB reduces the operator recovery rate to 4.51% on average, achieving a 32.82 percentage-point reduction compared to existing methods.

</details>


### [442] [Insecure Coding Preferences in Long-Term Memory: Security Risks for LLM-based Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17619)
*Yuchen Chen,Wei Cheng,Yuan Xiao,Zhou Yang,Weifeng Sun,Chunrong Fang,Xiang Chen,Baowen Xu,David Lo,Zhenyu Chen*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 该研究首次系统探究了长期记忆中存储的不安全编码偏好对LLM代码生成安全性的影响。实验发现：不安全记忆会使漏洞代码生成率增加2.7-50.3个百分点，且风险警告率提升滞后于漏洞率提升（差距达5.4-14.0个百分点）。不安全记忆难以被正常交互覆盖，且在不同提示措辞下均有广泛影响。三种缓解策略中，安全要求附加与记忆存储可降低漏洞率19.7-33.6个百分点，但功能正确性下降最多15.9个百分点；记忆级安全过滤可实现100%的高危记忆检测，并将生成行为恢复至无记忆基线水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM系统日益集成长期记忆以提升跨会话连续性，然而一旦不安全编码偏好被存储，可能在后续代码生成中悄无声息地影响安全关键决策。目前尚无针对此问题的系统性实证研究，因此亟需探究长期记忆中不安全编码偏好对代码安全性的实际影响。

Method: 选取ChatGPT、Gemini、Qwen和Grok四种LLM，在Python、C、C++、Go、JavaScript五种编程语言上进行实验。通过注入不安全编码记忆，测量漏洞生成率变化、风险警告滞后率、记忆覆盖难度及跨提示泛化能力，并测试三种缓解策略（安全要求附加、记忆存储、记忆级安全过滤）的效果。

Result: 不安全记忆使漏洞代码生成率增加2.7-50.3个百分点；风险警告率提升滞后于漏洞率提升，差距达5.4-14.0个百分点；不安全记忆难以通过正常交互覆盖，且对不同措辞的提示均有广泛影响。安全要求附加与记忆存储可降低漏洞率19.7-33.6个百分点，但功能正确性下降最多15.9个百分点；记忆级安全过滤实现100%的高危记忆检测率，将生成行为恢复至无记忆基线。

Conclusion: 长期记忆中存储的不安全编码偏好对LLM代码生成安全性构成显著威胁，且现有缓解策略存在安全性与功能性之间的权衡。记忆级安全过滤是最有效的缓解手段，建议在实际部署中优先采用。研究为提升LLM长期记忆安全性提供了可操作的建议。

Abstract: LLM-based systems increasingly incorporate long-term memory to improve cross-session continuity. However, once insecure coding preferences are stored, they may silently influence security-critical decisions in subsequent generations. In this study, we conduct the first systematic empirical study on the impact of insecure coding preferences stored in long-term memory on the security of LLM-based code generation. We evaluate four LLMs (ChatGPT, Gemini, Qwen, and Grok) across five programming languages (Python, C, C++, Go, and JavaScript). Our results show that insecure memories significantly increase the risk of generating vulnerable code by 2.7-50.3 percentage points (pp). Moreover, they create a 5.4-14.0 percentage-point risk-warning gap, where warning-rate increases lag behind vulnerability-rate increases. Further analysis reveals that insecure memories are difficult to overwrite through normal interactions and can broadly influence model outputs even when prompts are phrased differently. Finally, we evaluate three mitigation strategies: security-requirement appending and memory storage reduce vulnerability rates by 19.7-33.6 pp but may degrade functional correctness by up to 15.9 pp; memory-level safety filtering achieves a 100\% detection rate on our evaluated risky memory entries and restores generation behavior to the without-memory baseline. Based on these findings, we provide actionable suggestions to improve the security of long-term memory in LLM-based code generation.

</details>


### [443] [Residual Observability and Attack Detectability in Encrypted OPC UA Traffic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17809)
*Song Son Ha,Florian Foerster,Henry Beuster,Eduard Zeller,Dominik Merli,Gerd Scholl*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出一个解释性框架，通过结构可观测性轮廓和结构泄漏评分（SLS）来分析加密OPC UA流量中攻击的可检测性，揭示了残差结构可观测性与攻击检测性能之间的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 加密的OPC UA通信隐藏了应用层语义，限制了入侵检测只能依赖残差通信结构。尽管基于机器学习的IDS可以检测加密流量中的攻击，但残差结构可观测性与攻击可检测性之间的关系尚不明确。

Method: 提出包含结构可观测性轮廓、结构泄漏评分（SLS）、族内/族间比较、阶段分析和维度消融分析的框架；使用Jensen-Shannon散度刻画传输、时序和协议生命周期三个维度；在工业专用5G测试平台上评估四个攻击家族。

Result: SLS通常能够跟踪族内召回率趋势，但无法复现族间可检测性排序；解释这些不匹配还需要考虑时间普遍性、突发间持久性、预测效用、独特贡献和冗余等因素。

Conclusion: 该框架通过将检测结果与可观测结构证据的幅度、时间分布和预测角色相关联，补充了传统的入侵检测系统评估指标。

Abstract: OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) encryption conceals application-layer semantics and restricts intrusion detection to residual communication structure. Although machine learning-based intrusion detection systems (IDSs) can detect attacks in encrypted OPC UA traffic, the relationship between residual structural observability and attack detectability remains insufficiently understood. This paper presents an explanatory framework combining a structural observability profile, the Structural Leakage Score (SLS), controlled within-family and cross-family comparisons, phase-specific analysis, and dimension-ablation analysis. Jensen--Shannon divergence is used to characterize transport, temporal, and protocol-lifecycle dimensions, while the SLS summarizes the residual structural magnitude. Evaluation on an industrial private 5G testbed covers four attack families with progressively reduced nominal activity. SLS generally tracks within-family recall trends but does not reproduce cross-family detectability ordering. Interpreting these mismatches also requires temporal prevalence, inter-burst persistence, predictive utility, unique contribution, and redundancy. The framework complements conventional IDS metrics by relating detection outcomes to the magnitude, temporal distribution, and predictive role of observable structural evidence.

</details>


### [444] [Rate-Distortion Function for Encrypted Traffic Side-Channel Defense](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17889)
*Guangjie Liu,Guang Cheng,Weiwei Liu,Yutong Wang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文针对加密流量防御中的参数选择问题，提出了侧信道率失真函数R^sc(D)，在平稳无记忆防御类中给出了完整刻画，证明了最优防御具有指数倾斜结构，并在真实网站指纹防御中量化了现有方法的次优性差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长期以来加密流量防御的参数选择依赖经验调优，缺乏可证明、可计算的理论基线。核心问题在于：给定QoS成本预算D，在持续观测下泄漏率能降到多低？

Method: 将语义标签序列X^n作为源，防御特征序列Y^n作为观测，以Wasserstein-1距离作为防御成本，在平稳无记忆防御类Θ_iid中定义了侧信道率失真函数R^sc(D)，并利用KKT条件证明最优防御具有指数倾斜（Boltzmann）结构。

Result: 证明了R^sc(D)单调递减、凸且连续，具有精确端点；该曲线构成Θ_iid内的精确Pareto前沿；对于二元等先验任务，D_max=1/2 W_1(P_0,P_1)；在真实网站指纹防御中，Front、WTF-PAD、TrafficSliver分别位于理论曲线上方0.028、0.034、0.124比特，量化了其次优性差距。

Conclusion: 本文为加密流量防御提供了首个可证明的理论基线，为评估和优化防御策略提供了量化工具。

Abstract: Parameter selection for encrypted traffic defense has long relied on empirical tuning, yet the fundamental question -- \emph{given a QoS cost budget $D$, how low can the leakage rate go under sustained observation?} -- lacks a provable, computable baseline. Taking the semantic label sequence $X^n$ as the source, the defended feature sequence $Y^n$ as the observation, and Wasserstein-1 distance as the defense cost, we define the \emph{side-channel rate-distortion function} $R^{\mathrm{sc}}(D)$ within the stationary memoryless defense class $Θ_{\mathrm{iid}}$ and provide its complete characterization. We prove that $R^{\mathrm{sc}}(D)$ is monotone decreasing, convex, and continuous, with exact endpoints; the optimal defense has an exponential-tilting (Boltzmann) structure governed by KKT conditions; and the curve constitutes the exact Pareto frontier within $Θ_{\mathrm{iid}}$. For binary equal-prior tasks, $D_{\max} = \tfrac{1}{2}W_1(P_0,P_1)$ via Kantorovich--Rubinstein duality. On real-world website-fingerprinting defenses, the framework locates Front ($Δ_{\mathrm{gap}}{=}0.028$\,bits), WTF-PAD ($0.034$\,bits), and TrafficSliver ($0.124$\,bits) above the theoretical curve, quantifying their suboptimality gaps.

</details>


### [445] [RT-SHCUA: Real-Time Self-Hosted Computer-Use Agent for UAV Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17951)
*Di Lu,Bo Zhang,Xiyuan Li,Yongzhi Liao,Xuewen Dong,Yulong Shen,Zhiquan Liu,Jianfeng Ma*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出RT-SHCUA架构，通过将SHCUA输出转化为带有时序、状态、权限、回退和证据语义的契约化UAV技能调用，实现实时且安全可控的自然语言无人机控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自托管计算机使用代理(SHCUA)直接应用于无人机控制存在结构性不匹配：SHCUA设计用于交互式主机端工具使用，可容忍延迟迭代；而无人机控制需应对持续变化的物理状态、严格时序约束、安全风险和问责需求，过期或篡改的决策可能导致不安全或不可追溯的行为。

Method: 将SHCUA输出转化为契约化UAV技能调用（含时序、状态、权限、回退、证据语义）；设计分离语义推理与机载执行/安全强制执行的架构；云端/边缘端慢速推理负责任务理解，机载组件仅验证并调度及时、授权且状态一致的技能；安全关键点可通过TEE或微控制器隔离机制保护，无需将大型语言代理或高频控制循环移入可信组件。

Result: 原型评估表明RT-SHCUA在有界任务级响应性下，支持降级处理、可信准入和可审计证据保留。

Conclusion: 通过契约化技能抽象和分离式架构设计，在保持实时响应的同时实现了SHCUA驱动无人机控制的安全性与可审计性。

Abstract: Natural-language control offers a promising interface for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), but directly applying self-hosted computer-use agents (SHCUAs) to UAV control introduces a structural mismatch. SHCUAs are designed for interactive host-side tool use, where delayed agent iterations are often acceptable. UAV control, however, is coupled with continuously changing physical states, strict timing constraints, safety risks, and security accountability. A stale, unauthorized, or tampered agent decision may therefore lead to unsafe or untraceable vehicle behavior.
  This paper proposes a real-time and security-oriented restructuring of SHCUA-based UAV control. Instead of allowing an SHCUA to directly issue flight commands, we transform its outputs into contract-bound UAV skill invocations with explicit timing, state, authority, fallback, and evidence semantics. Based on this abstraction, we design an architecture that separates semantic reasoning from onboard execution and security/safety enforcement. Slow cloud or edge reasoning is used for mission understanding, while onboard components validate and dispatch only timely, authorized, and state-consistent skills. Security-critical enforcement points can be protected by TEE-style or microcontroller isolation mechanisms without moving the full language agent or high-frequency flight-control loop into trusted components. Prototype evaluation shows that RT-SHCUA maintains bounded task-level responsiveness while supporting degraded handling, trusted admission, and auditable evidence preservation for SHCUA-mediated UAV actions.

</details>


### [446] [Adaptive Adversaries: A Multi-Turn, Multi-LLM Benchmark for LLM Agent Security](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18063)
*Devina Jain,David Hartmann,Chuan Li*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个包含21个场景的基准测试，用于评估自适应多轮攻击对无记忆LLM防御者的效果。实验发现：允许15轮自适应攻击相比单轮攻击成功率从0-1%提升至5.4-14.0%；三个前沿攻击者LLM联合使用比单一最佳攻击者多发现1.4-2.2倍的成功攻击；不同防御者在不同场景下表现差异显著，排名一致性低（Kendall's W=0.19）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全基准测试大多针对固定攻击池进行单轮或多轮评估，缺乏对自适应多轮攻击（攻击者可观察防御者历史响应并动态调整策略）的系统性评估。本文旨在填补这一空白，构建更贴近真实威胁场景的评估框架。

Method: 构建21个场景的基准测试，使用自主LLM攻击者在多轮交互中观察防御者响应并调整攻击策略，每轮防御者响应作为独立交互评估。固定场景、攻击者、防御者和结构化输出评分，控制攻击轮数（1轮vs15轮），并比较多个前沿攻击者LLM的联合效果。

Result: 1) 单轮攻击ASR仅0-1%，15轮自适应攻击提升至5.4-14.0%；2) 三个攻击者联合使用比单一最佳攻击者多发现1.4-2.2倍成功攻击；3) 生成的攻击与现有基准攻击余弦相似度仅0.02-0.14；4) Claude Opus和GPT-5.4总体ASR相当（各5.4%），但特定场景差异显著（Opus在某一场景ASR达60%，而GPT-5.4和Gemini仅7%）。

Conclusion: 自适应多轮攻击显著提升了攻击成功率，且不同防御者在不同场景下的脆弱性差异很大，单一指标无法全面反映防御能力。需要更细粒度、多场景的评估体系来准确衡量LLM防御者的安全性。

Abstract: LLM-based agents process external content, exposing them to prompt injection and multi-turn manipulation. Most safety benchmarks evaluate defenders against fixed attack pools collected before evaluation, single-turn or multi-turn. We present a 21-scenario benchmark for \emph{adaptive multi-round attacks against memoryless LLM defenders}: an autonomous LLM attacker observes prior defender responses and pivots across rounds, while each defender response is evaluated as a fresh interaction. Holding the 21 scenarios, attackers, defenders, and structured-output scoring fixed, restricting scoring to the first attacker turn yields $0$-$1\%$ attack success rate (ASR); allowing 15 rounds of adaptive attack yields $5.4$-$14.0\%$. Pooling three frontier attacker LLMs uncovers $1.4$-$2.2\times$ as many unique successful attacks as the best single attacker, and the generated attacks have low cosine similarity ($0.02$-$0.14$) to attacks in existing benchmarks. Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.4 are tied in aggregate ($5.4\%$ each; overlapping $95\%$ CIs), but their weaknesses differ sharply: on one scenario Opus reaches $60\%$ ASR ($95\%$ CI $36$--$80\%$) while GPT-5.4 and Gemini each stay at $7\%$ (CI $1$-$30\%$; the gap is preserved in a higher-$N$ replication). $13$ of $21$ scenarios distinguish at least one defender pair, yet rankings disagree across scenarios (Kendall's $W = 0.19$). We release the benchmark -- 21 evaluation scenarios, 10 public development scenarios, the orchestrator, baseline harnesses, and a multi-attacker CLI -- plus 945 transcripts from the 3$\times$3 frontier matrix, an attack-replay dataset, and 18{,}422 gpt-oss-20b battles from an open competition's final scoring rounds.

</details>


### [447] [GARAGE: Characterizing the Automation Boundary in LLM-based Attack Graph Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18108)
*Daekwon Pi,Sangho Lee,Young Hun Lee,Huy Kang Kim*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出GARAGE框架，利用RAG技术将非结构化网络威胁情报（CTI）转化为汽车领域可用的知识库，实现自动化攻击图生成。通过12,786个CVE和140份事故报告构建STIX 2.1/Auto-ISAC兼容知识库，经320次留一实验验证其能准确迁移安全知识至全新车辆架构，并作为可扩展的TARA支撑工具适配不同LLM层级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前车辆安全依赖CTI合成，但自动化工具难以处理非结构化数据及汽车特有架构细节，缺乏领域适配能力。

Method: 提出GARAGE框架：基于RAG技术将碎片化CTI转换为结构化知识库（兼容STIX 2.1和Auto-ISAC标准）；通过细粒度杀伤链分析形式化战术模式场景；采用320次留一实验评估知识迁移能力。

Result: 成功合成12,786个CVE和140份事故报告；320次留一实验表明框架能准确将安全知识迁移至完全未见过的车辆架构；提供全面的成本-性能分析指导LLM部署。

Conclusion: GARAGE可作为人机协同流程中可扩展的TARA支撑工具，有效弥合非结构化CTI与汽车领域自动化攻击图生成之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: While modern vehicle security depends on effective Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI) synthesis, current automated tools struggle with unstructured data and automotive-specific architectural nuances. To bridge this gap, we introduce GARAGE, a RAG-powered framework that converts fragmented CTI into an actionable, domain-specific knowledge base for automated attack graph generation. GARAGE synthesizes a dataset of 12,786 CVEs and 140 incident reports into a STIX 2.1 and Auto-ISAC ATM-compliant knowledge base. By formalizing tactical-pattern-level scenarios through granular kill chain analysis, GARAGE achieves threat generation capabilities. Our 320 Leave-One-Out experiments reveal that the framework can accurately transfer security knowledge to entirely unseen vehicle architectures. Furthermore, we position GARAGE as a scalable TARA support tool within human-in-the-loop workflows, offering a comprehensive cost-performance analysis to guide its deployment across various LLM tiers.

</details>


### [448] [RRAM-DP: Device-Calibrated Differential Privacy for In-Memory Edge Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18169)
*Kwunhang Wong,Jichang Yang,Karl M. H. Lai,Hegan Chen,Songqi Wang,Wei Xuan,Ning Lin,Han Wang,Xiaojuan Qi,Zhongrui Wang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出RRAM-DP，一种硬件-算法协同设计方法，利用RRAM固有的随机写入行为实现差分隐私保护，在CIFAR-10/100等任务上仅牺牲3.8%的精度即达到(ε=2, δ=O(1/n))-DP，同时相比A100和DiVa-GEMM分别节省高达57倍和3.2倍能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘AIoT系统收集敏感数据引发隐私担忧，RRAM虽具备高效计算能力但其随机写入行为通常被视为缺陷，如何将其转化为有原则的隐私保护机制并保持模型效用尚未被充分探索。

Method: 硬件-算法协同设计：1）放松RRAM写入验证操作以注入校准噪声，实现固有(ε, δ)-DP并给出正式DP分析；2）结合预训练技术，形成新型隐私保护、高效用的CiM训练范式。

Result: 在CIFAR-10/100、STS-B和SST-2上，RRAM-DP-SGD在(ε=2, δ=O(1/n))-DP下相比非私有SGD仅下降最多3.8%精度；同隐私水平下，比A100和DiVa-GEMM分别节省高达57倍和3.2倍能耗，以及2.7倍和1.8倍加速。

Conclusion: 证明了在边缘RRAM上实现高效、隐私保护的存内训练是可行的。

Abstract: Edge Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT) systems often collect sensitive data in situ, raising serious privacy concerns. Resistive-switching random-access memory (RRAM) is an attractive substrate for efficient AIoT thanks to its multi-bit storage and compute-in-memory (CiM) capabilities, while its inherently stochastic write behavior provides a natural source of randomness that can be leveraged for differential privacy (DP) protection. Yet how to transform this device-level randomness-typically viewed as detrimental to accuracy-into a principled randomized mechanism while preserving model utility remains underexplored. We propose RRAM-DP, a hardware-algorithm co-design that relaxes RRAM write-verify operations to inject calibrated noise for inherently (epsilon, delta)-DP with formal DP analysis; together with pretraining techniques, it renders a novel private, high-utility CiM training paradigm. On CIFAR-10/100, STS-B, and SST-2, RRAM-DP-SGD incurs at best only a 3.8% accuracy drop at (epsilon=2, delta=O(1/n))-DP relative to non-private SGD. At the same privacy level, RRAM-DP-SGD delivers up to 57x and 3.2x energy savings and 2.7x and 1.8x speedups over A100 and DiVa-GEMM, respectively. These results point toward efficient, privacy-preserving in-memory training on RRAM at the edge.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [449] [Automated Hardware Validation Test Plan Generation for Large Scale AI Datacenter Platforms Using a Generative AI Multi-Agents Architecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16388)
*Mohammed-Khalil Ghali,Saurabh Kulkarni,Prathamesh Kulkarni,Rohan Kulkarni,Sangwon Yoon,Daehan Won*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多智能体生成式AI架构，能够从自愈验证文档和物料清单两个输入自动生成硬件验证测试计划，在两大生产平台上实现了74.2%和51.4%的覆盖率提升，将编写时间从天级缩短至小时级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前硬件验证测试计划依赖人工编写，流程劳动密集、易出错、依赖机构知识，覆盖率问题发现滞后、可追溯性差且跨平台重复劳动严重。

Method: 提出生成式AI多智能体架构，包含三个智能体：摄入智能体（标准化异构输入）、分类智能体（通过上下文推理将组件映射到功能域）、生成智能体（结合标准化故障模式与分类数据合成测试用例并填补空白）。

Result: 在两个生产平台上，覆盖率分别提升74.2%和51.4%，编写时间从天级降至小时级，100%提取保真度，新场景接受度高。

Conclusion: 该框架是鲁棒的人机协同增效工具，输出可完全追溯至源规范，多智能体架构可跨平台移植。

Abstract: Large-scale AI datacenter platforms comprise thousands of heterogeneous hardware components whose validation requires comprehensive fault injection test plans. Today these plans are authored manually: engineers review hardware self-healing validation documents and bills of materials, enumerate failure modes per field-replaceable unit, and produce flat lists of single-layer test cases. This process is labor-intensive, error-prone, and dependent on institutional knowledge; coverage gaps surface late, traceability to source specifications is implicit, and the effort is largely repeated per platform. This paper presents a generative AI multi-agent architecture that automates the generation of structured hardware validation test plans from two canonical inputs: self-healing validation documents, which enumerate known failure modes and their detection and remediation behaviors per field-replaceable unit, and component Bills of Material. An ingestion agent normalizes heterogeneous inputs into a canonical representation; a classification agent maps components to functional domains via contextual reasoning over part descriptions and sub-category hierarchies; and a generation agent synthesizes test cases by combining normalized failure modes with domain-classified data, filling gaps and producing edge cases. The output conforms to a standardized schema for direct import into internal validation software. Evaluated on two production platforms against manual baselines, the framework achieves coverage expansions of 74.2% and 51.4%, cutting authoring from days to hours. It yields fully traceable mappings from each test case to its source specification, and its multi-agent decomposition is portable across platform generations. Automated and expert evaluations confirm 100% extraction fidelity and high acceptance of new scenarios, validating the framework as a robust human-in-the-loop force multiplier.

</details>


### [450] [Laplacian Spectral Shaping for Non-Uniform Scaling Formation Control of Open Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16709)
*Tao He,Gangshan Jing*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种分布式协议，通过策略性调整拉普拉斯矩阵的部分权重，在开放多智能体系统中实现非均匀尺度控制的编队形状保持，支持任意维度的拓扑动态变化（智能体加入/离开、边添加/移除）和任意领导者选择，相比现有方法具有更稀疏的感知图和更灵活的结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在开放多智能体系统中，拓扑变化（智能体数量、边数量和领导者选择的变化）会动态改变矩阵值拉普拉斯算子，破坏非均匀尺度控制所需的谱性质（半正定性、正确核空间、跟随者块正定性），亟需开发新协议来维持这些性质。

Method: 开发了分布式协议，通过策略性调整拉普拉斯矩阵的部分权重，应对智能体加入、边添加、智能体离开和边移除等拓扑动态变化，支持任意维度空间中的编队控制。

Result: 所提协议能够在拓扑动态变化下保持期望的编队谱性质，且相比现有仿射编队控制方法，所需感知图更稀疏，无需预定义的父子层级结构，支持领导者重新分配。

Conclusion: 通过理论分析和数值仿真验证了所提协议的有效性，为开放多智能体系统中的灵活编队控制提供了新方案。

Abstract: Non-uniform scaling control enables a multi-agent formation to adjust its shape by compressing or stretching independently along different coordinate axes through inter-agent interactions, offering high flexibility in complex environments. The fundamental idea is encoding the desired formation shape as the kernel of a matrix-valued Laplacian. In open multi-agent systems, however, changes in number of agents, number of edges, and leader selection dynamically alter this Laplacian, destroying the required spectral properties: positive semidefiniteness, correct kernel, and positive definiteness of the follower block (we summarize these properties as the formation spectrum). In this paper, we develop distributed protocols to strategically adjust partial weights of the Laplacian matrix for formation control in arbitrary dimensional space. By implementing the protocols, the desired formation spectrum can be preserved under dynamic topology changes including agent joining, edge addition, agent leaving, and edge removal, while any pair of agents can serve as leaders. Unlike existing Laplacian design methods for affine formation control under topology changes, the proposed approach requires a sparser sensing graph, avoids a predefined parent-child hierarchical structure, and supports leader reassignment. The effectiveness of the proposed protocols is validated through both theoretical analysis and numerical simulations.

</details>


### [451] [When Is Heterogeneous Distance-Decay Facility Location Tractable? A Structural Classification, Exact Methods, and a Real-World Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16764)
*Zhou He,T. C. E. Cheng,Jichang Dong*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文研究了异质性衰减尺度下的连续平面设施选址问题，提出了统一目标函数，并给出了可解性分类、精确离散方法、高效的启发电算方法以及真实世界的案例验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实中的设施选址问题中，不同需求点的衰减尺度各不相同，这种异质性普遍存在但尚未被充分挖掘，现有方法难以统一处理衰减、聚类和中位数等目标。

Method: (i) 可解性分类：离散目标是单调子模的，连续目标在衰减为距离的凹函数时为凹函数；(ii) 精确离散方法：候选离散化最大覆盖MIP，LP松弛间隙接近0%；(iii) 力-梯度/大规模邻域搜索启发式算法；(iv) 基于真实城市配送和零售数据集进行实证研究。

Result: 所提启发式算法在30个设施时在30/30个实例上优于(1-1/e)贪婪、Cooper交替定位分配、粒子群优化和加权k-means (p<10^-9)，与专用求解器竞争力相当；忽略衰减异质性会导致捕获需求损失高达9.7%，设施位置偏移达37%。

Conclusion: 异质性衰减尺度的设施选址问题在理论和实践中都有重要价值，所提方法有效解决了该问题，真实数据验证了考虑衰减异质性的必要性。

Abstract: We study continuous planar facility location in which a demand point's captured value decays with distance, with the per-point decay scale varying across points. This heterogeneity is ubiquitous yet underexploited, and one nearest-facility objective unifies decay, clustering, and median goals, containing k-means, the Weber/p-median problem, and maximum covering as special cases. We make four contributions. (i) A tractability classification: the discrete objective is always monotone submodular, so the (1-1/e) greedy guarantee holds regardless of decay shape or heterogeneity, and the continuous cooperative objective is concave if and only if the decay is concave in distance; the clip max(0,d) in common coverage specifications is what destroys concavity, and the classification is tight. (ii) An exact discrete method: the candidate-discretized maximum-cover MIP has an empirically tight LP relaxation (~0% gap) and is solved by branch-and-bound in seconds for n <= 500. (iii) A force-as-gradient / large-neighborhood-search heuristic, within 0.5% of the discrete optimum, that outperforms the (1-1/e) greedy, Cooper-style alternating location-allocation, particle swarm optimization, and weighted k-means (30/30 per-instance wins at K=30, p<10^-9) and is competitive with bespoke solvers on k-means, Weber/p-median, and shape-demand instances. (iv) A real-world study: on 592,667 urban-delivery orders, ignoring the calibrated decay variation loses up to 9.7% of captured demand and relocates facilities by up to 37% of the map; a retail dataset calibrates the decay as exponential with scale R ~ 1.4 km.

</details>


### [452] [Auto Research for Materials: Auditable AI-Scientist Workflows with Held-Out Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17100)
*Jingjie Ning,Xiaochuan Li,Shanshan Zhong,Ji Zeng,Guolin Ke*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文研究了AI研究代理在材料预测中产生的改进是否能泛化到未见数据，并验证了代码的可重用性。通过七个搜索实验、701个变更和十个Matbench端点测试，发现90%的变更在保留集上仍然有效，并揭示了两种材料建模机制：组合任务中特征、模型和表征改进效果相当；结构任务中几何描述符和模型校准更有效，且组合改进可带来26.3%的平均提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI研究代理能通过封闭循环提高分数，但缺乏对改进结果是否真正泛化到全新数据以及代码是否可复用的严格验证。本文旨在提出更严格的评估标准，检验代理产生的变更在未见数据上的生存能力及其代码的可移植性。

Method: 将搜索分离为特征、模型、表征和训练数据四类变更；在七个搜索中产生701个评估变更，覆盖十个Matbench端点；代理仅接收五次内部折叠的平均值以减少开发集依赖；冻结选定代码后在一个未曾使用的保留集上评估一次。

Result: 90%的选定变更在保留集上仍为最佳单一干预；组合任务中特征、模型和表征变更均可带来改善（带隙MAE降低17.4%，钢强度降低18.6%），外部数据贡献有限；结构任务中几何描述符和模型/校准变更平均降低MAE 14.6%和7.1%；组合特征和模型变更实现26.3%的平均保留集提升。

Conclusion: 闭环代理在材料预测中能产生在未见数据上仍然有效的决策，且代码变更可在任务间重用和组合。本文为测试反馈循环之外的可执行发现提供了评估设计框架。

Abstract: An AI research agent can improve the score it sees without finding a modelling change that works on new materials. We ask a stricter question. After repeated experiments, does the selected change survive on data that never entered the loop, and can its code be reused? We separate the search into changes to features, models, representations, and training data. Seven searches produce 701 evaluated changes across ten Matbench endpoints. Agents receive only the mean over five inner folds, reducing reliance on any single development split. We then freeze the selected code and evaluate it once on an untouched holdout. Nine of ten choices remain the best tested single intervention. The surviving changes reveal two materials modelling regimes. With composition alone, feature, model, and representation changes provide comparable routes to improvement. They include held-out MAE reductions of 17.4\% for band gap and 18.6\% for steel strength, as well as gains on both classification endpoints, while screened external data adds little. For structure tasks, richer geometry descriptors and model or calibration changes lower mean held-out MAE by 14.6\% and 7.1\% and lead on different property families, whereas composition embeddings do not transfer. Combining separately found feature and model changes yields a 26.3\% mean held-out improvement. These results show in materials prediction that closed-loop agents can produce decisions that survive unseen evidence and code changes that can be reused across tasks and combined. More broadly, they provide an evaluation design for testing executable discoveries beyond the feedback loop.

</details>


### [453] [The Optimization Trilemma: Efficiency, Comfort and Fairness in Decentralized Multi-agent Coordination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17311)
*Jovan Nikolic,Maciej Krzysztof Zuziak,Evangelos Pournaras*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文研究了去中心化多智能体协调中的公平资源分配问题，提出了一种能同时优化系统效率、个体舒适度和公平性（即平衡各智能体间的不适成本）的新模型，并通过实验验证了其在不显著增加通信和计算开销的情况下实现了更公平的优化结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有算法主要集中在集中式场景下优化系统效率与个体舒适度，但未解决完全去中心化场景中的公平资源优化问题，特别是智能体间不适成本的均衡分配，以避免因不公平导致的激励丧失或极化现象破坏计划运行。

Method: 设计了一种新型模型，在去中心化多智能体协调中同时优化三个正交目标：系统级效率、个体舒适度和公平性（即不适成本的均衡分配），且不显著增加通信和计算开销。

Result: 在两个真实世界数据集上的实验验证了该模型的有效性，表明其在满足智能体偏好和系统目标的同时，能够实现更公平的优化结果。

Conclusion: 该工作填补了去中心化场景下公平多智能体协调的空白，证明了在无需大幅增加计算通信成本的前提下，可以同时实现系统效率、个体舒适度和公平性的协同优化。

Abstract: The problem of fair multi-agent coordination in decentralized settings is one of the most pressing challenges for building efficient collaborative systems. Resource allocation is based on optimized collective arrangements accounting for agents' needs. Such coordination should not only be computationally efficient but also account for fairness, i.e., equitable redistribution of costs incurred by all agents. Recent literature has proposed several algorithms that efficiently determine optimal plan combinations balancing system-wide efficiency and individual discomfort of agents in a centralized setting. However, these works do not address equitable resource optimization in fully decentralized scenarios, specifically, the optimized redistribution of discomfort among coordinating agents so that none experiences a discomfort level that could lead to loss of incentive or polarization that can disrupt planned operations. In this work, we study the problem of optimizing three objectives: (i) system-wide efficiency, (ii) individuals' comfort and (iii) fairness (i.e., balancing of incurred discomfort costs) in decentralized multi-agent coordination. We design a novel model to optimize those three orthogonal objectives, without any substantial increase in communication and computational overhead. Through experiments on two real-world datasets, we validate the model and demonstrate that it can achieve fairer optimization outcomes, while satisfying agents' preferences and system goals.

</details>


### [454] [A Digital Twin-Based Method for Evaluating Local Collective Tariffs in Distribution-Level Energy Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17640)
*Kristoffer Christensen,Bo Nørregaard Jørgensen,Zheng Grace Ma*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于数字孪生的方法，用于评估配电网层级分布式能源系统的本地集体电价机制，通过对丹麦实际电价案例的分析，验证了该方法在捕捉用户行为、基础设施与监管设计交互作用方面的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有电价评估方法缺乏工程基础，无法真实反映实际行为与基础设施条件下的电价机制效果，因此需要一种能够系统性评估配电网层级电价机制的方法。

Method: 基于数字孪生的评估方法，集成三个核心模块：基于智能体的家庭用电与发电行为建模、通过共享计量抽象实现虚拟聚合、以及电价逻辑在统一仿真环境中的显式表达。

Result: 异质需求画像的聚合降低了峰值重合度，实现了电价组分更高效的分配，带来社区层面的可量化成本降低；同时，结果揭示了成本中性受消费与发电时间对齐程度的敏感性影响。

Conclusion: 数字孪生评估方法能够系统性地支持电价机制评估，捕捉基础设施、用户行为与监管设计之间的交互作用，为配电网层级电价结构的分析与比较提供了通用基础。

Abstract: This work addresses the need for engineering-grounded evaluation of implement-ed tariff mechanisms in distribution-level energy systems. A digital twin-based method is proposed for assessing local collective tariffs under realistic behavioral and infrastructural conditions. The approach integrates agent-based modeling of household consumption and generation, virtual aggregation through a shared metering abstraction, and explicit representation of tariff logic within a unified simulation environment. The method is demonstrated through its application to the Danish Local Collective Tariff across representative residential energy community configurations, including scenarios with photovoltaic generation, battery storage, and electric vehicle charging. Results indicate that aggregation of heterogeneous demand profiles reduces peak coincidence and enables more efficient allocation of tariff components, leading to measurable cost reductions at the community level. At the same time, the outcomes reveal sensitivity to the temporal alignment of consumption and generation, influencing the degree of cost neutrality across participants. The findings illustrate how digital twin-based evaluation can support systematic assessment of tariff mechanisms by capturing the interaction between infrastructure, user behavior, and regulatory design. The proposed approach provides a basis for analyzing and comparing tariff structures in distribution-level energy systems beyond the specific case considered.

</details>


### [455] [Value-Aware Prediction for Robust Multi-Agent Coordination Under Communication Loss](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17914)
*Kemal Devrim Kafadar,Eren Özaltun,Mahmud Efnan Şanlı,Feyza Orak,Emirhan Gazi,Kubilay Kağan Kömürcü,Nazım Kemal Üre*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出Value-Aware MARO方法，通过价值感知加权机制优化多智能体通信中断时的状态估计，在通信可靠性低于40%时平均回报提升超20%，性能方差降低64.7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于重建损失训练的预测模型在强化学习中平等对待所有状态转换，浪费容量在学习随机探索噪声和次优策略的过时动态上，导致通信中断时性能下降。

Method: 在MARO框架基础上，利用actor-critic架构的advantage估计动态加权预测器的损失函数，使预测模型学习与策略演进耦合，聚焦于高回报的意图性动态。

Result: 在Multi-Agent Particle Environment多个任务中，通信可靠性低于40%时，相比基线平均回报提升超20%，性能方差降低64.7%，有效防止高通信丢失场景下的性能崩溃。

Conclusion: 价值感知加权策略能显著提升多智能体系统在通信中断场景下的鲁棒性，尤其在低通信可靠性条件下优势明显。

Abstract: Robust multi-agent coordination relies heavily on inter-agent communication, which is frequently disrupted by physical and environmental constraints in real-world deployments. To maintain operation during these intermittent communication failures, agents can employ internal prediction models to estimate missing shared state information. However, predictors trained with standard reconstruction objectives treat all transitions equally. In a Reinforcement Learning context, this forces the model to waste capacity learning stochastic exploration noise and the outdated dynamics of suboptimal policies. In this paper, we propose a value-aware extension of Multi-Agent Observation Sharing under Communication Dropout (MARO) to patch communication gaps; we refer to this method as Value-Aware MARO. By dynamically weighting the predictor's loss function using advantage estimates derived from the underlying actor-critic architecture, our objective explicitly couples the predictor's learning process to the policy's evolution. This formulation focuses the model's capacity on the intentional, high-return dynamics actively reinforced by the agents. We evaluate our framework on several tasks within the Multi-Agent Particle Environment under varying communication reliability levels. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach maintains performance under declining communication reliability, particularly below 40%. While our method performs comparably in tasks where the baseline already maintains high coordination, our value-aware weighting effectively prevents the performance collapse observed in the standard predictor during high-attrition scenarios. In these environments, our method achieves an average improvement in mean returns of more than 20% and reduces performance variance by a mean of 64.7% compared to the standard unweighted baseline.

</details>


### [456] [PRIME: Plasticity Recovery in Multi-Agent Environments for UAV-Assisted Emergency Communication Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17922)
*Wen Qiu,Zhiqiang He,Wei Zhao,Hiroshi Masui*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 针对多智能体强化学习中非平稳性导致神经元休眠损害内部状态的问题，提出PRIME方法，通过双向沉默神经元框架结合梯度信号和团队级聚合，在无人机应急通信模拟器上提升24.9%的回报率，将休眠神经元比例从40-45%降至10-20%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习控制器多假设平稳环境，少数处理变化的仅响应外部环境而忽略网络内部状态。研究表明持续非平稳性会直接损害内部状态：目标变化导致神经元逐渐休眠，共享策略丧失学习能力。简单重置休眠神经元在多智能体训练中不安全，因为看似不活跃的神经元可能仍在接收强训练梯度，且休眠与否取决于观测内容。

Method: 提出PRIME方法，将双向沉默神经元框架扩展到合作多智能体强化学习：聚合完整团队批次的激活和梯度统计，读取训练损失已储存的反向梯度信号（而非手工代理），仅重新初始化同时满足激活休眠和梯度沉默条件的神经元。

Result: 在相变无人机应急通信模拟器上，PRIME比MAPPO提升24.9%的分位数间平均回报，将休眠神经元比例控制在10-20%（对比40-45%）。消融实验表明增益来自梯度信号和团队级聚合。动态遗憾界显示扰动成本与沉默子空间维度成比例，而非全部参数。

Conclusion: PRIME有效解决了多智能体强化学习中非平稳性导致的神经元休眠问题，通过双向验证实现安全重置，同时保留有用表征并恢复学习能力。

Abstract: Most reinforcement learning controllers for these networks assume stationary conditions, and the few that handle change react to the external environment while leaving the network's internal state unexamined. We show that sustained non-stationarity damages this internal state directly: as objectives shift, neurons progressively fall dormant and the shared policy loses the capacity to learn. The obvious remedy, resetting dormant neurons, is unsafe under shared-parameter multi-agent training: many neurons that appear inactive are still receiving strong training gradients, and whether a neuron appears dormant depends on which agent's observations it processes. PRIME (Plasticity Recovery In Multi-agent Environments) therefore verifies both directions before intervening. Extending the bidirectional Silent Neuron framework to cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning, it aggregates activation and gradient statistics over the full team batch, reads the backward signal from the gradient the training loss has already deposited , not from a hand-crafted proxy, and reinitializes only neurons that are simultaneously activation-dormant and gradient-silent. Useful representations are preserved while learning capacity is restored. On a phase-switching UAV emergency communication simulator, PRIME improves interquartile mean return by 24.9\% over MAPPO and holds dormant neuron fractions at 10--20\% versus 40--45\%; ablations attribute the gains to the gradient signal and team-level aggregation rather than to the specific reset operator. A dynamic regret bound shows that the perturbation cost scales with the small silent-subspace dimension rather than the full parameter count.

</details>


### [457] [Aggregate in the Advantage, Not the Ratio: A Canonical-Form Analysis of Cooperative Multi-Agent Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17924)
*Zijian Zhao,Sen Li*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文研究了多智能体策略优化中优势函数和比率两个维度上的邻居聚合问题，证明了这两者的支持矩阵仅通过乘积影响优化目标，并据此提出设计原则：优势应聚合到耦合邻域大小，比率应保持每个智能体独立。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（如IPPO、MAPPO、HAPPO等）在优势聚合和比率聚合两个维度上选择分散且未经充分探索，缺乏统一的理论指导。

Method: 形式化定义支持矩阵S_A和S_R，证明期望优化目标仅依赖于它们的乘积S=S_R S_A，推导冗余性和方差排序两个关键结论。

Result: 发现两个支持矩阵在信号上可互换（冗余性）；优势聚合为和的加性方差（存在内部偏置-方差最优），比率聚合为积的乘性方差（随支持大小指数增长，无偏置减少）。

Conclusion: 设计原则明确：优势应聚合到耦合邻域大小，比率应保持每个智能体独立。

Abstract: Multi-agent policy optimization, exemplified by PPO-based methods, is a key branch of cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). A central design question is how many neighboring agents\footnote{In this paper, "neighbors" refer not only to physical proximity but also to agents whose actions influence one another.} to aggregate in order to effectively utilize global information for cooperation. This decision must be made along two dimensions: in the advantage (which agents' rewards contribute to the credit signal) and in the ratio (which agents' likelihood ratios form the clipped importance weight). Existing methods occupy scattered, underexplored points on these two axes: IPPO treats both separately; MAPPO pairs a team-level advantage with per-agent ratios; HAPPO employs sequential ratios with per-agent advantages; and single-agent reductions operating on factorized joint policies aggregate both into fully joint products. We formalize these two design choices as support matrices $\SA$ and $\SR$, and prove a canonical structure: the expected multi-agent policy optimization objective depends on the pair $(\SA,\SR)$ only through their matrix product $\tS=\SR\SA$. This yields two key consequences: (i) Redundancy: the two support matrices are interchangeable with respect to the signal, meaning neither aggregation pattern is inherently superior.(ii) Variance Ordering: the advantage aggregates rewards as a sum (additive variance with an interior bias-variance optimum at the coupling neighborhood), whereas the ratio aggregates likelihood ratios as a product (multiplicative variance that grows exponentially with support size, with no accompanying bias reduction). The resulting design principle is unambiguous: aggregate neighbors in the advantage, sized to the coupling neighborhood, and keep the ratio per-agent.

</details>
